2Chronicles21:19 Urunakax jalaskakïnwa, ukat pä mararusti, uka usup laykux jiphillanakapax mistxapunïnwa, ukatsti wali t'aqhisisaw jiwxäna. Markapax janiw sutip amtasin ninsa aqtaykänti, kunjämtix nayra awkinakapampi lurapkatayna ukhama." 
2Chronicles21:20 Joram chachax kimsa tunka payan maranïkän ukkhaw marka apnaqañ qalltäna, ukatsti Jerusalén markan kimsaqallq maraw marka apnaqäna. Jupan jiwxatapatsti janiw khiti jachiris utjkänti. Amayapxa Davidan Markaparuw imt'apxäna, janiw reyinakan imäwinakap jak'ar imapkänti."

2Chronicles24:25 Sirio ejercitox sarxäna ukkhaxa, Joás reyirux wali usuntat jaytawayäna, jilïr jaqinakapasti jan walinak amtasin pachpa ikiñaparuw jupar jiwayapxäna, ukhamat Joiadá sacerdoten yuqapan jiwatap phuqsusisa. Ukatsti Davidan Markaparuw imt'xapxäna, ukampis janiw reyinakan amay imäwiparux imapkänti." 
2Chronicles25:28 Amayapxa mä caballot Jerusalenarux apanipxäna, ukatsti nayra awkinakapamp chika Davidan Markapan imt'xapxäna." 
2Chronicles27:2 Jotam reyin luratanakapasti Tatitun nayraqatapan chiqapänwa, kunjämatix Ozías awkipan luratanakapax chiqapäkäna ukhama. Ukhamäkipansa, janipuniw jupax Tatitun utapar incienso nakhayañatak mantkänti. Markasti jan wali lurañanak luraskakïnwa." 
2Chronicles27:9 Jotam reyix jiwxäna ukkhasti, Davidan Markapana, nayra awkinakap thiyaruw jupar imt'xapxäna. Ukatsti jupa lantix, Ahaz yuqapaw reyïxäna." 
2Chronicles29:3 Marka apnaqañ qalltkäna uka mara qallta phaxsinxa, jupaw Tatitun utapan punkunakap jist'arayäna, ukatsti askichayarakïna." 
2Chronicles31:10 ukxarusti Sadoc chachan utapankir Azarías jilïri sacerdotew jupar säna: “Markax Tatitun utapar yanapanak apaniñ qalltki ukkhat jichhakamax, waljaw nanakatak manq'añax utji, ukhamarusa taqi akanakaw jilt'aski; Tatituw markapar aski waxt'äwipampi phuqt'i uka layku” sasa." 
2Chronicles32:5 Ezequiasasti ch'amañchasïnwa, ukatsti markan tukjata pirqapa askichayäna, uka pirqa patxarusti pukaranak lurayäna, ukatxa anqäxan yaqha pirqampi lurayarakïna. Ukxarusti Davidan Markap thiyankki uka q'awanaksa laq'ampiw phuqhantayäna, ukatsti lanzanaka, jark'aqasiñanak waljpun lurayäna." 
2Chronicles32:30 Ezequiasarakiw Guihón chiqankir uma jalsüki ukxa alay tuqit llupantayäna, ukatsti jupaw aynach tuqiru jist'jayarakïna, Davidan Markapat inti jalanta tuqiru. Taqi kuntix Ezequiasax lurañatak amtkäna ukanakax, askiruw sararapïna." 
2Chronicles33:14 Uka qhipatsti, Manasés reyix Davidan Markapan Guihón ukkhata, inti jalanta tuqirux mä uyu pirqa lurayäna, uka pirqax jisk'a jawir chiq sarasax Chawllanakan Punkupa chiqaruw purïna, ukatsti Ófel chiqanjam muyuntanïna. Uka uyu pirqasti alay tuqirux wali jach'a luratänwa. Ukatsti Judá uraqinkir nuwasiñatak lurat taqpach markanakarux, soldadonakan jilïrinakap uchäna." 
2Chronicles36:1 Markankir jaqinakasti Josías reyin Joacaz yuqaparuw ajllipxäna, ukatsti awkip lanti Jerusalén markan reyit utt'ayapxäna." 
Nehemiah2:16 Marka apnaqirinakasti janiw yatipkänti nayan kawkiru sarataxsa, kun lurataxsa. Judionakarusa, sacerdotenakarusa janirakiw yatiykäyätti ukkhakamaxa, jilïrinakarusa, marka apnaqirinakarusa, khitinakatix pirqa lurañanakan yanapasipkani ukanakarusa." 
Nehemiah5:5 Ukhamarus sasipkakïnwa: “Marka masinakaxasa, nanakasa mä pachpa wilat jutirkamakïpxtwa; wawanakaxasti jupanakan wawanakapat janiw kunansa mayjäkiti. Ukampis wawanakaxaruxa t'aqhisiyat jaqïñapatak aljañaw wakt'apxitu. Nanakan phuchhanakaxat waljaniw niya aljantat uñjasxapxi, nanakasti jark'añatakix janiw kuns kamacht'irjamäpkti, nanakan uraqinakaxasa, uva yapunakaxasa yaqha jaqinakankxatapata” sasa."

Nehemiah11:24 Markachirinak taypit reyi nayraqatar uñstañataki uchatax Petahías chachänwa, jupasti Mesezabel, Zérah, Judá uka chachanakat saraqirïnwa." 
Esther1:14 Reyin yanapir jaqinakapax paqallqunïnwa: Carsená, Setar, Admata, Tarsis, Meres, Marsená, Memucán ukanaka. Jupanakax Persia, Media uka markanakan wali aytat jaqinakänwa. Marka apnaqäwinsti, yäqat jilïr jaqinakarakïnwa."

Isaiah2:7 Markax qullqinsa, qurinsa phuqhantatawa, qamir yänakapas waljapuniwa; markasti caballonakan phuqhantatawa, carronakapas waljarakiwa." 
Isaiah3:12 Mä jisk'a yuqallakiw markaxar t'aqhisiyirixa, marka apnaqäwix warminakan amparapankiwa. Markaxay, irpirinakamax k'arintapxtamwa, pantat thakhinakanjam irptamxa." 
Isaiah4:2 Uka urux purinkani ukapachasti, jupanakax taqi kunan phuqt'ataw suman jakasxapxani. Markaxasti wali jach'ar tukt'asaw jakxani, kuna achunaktix uraqipax churkani taqi ukanakata. Khitinakatix Jerusalén markan qhiparapkani ukanakarusti, janiw taqinir mutuykäti, pachpa markan jakapxañapatakiw wakichä, ukatsti “Tatitun ajllit markapa” sas sutichatäpxaniwa." 
Isaiah5:17 Markanakasti q'ala t'unjatäniwa, uka tinkut pirqanak taypinsti ovejanakampi cabritonakampikiw manq'xapxani."

Isaiah10:14 Markanakan qamir yänakapsti katuntastwa, taqi uraqpach katuntasirakta, kunjämatix maynix apanukut tapat k'awnanak lunthatki ukhama, ¡janiw khititsa kuns kamskiti, janirakiw khitis arsuskiti!”" 
Isaiah11:10 Uka uru purinkan ukkhasti, Davidat mayni saraqiripaw uka marka apnaqañatak qunt'asini, taqi markanakaruw mayawjar tantacht'ani. Markapasti jach'ar aptatäña, ch'amanirakiw tukuni." 
Isaiah13:4 Qullunakansti walja jaqinakan arnaqasitanakapaw ist'asi. Markanakan uxutanakapaw ist'asi, kawkïr markanakatix tantacht'aski ukanakata. Taqi ch'aman Tatitusti soldadonakaparux uñakipiwa, nuwantañatakix wakicht'atäpxiwa."

Isaiah14:20 Markamar tukjatamatsti, markaman utjir jaqinakar jiwarayatamatsa, janiw jichhax mayni reyinakarjam imapkätamti. Ukham ñanqha lurir jaqin wawanakapasti, janiw wiñay jakapkaniti." 
Isaiah17:12 ¡Ist'apxam, walja jaqinakan ch'axwatapax jach'a qutan qhuthutitapjamawa! Markanakax jach'at uxupxi jach'a jawiran qhuthutitapjama."

Isaiah60:21 “Markamankir taqi jaqinakasti aski jaqinakäniwa, wiñayatakiw uka markax jupanakankxani; kawkïr alirutix nayax ayruntkäyätxa ukat sartirïpxtawa, amparaxampi uskutäpxtawa, ukhamat nayan jach'a kankañax uñacht'ayañataki."

Jeremiah4:22 Tatitux siwa: “Markaxax q'ala luqhiratawa, janiw uñt'kxarakituti. Jan amuyt'asiri wawanakäpxiwa, janiw kun satas amuythapisipkiti. Ñanqhanak lurañatakisti, ch'amanakapax jilarkiriwa, ukampis janiw kunatix askïki uk lurañ yatipkiti.”" 
Jeremiah5:26 Markaxanxa ñanqha jaqinakaw utji, jupanakasti sipitanak uskuntapxi, ukax janiw jamach'inak katurañatakïkiti, jan ukasti, jaqinak katurañatakiwa." 
Jeremiah6:14 Markaxan chhuxrinakapsti patatak qullañ munapxi; taqi kunas walikïskiw sapxiwa, ukampis taqi kunas jan walipuniwa." 
Jeremiah6:18 Ukatpï jichhax Tatitux sixa: “Markanaka, ist'apxam, kunanakatix markaxampi luraskani ukanak yatipxarakim." 
Jeremiah6:26 ¡Markaxay, jichhax chhankha isinakampi isthapisim ukhamat t'aqhisitam uñacht'ayañataki; qhillar sunt'intam, llaki isinakampi isthapisim, ukatsti wal jacharakim, kunapachatix mä sapa yuqall wawax jiwki ukhama; jiwasar t'unjiristi jank'akiw jutantani!" 
Jeremiah8:11 Markaxan chhuxrinakapsti patatak qullxatt'apxi, taqi kunas jan walïki ukkhax, walikïskiwa sapxiwa." 
Jeremiah8:13 Tatitux siwa: “Markaxarux trigor uñtat yawinukü. Janiw uva yapun mä uvasa qhiparkaniti, janirakiw mä sapa higosa higo quqan qhiparkaniti. Pharsut laphinakakiw qhiparxani.”" 
Jeremiah8:14 Markasti sarakiniwa: “¿Kunatakis akar qhiparaskakiñäni? ¡Taqinis jach'a pirqan markanakar sarxañäni, ukan mäpita jiwarayistpan! Tatitu Diosasax jiwarayistaniwa; umt'añatakis jiwayir qullani uma churistu, jupa tuqi jucha luratas layku." 
Jeremiah8:19 Markaxan ayqutanakapasti taqi chiqan ist'asi: “¿Janit Tatitux Jerusalén markankxpacha? ¿Janit reyipas ukankxpacha?” sasa. Tatitusti sarakiwa: “¿Kunatsa nayarux ñanqha lurapxista, yaqha diosanakar yupaychasaxa?”" 
Jeremiah8:21 Markaxan t'aqhisitapampi chikaw t'aqhisirakta; llakisiñampi, axsarañampiw nayarux muyuntitu." 
Jeremiah9:6 janirakiw kun yatiqañsa munapkiti. Tatitusti siwa: “¡Nuwasiñat nuwasiñaru, k'arisiñat k'arisiñaru, ukakiw utjaski! Markaxax janiw uñt'añ munkituti." 
Jeremiah10:19 Jeremías profetasti sarakïnwa: ¡Ay, nayata, akataqi ust'ataw uñjasta! ¡T'aqhisiñaxas jan tukuskiriwa! Markaxan ñanqha luratapatxa, naya pachpaw janchixan t'aqhista." 
Jeremiah10:20 Markaxasti q'ala t'unjatawa, janiw wasitat sayt'ayirjamäkti. Janiw khiti nayar yanapt'iris utjkxiti; taqinis jiwaratkamakiwa. ¡Taqinin apanukutaw uñjasta!" 
Jeremiah12:7 “Markaxarux jaytanuktwa, nayankkäna uka markarux apanuktwa. Wali munat markaxarux, uñisirinakan amparaparuw katuyta." 
Jeremiah12:9 Markaxax mä suma phuyunakan jamach'jamawa, yaqha jach'a jamach'inakan katjañatak arknaqatawa. ¡Jichhax taqi ch'uminkir animalanak jutapxam; manq'antañatak tantacht'asipxam!" 
Jeremiah15:7 Markat anqaruw jaqtansma, wichhu t'unar uñtat willtansma; markaxarux jan wawanakan antutarakta, uka ñanqha jakañap jan apanukuñ munatapat t'unjarakta." 
Jeremiah17:19 Tatitux sarakituwa: “Saram, ukatsti Marka Mantañ punkur sayt'asim, kawki chiqtix Judá uraqin reyinakapax mantapki, mistupkaraki ukkharu, ukhamaraki Jerusalenan yaqha punkunakapar sayt'asir saram." 
Jeremiah29:32 Naya, Tatituw arsta, Semaiasarusa, wawanakaparus mutuyäwa. Markax taypinxa janiw saraqiripax utjkaniti, janirakiw kuna askinaktix markaxar apayankä ukanaksa katuqkaniti, parlatanakapampi jaqinakar nayatak sayt'asir tukuyatap layku. Naya, Tatituw uk arsta.”" 
Jeremiah30:8 Naya, taqi ch'aman Tatituw arsta: Markaxarux t'aqhisiñat qhispiyä, janiw mayampis yaqha markankir jaqinakax t'aqhisiykxapxaniti." 
Jeremiah30:19 Marka taypinsti, yuspagarañ q'uchunaka, kusisiñat arnaqasiñanakaw ist'asini. Jupanakax walja wawanakanïpxaniwa, walja jaqinakan markaw tukxani; mä askin uñjat markaw tukxarakini." 
Jeremiah31:10 “Markanaka, Tatitun arunakap ist'apxam, jach'a quta jaya thiyanakan yatiyapxam: ‘Tatitux Israel markarux ananukünwa, ukampis jichhax tantachthapxaniwa, ukatsti sumarak uñjani, awatirir uñtataw ovejanakap sum uñjasxani” sasa." 
Jeremiah31:18 Markaxan jachatap ist'twa, jupanakasti akham sasaw jachapxi: ‘Nayax mä uri vaca qallur uñtatäyätwa, ukampis jumax axa tukuyista; juman ukaruy kuttayanxita, jumätaw Tatitu Diosaxaxa." 
Jeremiah46:12 Markanakasti atipjatätam niyaw yatxapxi, ayquñat arnaqasitamax taqi chiqan ist'asi; nuwasirinakasti jupanakkamaw thuqthapipxi, ukatsti uraqirkamaw liwirtapxaraki.”" 
Jeremiah48:9 ¡Moab markatakix amay imañ chiqa wakichapxam, uka markasti q'ala tukjatäniwa! ¡Markanakapasti, jan mä jaqiniw uñjasini.”" 
Jeremiah48:41 Markanakapax katuntatäniwa, sayt'asiñ chiqanakapasa uñisiripan amparaparuw purini. Uka urusti Moab markan nuwasirinakapax wawachasir warmjamaw khathatipxani." 
Jeremiah50:6 “Markaxasti chhaqhat ovejanakar uñtatänwa, jan wali awatirinakan irpata, uka awatirinakapasti qullu tuqinakan ananukupxäna. Ukat mä qullut mä qulluru sarapxäna, pachpa uyunakapatsa armasxapxarakïnwa." 
Jeremiah51:7 Babilonia markasti nayan amparaxanxa quri tilinkir uñtatänwa, taqi aka uraqpacharuw umjayarakïna. Markanakasti vinopat umantasaxa, q'al machjasipxäna." 
Jeremiah51:9 Babiloniarux qullanakampi qullt'atäxiwa, ukampis janiw qullaskiti. ¡Pachpar apanukupxam! Markasarkam sapa mayni sarxarakiñäni, Babilonian jucha luratanakapasti alaxpachkamaw puri, qinayanakatsa juk'ampi alayaru." 
Jeremiah51:27 “¡Markansti nuwantañatak yatiyapxam! ¡Trompetanak phust'apxam, markanakarus wakicht'apxarakim, Babiloniar nuwantapxañapataki! ¡Ararat, Miní, Askenaz uka markanakax Babiloniar nuwantapxpan! ¡Nuwasïwi sarayiritakisti mä jilïri chhijllt'asipxam! ¡Caballeriarusti wali qhuru t'iju t'ijunakarjam nayraqatar ant'apxam!" 
Jeremiah51:28 Markanakarusti nuwantañapatak wakicht'apxam; Media uraqinkir reyinakarusa, marka apnaqirinakaparusa, jilïrinakaparusa, jupanakan apnaqat taqi uraqinakarus wakicht'apxarakim Babiloniar nuwantapxañapataki.”" 
Jeremiah51:30 Babilonia soldadonakasti nuwasiñ suyt'xapxiwa; pachpa pirqanakapanak sayarxapxi; ch'amanakapasti pist'atäxarakiwa, warmïkaspas ukhamakïxapxarakïnwa. Markanakapasti uñisirinakan phuqhantatawa, utanakapas ninampi nakhantayatarakiwa." 
Jeremiah51:43 Markanakapasti axsarkañ ch'usa wasarar tukuyatawa, waña, llakiskañ uraqir tukuyatawa, janiw ukan mä jaqis jakkiti, janiw khitis uka chiqa sarakipkarakiti." 
Jeremiah51:46 Markan ist'aski uka arunakatxa, jan mulljasipxamti, janirak axsarapxamsa. Sapa maraw ukham arunakax parlasini, nuwasiñ tuqit arunakaw ist'asini, markanak apnaqirinakas jupanakkamaw ch'axwapxani." 
Jeremiah52:25 Markankir jaqinakatsti, ejerciton jilïriparuw katuntäna, reyin paqallqu iwxt'irinakaparu, ukatsti kawkïr jilïr militaratix ejercitotak jaqinak katuqirïkän ukaru, ukhamaraki suxta tunka wali aytat jaqinakaru, khitinakatix uka markan qhiparapkatayna taqi ukanakaru." 
Lamentations1:1 ¡Walja jaqinakan markax kunja sapakis uñjasxi! ¡Markanakan jilïripa markax mä ijma warmir uñtatakïxiwa! ¡Uñtkañ suma markaxa ch'ama irnaqañanakamp t'aqhisiyataw uñjasxi! 
Lamentations1:4 ¡Jerusalén markan thakhinakapax llakiskayawa! ¡Janiw khitis phunchhäwinakar kusisir jutirix utjkxiti! Markan punkunakapasti ch'usa wasarar tukutawa; sacerdotenakax wal jachapxi, tawaqunakas wal llakisipxi, Jerusalén markax walpun t'aqhisi." 
Lamentations1:10 Uñisirinakaw Jerusalén markan suma yänakap katuntasxi. Markasti, Diosar jan uñt'ir jaqinakan Tatitun utapar ch'amampi mantir uñjaraki, ¡kawkïr jaqinakarutix jumax: “Janiw nayan utaxar mantapxätati” siskta ukanakaw mantapxi!" 
Lamentations1:18 Tatitux kunatix askïki uk luraski, nayan kamachi arunakapar jan yäqataxata. ¡Taqi markanaka, ist'apxita; t'aqhisitaxsa uñjapxarakim! ¡Markaxankir waynanakasa, tawaqunakasa, katuntat apataw uñjasipxi!" 
Lamentations1:19 Munirinakaxaruw yanap mayta, ukampis jupanakax nayarux sallqjapxituwa. Markaxankir sacerdotenakasa, jilïr jaqinakasa, pachpa markan jiwarapxi: ¡Manq'a thaqhasaw sarnaqapxäna manq'atjam jan jiwañataki!" 
Lamentations2:9 Markasti jan punkuni, jan jist'katañaniw uñjasi: ¡punkunakasti t'unjata, pampan liwirpayatawa! Reyipasa, jilïr apnaqirinakapas Tatitur jan uñt'irinakamp chikakïxiwa; Tatitun kamachinakapax janiw utjkxiti. ¡Janirakiw profetanakapas Tatitut kuna unañchäwinaksa katuqkxapxiti!" 
Lamentations2:12 Wawanakasti taykanakaparux sapxänwa: “¡Janiw t'ant'asa, vinosa utjkxistuti!” sasa. Markan thakhinakapansti wawanakax jiwaratjamaw liwirtapxäna, taykanakapan amparanakapan samaqkäwiw amukt'awayxapxäna." 
Lamentations3:34 Markankir katuntatanakar jan khuyapt'ayasis t'aqhisiyañasa; 
Lamentations3:51 Markaxankir warminakan t'aqhisitap uñjasaxa, chuymaxax sintipuniw usurakitu." 
Lamentations5:14 Marka punkunakansti waynanakan jayllitapax janiw ist'askxiti, janirakiw chuyman jaqinakas tantachaskxapxiti." 
Ezekiel7:15 Marka anqäxan qhiparirinakasti, nuwasïwin jiwarapxani, marka manqhan qhiparirinakasti manq'atjama, kunayman usunakampiw jiwarapxarakini." 
Ezekiel11:7 Ukatpï naya, Tatitux sapxsmaxa: Jerusalén markat jaqunukupxämawa, inamayaw aka markan qhispitäñäniw sasipkäta. Marka manqhansti, jumanakan jiwarayata jaqinakan amayanakapakiw qhiparxani." 
Ezekiel16:40 Markankir jaqinakarusti jumar jan walt'ayañatakiw amtayapxani, jumarusti qalampi k'upjasa, espadanakapampi chhuqhuntasaw jiwayapxätam." 
Ezekiel19:4 Markanakasti jupxat parlir ist'apxäna; juparusti sipitampiw katuntapxäna, chinuntasin qatatipxäna, Egipto markar puriyañkama." 
Ezekiel24:7 Markasti wila wartatampi phuqhantatawa; jaqinakarux qarqanakar jisktasaw jiwaraytaxa; wilapsa janirakiw uraqirux puriyktati, ukhamat laq'an jan imxatañapataki." 
Ezekiel26:2 “Tiro markax Jerusalén markat amtañampiw arsu: “ ‘¡Markanakan alakipa lurañ markax q'ala tukjatawa! ¡Jichhasti nayaruw wakt'itu! Qamir yänakampiw phuqhantasï, jupasti ukchañkamax tukusiniwa.’" 
Ezekiel26:8 Markanakaman jakirinakarusti espadampkamaw jiwarayani; jumar katuntañatakix mä pirqa sayt'ayani, jumar nuwantañatakisti makhatañanak sayt'ayani, jark'aqasiñanakampi wakicht'at soldadonak jumarux ant'anirakini." 
Ezekiel31:6 Markanakasti jumat yanap mayiriw jutapxäna; jamach'inakar uñtataw layminakamarux tapanakap tapachasipxäna, ch'uminkir animalanakjamaw quqa kayunakam ch'iwipar jutapxäna." 
Ezekiel32:2 “Egipto markankir faraón reyitak aka amay imäwi q'uchu q'uchurapim: “ ‘Markanakan leonapjamätawa; qutankir jach'a katarir uñtatätawa, jawiraman umapan sunt'isiraktaxa, kayunakamampiw uka um qunchuptaytaxa, jalir umsti tirktayaraktawa." 
Ezekiel33:17 Marka masinakamax sapxaniwa, nayan jan chiqapar uñjataxa, ukampis jupanakaw jan chiqapar uñjapkiti." 
Ezekiel35:4 Markanakamasti q'ala apanukutaw uñjasini, q'ala tukjataw uñjasirakini. Ukapachaw yatipxäta, nayan Tatitu Diosätaxa." 
Ezekiel36:10 Ukan jakir israelitanakarusti waljanirupuniw tukuyarakï. Markanakasti jaqinakampi phuqhantatäniwa, t'unjatäkän uka markanakasti wasitat sayt'ayatäxaniwa." 
Ezekiel42:14 Sacerdotenakax Tatitun utapar mantapkani ukkhasti, janiw uta anqäxarux mistunipxañapäkiti, janïr uka utaru kuna isinakampitix Tatitur luqtapkän uka isinak isirasisaxa, uka isinakan qullanätap layku. Markachir jaqinak nayraqatar mistuniñatakisti, yaqha isimpiw isthapisinipxañapa” sasa." 
Ezekiel44:3 Marka apnaqir jilïrikiw uka chiqa mantani, Tatitun nayraqatapan qullan manq'a manq'añataki. Jupax mantañawja punku chiqaw mantani, uka chiqaraki mistunxani” sasa." 
Ezekiel45:6 Marka lurañatakisti yaqha uraqiw yaqhachasini, ukasti sayt'urux pä tupu chikanïniwa, iramarusti chika tupurakïniwa, uka uraqisti qullan uraqi jak'ankaniwa, taqpach Israel markan uraqiparakïniwa." 
Ezekiel45:7 “Marka apnaqiritakisti uraqix yaqhachatarakïniwa. Mayax inti jalsu tuqinkaniwa, mayasti inti jalanta tuqinkarakiniwa, qullan uraqit purapäxana, marka lurañatak yaqhachata uraqi jak'ana. Inti jalsu tuqita inti jalanta tuqikamasti, qawqch'äkitix ayllunakar churata uraqix ukch'arakïniwa." 
Ezekiel46:2 Marka apnaqiristi ukankir utarux uta anqäxankir tuqit mantanini, ukatsti punku mantañawjaruw sayt'asini. Ukchañkamasti, sacerdotenakax marka apnaqirin churata uywanak nakt'ayapxani, sumankthapiñataki wilañcha luqtapxarakini, marka apnaqiristi punku jak'aruw alt'asini, parapampi uraqir puriñkama Tatitur yupaychasa, ukat mistuwayxarakini. Uka punkusti jayp'thapiñkamax janiw jist'antaskaniti." 
Ezekiel46:8 “Marka apnaqirix mantkani ukapachasti, mantañawjan utjir uta punku chiqaw mantani, uka punku chiqarakiw mistuwayxani." 
Ezekiel46:10 Marka apnaqiristi markampi chikaw mantani, uka chikarakiw mistuwayxani." 
Ezekiel46:16 Tatitusti akham siwa: “Marka apnaqiritix uraqipata mayni wawapar mä t'aqa uraqi churani ukaxa, wawapankapuniniwa." 
Ezekiel46:18 Marka apnaqiristi janiw khititsa uraqip aparkaspati. Kuntix wawanakapar tuti waxt'askani uksti pachpa uraqipat churasiskani; ukhamat janiw khitis jan uraqinix uñjaskaniti, janirakiw markaxas yaqha tuqinakar saratatkaniti” sasa." 
Ezekiel48:9 “Ukat jilt'ki ukasti kunatix sayt'urux pä tupu chikatanïki, iramarusti chikat tupükaraki uka uraqix janiw maya uraqjam qullanäkaniti. Ukan jaqinakax jakasipkaspawa, uywa awatisiñ chiqanakas ukankarakiniwa. Markasti uka uraqi taypinkarakiniwa," 
Ezekiel48:13 Markan irnaqirinakasti, israelitanakat kawkïr ayllunkirïpasaya, uka uraqxa yapuchasipxarakiniwa." 
Ezekiel48:15 “Marka apnaqirirusti, Judá, Benjamín ayllunakan uraqip taypinkki uka uraqinakat wakt'ani; kawkïr uraqitix Tatitur katuyat uraqi jak'ankki, markan uraqip jak'ankki uka uraqinaka. Iramarusti uka uraqix pä tupu chikatanïniwa, ukasti inti jalsu tuqinkkis uka qurpakamaw purini, inti jalanta tuqirusti jach'a qutakamaw purirakini. Tatitutak satäki uka uraqix taypiruw qhiparani, Tatitun utapamp chika, levitanakar churatäki uka uraqimpi, markan uraqinakapampi." 
Ezekiel48:20 Marka muyta pirqasti taqpachax sayt'urux llätunka waranqa metronïniwa, akat uksarusti uka markan sutipax: ‘Tatitun Utapa’ satäniwa.”" 
Daniel2:41 “Juma reyisti uñjaraktawa, uka jach'a jaqin kayunakapax hierrompita, ñiq'impitänwa; ukasti qhip qhipa apnaqäwix payar t'aqxtatäniwa sañ muni. Marka apnaqäwix hierror uñtat ch'ullqhïniwa, ukampis ñiq'ir uñtat jan ch'amanirakïniwa." 
Daniel4:31 Reyix janïraw parlañsa tukuykänti ukapachaw akatjamat mä arux alaxpachat ist'asïna: “Nabucodonosor rey, aka arunak ist'am: Marka apnaqäwimax janiw jumankxiti;" 
Daniel5:9 Ukhamasti Belsasar reyix juk'ampiw axsarayasxäna, ajanupasti q'illupuniw tuküna. Marka apnaqir jach'a jilïr jaqinakapasti janiw kuns kamacht'irjamäpkänti." 
Daniel7:27 Ukatsti marka apnaqäwisa, munañan kankañasa, qhapaq kankañasa, taqi akapachankir apnaqäwinakasa, alaxpachankir Tatitun markapar katuyatäxaniwa. Marka apnaqäwipasti wiñayatakipunïniwa, juparuw taqi akapachankir markanakax luqtapxani, jaysapxarakini.’" 
Daniel11:33 Markankir jach'a yatiñan jaqinakasti walja jaqinakaruw yatichapxani, ukampis jank'akiw jupanakarux jiwarayapxani, ninaruw nakhantayapxani, utjir yänakapsa lunthatjapxarakiniwa, jupanakat waljaniruw jaya markanakar uywat jaqir tukuyañatak apapxani. Ukasti mä qawqha urunakakïniwa." 
Hosea2:23 Markaxarusti nayatakikipuniw uraqir uskusï, Lo-ruhamatsti khuyapt'ayasïwa, Lo-amirusti ‘Markaxätawa’ sarakïwa, jupasti: ‘¡Diosaxätawa!’ sarakitaniwa.”" 
Hosea4:6 Markaxasti janiw amuyunïkxiti, ukat t'unjat uñjasi. Jumasti, sacerdote, yatiñsa apanuktawa, ukat jichhax nayax jumar apanukuraksma. Niyakixay jumax Tatitun yatichäwinakapsa armanukstaxa, nayax wawanakamat armasirakïwa." 
Hosea4:8 Markaxax jucha luratanakapat luqtañatak apanipki ukanak manq'apxi; ukat jupanakax jaqinakaxan jucha lurapxañap juk'ampi munapxi. 
Hosea4:12 Markaxax k'ullut khitsut diosanakaparuw jiskt'asi, thujrunak tuqirakiw yatiñanaksa thaqhi. Wachuqa juchampi apnaqataxa, markaxax pantjat thakhinakan sarnaqaski; Diosap apanukusaw yaqhanakampi juchanakan sarnaqi." 
Hosea7:3 “Markaxax ñanqha luräwinakapampi, k'arisiñanakapampix, reyirus, jilïrinakaparus wal kusisiyi." 
Hosea8:1 “¡Uñch'ukiri, Tatitun markapxarux trompetam phust'am! Markaxar t'unjirix mä pakar uñtataw jutaski. Markaxax jan ist'asiriwa; janiw arust'äwixarus phuqhkiti, janirakiw kamachinakaxarjamas arkkituti." 
Hosea11:2 Kunapachatix nayax juk'ampi jupar jawskäyät ukkhaxa, juk'ampikiw jupax nayat jayarst'awayi. Markaxasti k'ari diosanakaruw wilañchanak luqtasïna, yaqha diosanakarukiw incienso q'aphichäna." 
Hosea11:6 Markanakapasti espadan tukjatäniwa, jupanakan pachpa amtatanakapatxa, sayt'asiñ pirqanakapas tukjatarakïniwa." 
Joel1:14 Markarusti tantacht'apxam, ayuno lurapxam; jilïr jaqinakaru, aka markan jakir taqi jaqinakarusa, Tatit Diosapan utapar tantachapxam, Tatitut mayisipxarakim." 
Joel2:9 Markarus nuwantañatakjamaw muyuntapxi, pirqa patanak jalanaqapxi, uta patanakaruw mistupxi, lunthatanakjamaw ventananakat mantaranttapxi." 
Joel2:26 Jumanakasti sist'asiñkamaw manq'apxäta, Tatitu Diosamarurakiw yupaychapxäta, nayasti jumanakatakix jach'a muspharkañanak lurta. Markaxasti janipuniw mayampis p'inqachatäkxaniti," 
Joel2:27 Israelita jaqinaka, ukkhaw jumanakax naya Tatitun jumanakampïskatax yatipxäta, nayätwa Diosamaxa, janirakiw yaqhax utjkiti. ¡Markaxasti janipuniw mayampis p'inqachatäkxaniti!”" 
Joel3:2 Markanakaxar katuntir markanakaruw tantacht'ä, Josafat qhirwa aynacharuw irpä, ukan jupanakarux uñt'asiyä kuntix Israel markaxampix lurapki ukanaka. Jupanakaw israelitanakarux taqi tuqir ananukupxäna, markaxan uraqipsti jalanuqasipxänwa.”" 
Joel3:9 Markanakarusti akanak yatiyapxam: ¡Ch'axwañatak wakicht'asipxam! ¡Wali ch'aman jaqinakar jawsapxam! ¡Ch'axwanakan nuwasir jaqinakasti jutapxpan, jupanakaw nuwasir sarapxani!" 
Amos7:10 Betel markan Amasías sacerdotepaxa, Israel markan Jeroboam reyipar yatiyiriw khiti: “Amós chachax israelita jaqinakaruw jumar ñanqhachañatak amtayaski. Markasti janiw juk'ampi ukham parlaykaspati." 
Amos9:10 Markaxan taqi jucharar jaqinakax espadampi jiwarayatäpxaniwa; khitinakatix sapki: ‘Janiw ukanakax ukham luraskaniti, janirakiw kuna jan walis katjkistaniti’ sasa." 
Micah1:6 Ukat Tatitux saraki: “Samaria markxa mayxaruw t'unthapï, uva yapuchañ yapu tukuyä. Markan qalanakapsa qhirwa aynacharkamaw willintarakï, Ukhamat uta qalltanakapas qhanar uñstañapataki." 
Micah3:3 Markaxarux jakkirpach manq'antapxtaxa; janchipsa q'al lluch'supxtaxa, ch'akhanakapsa p'akirapxtawa; phayasiñ aychäkaspas ukham lurapxtaxa." 
Micah5:11 Markanakamsti q'al tukjarakï, sayt'asiñanakamsti liwisiyarakïwa;" 
Micah6:3 Tatitux sarakiwa: “Markaxay, jichhax sita, ¿kuna jan walsa jumarux lursma, jan ukax kuncha sisma?" 
Micah6:5 Markaxay, jichhax amtasimaya Moab uraqinkir Balac reyipan amtatanakapxa, ukhamarak kuntix Beor sat Balaam yuqapax siskäna ukanakata. Kunapachatix Sitim chiqat Guilgal chiqar sarkäyätas uk amtasirakimaya, Pachpa Tatituw atipjäwinakapsa jumarux churaraktam.”" 
Micah6:9 Tatitux markpacharuw jawsaski, alt'at chuymampi jaysañasti amuyt'asirïñawa: “Markachirinaka, markar amuyt'ayirinaka, ist'apxam." 
Nahum2:6 ¡Asiria marka, uñisirinakamaw markaman punkunakap t'unantanipxi! Markax soldadonakan phuqhantatawa, reyin utapansa taqiniw axsarañat khathatipxi." 
Nahum3:12 Markaman pirqanakapasti; kunjämatix puqt'at higo achux, khitin unxtayatas uraqirkam willirtixa, ukatsti jaqiw manq'antaraki, ukhamaw uka pirqanakax liwirtani." 
Nahum3:17 Marka apnaqirinakamax, t'iju t'ijunakar uñtatäpxiwa; soldadonak apnaqirinakax laq'u tamanakar uñtatawa: thayäki ukkhax pirqa patanakaruw junt'urt'asiñatak puripxi, inti lupt'anipansti sarawayxapxiwa, janiw kawkir saratapas yatiskiti." 
Habakkuk2:8 Markanakax jumar saykatañatakiw mayacht'asipxani, kunjämtix jupanakat aparkta ukhamarak aparapxätam. Jaqinakapar jiwarayatamata, uka markanakan jakirinakar jan walinak luras t'aqhisiyatamatsa phuqhayasipxarakïtamwa." 
Habakkuk3:13 Markamar yanapt'iriw jumax mistunta, juma kipka ajllisktasa uka reyimpiru. Jan wali amtañani jaqinakan jilïripsa t'unjtawa, taqpachaniruw q'alala jan kunani tukjaraktaxa." 
Zephaniah1:7 ¡Tatit nayraqatan amukt'apxam, Tatitun mutuyañ urupaw jak'achasini! ¡Taqi kunas wakicht'atawa! ¡Jawsatanakax akankxapxiwa, ¡Markaxarux q'al jiwarayä!" 
Zephaniah2:8 Israel markan jach'a ch'aman Tatitu Diosapax akham siwa: “Nayax Moab markan jan wali parlatanakap ist'twa, Amón markan ñanqha arunakapsa ist'araktwa. Jupanakax markaxaruw jisk'achapxi, markaxan uraqinakap katuntasisax uraqinakapsa jach'aptayasipxarakiwa. Ukat naya jakkiri Tatitux arsta: Moab markasti Sodoma markjamaw tukuni, Amón markasti Gomorra markjamarakiw tukuni, uraqinakapansa ch'aphinakakiw jilxani, jayu uraqiruw tukuni, wiñayatakiw ch'usa wasar uraqir tukuni. Markaxat jilt'ir jaqinakaw uraqinakap aparasin katuntasipxarakini” sasa." 
Zephaniah2:11 Tatitusti jupanakampix wali axsarkañanak lurani. Markanakan diosanakapsa q'al t'unjani, taqi chiqan jakir jaqinakasa, quta wat'anakan jakir jaqinakas juparukiw yupaychapxarakini." 
Zephaniah3:8 Jichhaxa, ukham lurapxatanakamatxa, jumanakar mutuyañ urux jak'ankiwa. Naya, Tatituw Israel markan Diosapätxa, arsutaxarux phuqhapuniwa. Markanakar mayar tantachthapiñatakiw amtta, jach'a q'apisiñaxampiw uka markanakar mutuyä. Q'apisitäkta ukkhaxa, mä ninjamätwa; ¡aka uraqpach nakhantayarakïxa!" 
Zechariah1:17 Angelax ukxarux saskakituwa: “Aka arunak yatiyarakim: ‘Taqi ch'aman Tatitux siwa: Markanakaxan wasitat nayraqatar sartañap munta; ukatsti machaqat Sión qullurux ch'am churä, machaqatarak qhanañchä Jerusalén markax nayan ajllit markaxätapa’ ” sasa." 
Zechariah5:6 Nayasti jiskt'araktwa: “¿Kunarakisti?” sasa. Jupasti sarakituwa: “Ukax mä tupuñawa. Markan jakapki uka jaqinakan juchap tupuñatakiwa” sasa. 
Zechariah8:3 Jerusalén markar jakiriw kutt'anï. Ukapachasti Jerusalenax Chiqa Marka satäniwa; taqi ch'amani Tatitun qullupasa Qullan Qullu satarakïniwa. 
Zechariah9:10 Jupaw Israelan nuwasiñ carronakap t'unjani, Jerusalenan caballonakapsa tukjani, nuwasïwin mich'inak antutt'añanaksa p'akirani. Markanak taypin sumañkañ yatiyani, maysa qutata, maysa qutakamaw apnaqani, Éufrates jawirat qalltasina uraq tukuykamaw marka sarayani." 
Zechariah11:6 Nayax ukhamarak lurä: ¡Aka markankir jaqinakat janiw khuyapayaskäti! Jan ukasti, aka jak'an utjir markanakan amparaparuw katxaruyä, reyipan apnaqatarakïniwa. Markapas q'ala tukjatäskani ukkhasa, janiw jupanakar yanapt'ir sarkäti. Naya, taqi ch'aman Tatituw uk arsta.”" 
Zechariah14:2 Uka uruw Tatitux taqi markanakar tantachthapini, Jerusalenampi nuwasipxañapataki. Markaru katuntasasti, utanakapat yänakap lunthatsupxani, warminakaparus warmisipxaniwa, chikatpach jaqinakaparux katuntat apapxarakini. Jilt'irinakakiw ukan qhiparani." 
Malachi1:4 Esaú chachan saraqirinakapäki uka Edomitanakatix sapxaspa: “Markasax t'unjatawa, ukampis wasitat sayt'ayañäni” sasaxa, taqi ch'aman Tatitux akham sarakispawa: “Jupanakax markanakap wasitat sayt'ayasipkan ukasa, nayax wasitat t'unjarakï. Markapax ‘Juchan phuqt'at marka’ satäniwa; uraqinakapasti ‘Tatitun wiñay q'apisiñ uraqi’ sasa sutichatarakïniwa.”" 
Matthew1:1 Akax, Jesusan nayra awkinakapan sutipatkam aytatawa, jupax Davidampita, Abrahamampit saraqirïnwa." 
Matthew1:2 Abrahamax Isaacan awkipänwa, Isaacasti Jacobun awkipänwa, Jacobux Judá chachampina, jilanakapampin awkipänwa." 
Matthew1:3 Judá chachax Fares, Zérah chachanakan awkipänwa, taykapasti Tamar satänwa. Faresax Hesronan awkipänwa, Hesronasti Araman awkipänwa." 
Matthew1:4 Aramax Aminadaban awkipänwa, Aminadabasti Naasonan awkipänwa, Naasonasti Salmonan awkipänwa." 
Matthew1:5 Salmonax Boozan awkipänwa, taykapax Rahab satänwa. Boozasti Obedan awkipänwa, taykapax Rut satänwa; Obedax Jesen awkipänwa." 
Matthew1:6 Jesé chachasti David reyin awkipänwa. David reyix Salomonan awkipänwa, Salomonan taykapasti Urías chachan warmipänwa." 
Matthew1:7 Salomonax Roboaman awkipänwa, Roboamasti Abiasan awkipänwa, Abiasasti Asan awkipänwa." 
Matthew1:8 Asá chachax Josafatan awkipänwa, Josafatasti Joraman awkipänwa, Joramasti Oziasan awkipänwa." 
Matthew1:9 Oziasax Jotaman awkipänwa, Jotamasti Acazan awkipänwa, Acazasti Ezequiasan awkipänwa." 
Matthew1:10 Ezequiasax Manasesan awkipänwa, Manasesasti Amonan awkipänwa, Amonasti Josiasan awkipänwa." 
Matthew1:11 Josiasax Joaquinampina, jilanakapampin awkipänwa, uka urunakan israelitanakax Babilonia markar katuntat apatäpxäna." 
Matthew1:12 Uka qhipatsti, Joaquinax Salatielan awkipänwa, Salatielasti Zorobabelan awkipänwa." 
Matthew1:13 Zorobabelax Abihudan awkipänwa, Abihudasti Eliaquiman awkipänwa, Eliaquimasti Azoran awkipänwa." 
Matthew1:14 Azorax Sadocun awkipänwa, Sadocusti Aquiman awkipänwa, Aquimasti Eliudun awkipänwa." 
Matthew1:15 Eliudux Eleazaran awkipänwa, Eleazarasti Matanan awkipänwa, Matanasti Jacobun awkipänwa." 
Matthew1:16 Jacobux Josean awkipänwa, Joseasti Marian chachapänwa, uka Mariaw Jesusan taykapaxa, Cristo sapktan ukana." 
Matthew1:17 Ukhamasti Abrahamat Davidkamax tunka pusin mita jaqinakaw utjäna. Davidat qalltasina, israelitanakax Babiloniar katuntat apatäpkän ukürkamax, tunka pusin mita jaqinakaw utjäna, ukatsti katuntat apatäpkän ukürut Criston yurïwipkamax tunka pusin mita jaqinakaw utjarakïna." 
Matthew1:18 Jesusan yurïwipax akhamänwa: María taykapax Joseampi jaqichasiñatak parlatänwa; ukampis janïr chikthapkasin Qullan Ajay tuqi usur jaqiptäna. 
Matthew1:19 José chachapax aski jaqïnwa, jupasti Mariarux janiw p'inqachayañ munkänti, ukat jamasat jaytanukxañ munäna." 
Matthew1:20 Ukham lup'iskiriruw, Tatitun angelapax samkan uñstäna, ukat sarakïna: “José, Davidan yuqapa, Mariar warmimat katuqañ jan axsaramti, yurkani uka wawax Qullan Ajay tuqiw utji." 
Matthew1:21 Mariax mä yuqall wawa wawachasini, juparusti JESÚS sasaw sutichäta, juparakiw markaparux juchapat qhispiyani” sasa." 
Matthew1:22 Taqi ukanakasti kuntix Diosax profetap tuqi arskatayna ukarjamaw phuqhasiskäna. 
Matthew1:23 “Chacha jan uñt'ir mä tawaquw usur jaqiptani, jupasti mä yuqall wawa wawachasini, juparusti Emanuel sutimpiw sutichani.” (ukasti: “Diosax jiwasampiwa” sañ muni)." 
Matthew1:24 Joseasti ikit sartasinxa, kunjämtix Tatitun angelapax jupar sawaykatayna ukham luräna, Mariarusti warmipat katuqxäna." 
Matthew1:25 Ukampis wawanïñapkamax janiw chacha warmjam mayachasipkänti. Wawarusti JESÚS sasaw sutichäna. 
Matthew2:1 Kunapachatix Herodesax uka markan reyïkän ukapachaw Jesusax Judea uraqina, Belén markan yurïna. Jerusalén markarusti amawt'a jaqinakaw inti jalsu tuqit purinipxäna," 
Matthew2:1 Kunapachatix Herodesax uka markan reyïkän ukapachaw Jesusax Judea uraqina, Belén markan yurïna. Jerusalén markarusti amawt'a jaqinakaw inti jalsu tuqit purinipxäna," 
Matthew2:2 ukat jiskt'apxäna: —¿Kawkinkis jichha yurki uka judionakan reyipaxa? Inti jalsu tuqin warawarap uñjapxta, ukat jupar yupaychir jutapxta —sasa." 
Matthew2:3 Herodes reyisti uk yatisin wal mayjt'asïna, Jerusalenan jakir taqi jaqinakas mayjt'asirakïnwa." 
Matthew2:4 Ukat jupax jilïr sacerdotenakampiru, kamachi yatichirinakampir jawsthapiyäna, ukatsti kawkhantix Cristox yuriñapäkän uka tuqit jiskt'äna." 
Matthew2:5 Jupanakasti sapxänwa: —Judeankir Belén markan yuriñapawa, profetax akham qillqawayi:" 
Matthew2:5 Jupanakasti sapxänwa: —Judeankir Belén markan yuriñapawa, profetax akham qillqawayi:" 
Matthew2:6 ‘Judea uraqinkir Belén marka, wali aytat markanak taypinxa, janiw sinti jisk'äktati; jumat mä jilïrix mistuni, jupaw Israel markaxarux irpani’ sasa." 
Matthew2:6 ‘Judea uraqinkir Belén marka, wali aytat markanak taypinxa, janiw sinti jisk'äktati; jumat mä jilïrix mistuni, jupaw Israel markaxarux irpani’ sasa." 
Matthew2:7 Ukat Herodes reyix amawt'anakar jamasat jawsäna, ukatsti jupanakaruw jiskt'äna kunapachapunisa uka warawarax uñstkatayna uka." 
Matthew2:8 Jupanakarusti Belén markaruw khithäna, akham sasa: —Sarapxam, uka wawat sum yatxatanipxam; jikxatasinsti nayar yatiyapxita, ukat nayan yupaychir sarañaxatakiraki —sasa." 
Matthew2:9 Reyin iwxanakap ist'asinsti, amawt'anakax sarawayxapxänwa. Kawkïr warawartix uñjapkän ukax, jupanakan nayraqatap saräna, ukatsti kawkhantix wawax jikxataskäna ukkharuw sayt'äna." 
Matthew2:10 Amawt'anakasti warawarar uñjasin wal kusisipxäna. 
Matthew2:11 Utar mantasinsti wawarux, María taykapampïskir jikxatapxäna; ukatsti killt'asisin wawarux yupaychapxäna. Imasiñanakap jist'arasinsti, quri, incienso, mirra uka churäwinak juparux katuyapxäna." 
Matthew2:12 Amawt'anakasti mä samka tuqiw Herodesan ukar jan kutt'añapatak yatiyatäpxäna, ukat yaqha thakhinjam markapar kutt'awayxapxäna." 
Matthew2:13 Amawt'anakan sarxatapatsti, Tatitun angelapaw Josearux samkan uñstäna, juparusti sänwa: “Sartasim, ukatsti wawampiru María taykapampir irpxarusin Egipto markar jaltxam. Kunapachkamatix nayax siskäma ukürkamaw ukankäta, Herodesaw wawar jiwayañatak thaqhani” sasa." 
Matthew2:14 Uka arumpachaw Joseax wawampiru taykapampir irpxaruwayasin Egipto markar sarxäna," 
Matthew2:15 uka markansti Herodesan jiwañapkamaw ukankapxäna. Taqi akanakasti kuntix Tatitux profetap tuqi arskatayna ukarjamaw phuqhasiskäna: “Egiptot wawaxar jawsta” sasa. 
Matthew2:16 Herodesasti amawt'anakan jupar sallqjatap amuyasisinxa, walpun phiñasïna, ukat Belén markana, uka thiyanakan jakir wawanakar pä maranit aynachar taqpachanir jiwarayiriw khithäna; amawt'anakax sapkatayna uka urunakarjam amuyt'asa." 
Matthew2:17 Ukhamat Jeremías profetan qillqatapax phuqhasïna: 
Matthew2:18 “Arnaqasitanakaw Ramá sat markan ist'asi, jachañampi, wali ayquñampi. Raquelaw wawanakapat jachaskäna, jupasti janiw chuymachatäñ munkänti, wawanakapan jiwaratäxatap layku” sasa." 
Matthew2:19 Herodesan jiwatap qhipatsti, Tatitun angelapaw Egipto markan Josearux samkan uñstäna, ukatsti juparux sarakïnwa:" 
Matthew2:20 “Sartasim, ukatsti wawampiru taykapampir irpxarusin Israel markar kutt'xam, wawar jiwayañ munirinakax jiwxapxiwa” sasa." 
Matthew2:21 Ukapachaw Joseax, wawampiru taykapampir irpxarusin Israel markapar kuttxäna." 
Matthew2:22 Joseasti Arquelao sat chachan Herodes awkip lanti Judea markar apnaqaskatap yatïna, ukat jupax ukar sarañ axsaräna, ukampis jupax mä samka tuqi Tatitun yatiyataw Galilear sarxäna." 
Matthew2:22 Joseasti Arquelao sat chachan Herodes awkip lanti Judea markar apnaqaskatap yatïna, ukat jupax ukar sarañ axsaräna, ukampis jupax mä samka tuqi Tatitun yatiyataw Galilear sarxäna." 
Matthew2:23 Galilea markar purisinsti, Nazaret markar jakiriw sarxäna. Ukasti kuntix Diosax profetanak tuqi arskäna ukarjamaw phuqhasiskäna: “Nazaretankir Jesús satäñapataki”." 
Matthew3:1 Mä qawqha maranakatsti, Bautisir Juanax Judea wasararuw Diosan arunakap parlir misttanïna." 
Matthew3:1 Mä qawqha maranakatsti, Bautisir Juanax Judea wasararuw Diosan arunakap parlir misttanïna." 
Matthew3:2 Sarakïnwa: “¡Taqi jan wali luratanakamat kutikipstapxam, Diosan qhapaq markapaw jak'ankxi!” sasa." 
Matthew3:3 Isaías profetasti Bautisir Juanat akham qhanañchäna: “Wasaran mä jaqin jach'at art'asitapaw ist'asi: ‘Tatitun thakhip wakichapxam; chiqa thakhi jist'arapxam’ ” sasa. 
Matthew3:4 Juanan isipasti camello t'awrat luratänwa, lip'ichit lurat wak'ampiw wak'asirïna; jupax t'iju t'ijunakampi, wasaran utjir misk'impi manq'irïna." 
Matthew3:5 Jupan ukarusti, Jerusalenata, taqi Judea tuqinakatpacha, Jordán jawir jak'anakata arunakap ist'ir misttanipxäna." 
Matthew3:5 Jupan ukarusti, Jerusalenata, taqi Judea tuqinakatpacha, Jordán jawir jak'anakata arunakap ist'ir misttanipxäna." 
Matthew3:6 Jupanakasti juchanakap arsusipxäna, ukat Juanax Jordán jawiran jupanakar bautisäna." 
Matthew3:7 Kunapachatix Bautisiri Juanax fariseonakaru, saduceonakaru, bautisayasir jutapxatap uñjäna ukkhasti, jupax sänwa: “¡Katari jaqinaka! ¿Khitirak jumanakarusti Diosan jach'a mutuyäwipat jaltañ yatiyapxtamsti?" 
Matthew3:8 Jichhasti jumanakax sumay sarnaqapxam, Tatitur kutikipstapxatamatsti aski luräwinak uñacht'ayapxam," 
Matthew3:9 janirak jumanakax ‘Abrahaman wawanakapäpxtwa’ sapxamti; nayasti sapxsmawa, Diosax aka qalanakatsa Abrahaman wawanakap sartayarakispawa." 
Matthew3:10 Ukampis hachax quqanak saphitpach tinksuyañatak niy wakicht'atäxiwa. Jan kuna achu churir quqasti phat'anukutawa, ukatsti ninar phichhantatarakiwa." 
Matthew3:11 Nayasti, chiqpachansa umampiw bautisapxsma, ukhamat jumanakax Tatitur kutikipstapxatam uñacht'ayañataki; ukampis khititix nayat qhipa jutki ukax Qullan Ajayumpi, ninampiw bautisapxätam. Jupasti nayat sipan juk'amp ch'amaniwa, nayasti janirakiw jupan wiskhup apañatakis askïkti." 
Matthew3:12 Jupasti aski jaqinakarux ñanqha jaqinak taypit irpsunini. Aski jaqinakarusti qhispiyaniwa, ukampis ñanqha lurir jaqinakarux jan jiwt'ir ninaruw jaquntani” sasa." 
Matthew3:13 Jesusasti Galilea uraqit Jordán jawiraruw jutäna, kawkhankkäntix Bautisir Juanax ukkharu, ukat jupamp bautisayasiñataki." 
Matthew3:14 Bautisiri Juanasti janiw Jesusar bautisañ munkänti, ukat säna: —Nayaw jumamp bautisayasiñaxaxa, ¿kamisarak jumasti nayampi bautisayasir juttasti? —sasa." 
Matthew3:15 Jesusasti ukxarux sarakïnwa: —Jichhax ukhamäpan sama, wakisiw Diosan munañap phuqhañasaxa —sasa. Ukat Juanax Jesusar bautisäna." 
Matthew3:16 Kunapachatix Jesusax bautisatäxasin umat mistunxän ukkhasti, alaxpachaw jist'artäna, ukatsti Qullan Ajayurux palomar uñtat jupxar saraqasinkir uñjäna." 
Matthew3:17 Alaxpachatsti mä aruw ist'asïna akham siri: “Akapï munat Wawaxaxa, khitirutix nayax ajlliskta ukaxa” sasa." 
Matthew4:1 Ukatsti Jesusax Ajayumpi wasarar irpataw uñjasïna, ukan supayan yant'atäñapataki." 
Matthew4:2 Jesusasti pusi tunka urumpi, pusi tunka arumampiw jan manq'at sarnaqäna, ukatsti manq'at awtjayasïna." 
Matthew4:3 Supayasti Jesusar yant'añatakiw jak'achasïna, akham sasa: —Jumatix Diosan Yuqapästa ukaxa, aka qalanakar t'ant'ar tukuyam —sasa." 
Matthew4:4 Jesusasti juparux sänwa: —Diosan qillqatapax siwa: ‘Janiw jaqix t'ant'a sapampikit jakkani, jan ukasti taqi kuntix Diosax siski uka arunakampiw jakarakini’ —sasa." 
Matthew4:5 Ukatsti supayax Jerusalén qullan markaruw irpäna, Tatitun utap patar irpsusinsti," 
Matthew4:6 sarakïnwa: —Jumatix Diosan yuqapästaxa, aka patat jaquqtam; Qillqatax siwa: ‘Diosasti angelanakaparuw jumar uñjir khithanini. Jupanakaw amparapar katuqapxätam, kayunakam qalanakar jan usuchjasiñamataki’ sasa." 
Matthew4:7 Jesusasti ukxarux sänwa: —Diosan arupan qillqatarakiwa: ‘Janiw Tatitu Diosamarux yant'ätati’ —sasa. 
Matthew4:8 Tukuyarusti supayax mä jach'a qullu pataruw Jesusar irpäna, ukatsti aka uraqin taqi qamir markanaka, kunja jach'äkäntix uka markanak uñacht'ayäna," 
Matthew4:9 akham sasa: —Jumatix killt'asisin nayar yupaychitäta ukax taqi aka markanak churäma —sasa. 
Matthew4:10 Jesusasti juparux sänwa: —Saraqit nayat supaya, Diosan qillqatapasti siwa: ‘Tatitu Diosamarukiw yupaychäta, jupa saparukiw arkäta’ —sasa." 
Matthew4:11 Ukat supayax sarawayxäna, Jesusarusti angelanakaw luqtir jutapxäna." 
Matthew4:12 Bautisir Juanan carcelankatap ist'asinxa, Jesusax Galilearuw sarxäna." 
Matthew4:13 Ukampis janiw Nazaret markar qhiparkänti, jan ukasti Cafarnaúm markar jakiriw sarxäna; uka markasti Galilea quta thiyankänwa, Zabulón, Neftalí uka ayllunakan uraqipana." 
Matthew4:14 Taqi akanakasti, Isaías profetan arsutaparjamaw phuqhasiskäna:" 
Matthew4:15 “Zabulón uraqi, Neftalí uraqi, Jordán jawirat khurkatana, quta thiyankir uraqi: jan judionakan utjasiñ Galilea uraqi." 
Matthew4:16 Ch'amakankir jaqinakax mä jach'a qhan uñjapxi; mä suma qhanaw qhanti jiwañ ch'amakan jakapki ukanakataki” sasa. 
Matthew4:17 Jesusax ukapachat Diosan arunakap parlañ qalltäna: “Diosan ukar kuttanxapxam, qhapaq markapax jak'ankxiwa” sasa." 
Matthew4:18 Ukatsti Jesusax Galilea quta thiyanjam sarkasaw pani jila sullkar uñjäna: maynïrix Simón Pedro satänwa, maynïristi Andrés satarakïnwa. Jupanakax chawlla katurïnwa, qänap qutar jaquntasipkäna." 
Matthew4:19 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: —Nayar arkapxita, nayasti jaqi katur tukuyapxäma —sasa." 
Matthew4:20 Jupanakasti ukspachaw qänanak jaytarpäwayasax Jesusar arkxapxäna. 
Matthew4:21 Mä juk'a nayrar sartasinsti, Jesusax yaqha pani jila sullkaruw uñjäna. Santiagompiru, Juanampiru, jupanakax Zebedeon yuqanakapänwa. Jupanakasti awkipampiw qänanakap boten askichasipkäna. Jesusasti jupanakaruw jawsäna," 
Matthew4:22 ukspachaw awkipampiru, botempir jaytanukuwayasax Jesusar arkxapxäna." 
Matthew4:23 Jesusax Galilea uraqpach muytäna, sinagoganakan Diosan qhispiyasiñ arunakap yatiyasa, usutanakar k'umaraptayasa, ayquñanakap apaqasa." 
Matthew4:24 Jesusan luratapasti Siria uraqpachan yatisïna, jupan ukarusti kunayman usutanakaru, ñanqha ajayun mantatanakaru, t'uku usuninakaru, suchunakaruw irpanipxäna. Jesusasti jupanakarux k'umaraptayänwa." 
Matthew4:25 Walja jaqinakaw juparux arkapxäna, Galileata, Decápolis uraqin utjir markanakata, Jerusalenata, Judeata, Jordán inti jalsu tuqinakata."

Matthew5:1 Jesusax walja jaqinak uñjasinxa, mä qulluruw makhatäna ukat qunt'asïna. Ukatsti yatiqirinakapax jupan ukaruw jak'achasipxäna," 
Matthew5:2 Jesusasti akham sasaw yatichañ qalltäna: 
Matthew5:3 “Kusisiñanïpxiw Tatitur taqi chuyma alkatirinakaxa, jupanakankiw Diosan qhapaq markapaxa." 
Matthew5:4 “Kusisiñanïpxiw t'aqhisirinakaxa, jupanakax chuymachatäpxaniwa." 
Matthew5:5 “Kusisiñanïpxiw llamp'u chuymaninakaxa, jupanakax mä suma uraq katuqapxani." 
Matthew5:6 “Kusisiñanïpxiw aski kankañ utjañap munirinakaxa, jupanakax phuqhat uk katuqapxani." 
Matthew5:7 “Kusisiñanïpxiw khuyapayirinakaxa, Diosasti jupanakarux khuyapayarakiniwa." 
Matthew5:8 “Kusisiñanïpxiw q'uma chuymaninakaxa, jupanakax Diosaruw uñjapxani." 
Matthew5:9 “Kusisiñanïpxiw sumankañ utjañapatak ch'amachirinakaxa, jupanakax Diosan wawanakap satäpxaniwa." 
Matthew5:10 “Kusisiñanïpxiw aski kankañ layku t'aqhisirinakaxa, jupanakankiw Diosan qhapaq markapaxa." 
Matthew5:11 “Kusisipxam kunapachatix jaqinakax nayar arkapxatam layku tuqipxätam, usuchjapxätam, k'arintapxätam ukkhaxa." 
Matthew5:12 Kusisitak jakasipxam, jumanakasti alaxpach markan jach'a churäwi katuqapxäta; jumanakat nayra profetanakarux kipkarak uñisipxäna." 
Matthew5:13 “Jumanakax akapach jayüpxtawa. Ukampis jayutix ch'aphaqar tukuspaxa, ¿kunampirak jayunchasispasti? Janiw kunatakis askïkxaspati, jan ukasti jaqin takisiñapatak anqar wartatakïxaspawa." 
Matthew5:14 “Jumanakax akapach qhanäpxtawa. Mä qullu patankir markax janiw imantaskaspati. 
Matthew5:15 Janirakiw mä micha qhanas jamas manqhar uchañatak aqtayatäkaspati, jan ukasti, alay chiqar uchatäñapawa uta manqhankirinakar sum qhantañapataki." 
Matthew5:16 Uka pachpay jumanakan qhanamax jaqinak nayraqatan qhantpan, ukhamat aski luräwinakam uñjasin Dios Awkimar taqpachan yupaychañapataki." 
Matthew5:17 “Jan jumanakax amuyapxamti, nayax Moisesan kamachinakapa, profetanakan yatichäwinakap chhaqhayiris jutkirista ukhama; janiw uk apaqirit jutktxa, jan ukasti, kuntix yatichañ munkistu uk phuqhiriw jutta." 
Matthew5:18 Qhanak sapxsma, akapachampi alaxpachampi tukusiñapkamax, uka kamachinakatxa janiw mä jisk'a arusa, mä jisk'a qillqasa apaqatäkaniti, taqi ukanak phuqhasiñapkama." 
Matthew5:19 Ukatpï sapxsmaxa, khititix uka kamachinakat mä jisk'a kamachikïkchi ukasa jan phuqkani, janirak jaqinakarus ukarjam sarnaqañapatak yatichkani ukaxa, jupasti alaxpach markan mä jisk'at uñt'atakïniwa. Ukampis khititix kamachi phuqhani, ukat yaqhanakar ukham phuqhañapatak yaticharakini ukasti, alaxpach markan jach'at uñt'atäniwa." 
Matthew5:20 “Nayax sapxsmawa: Janitix sarnaqäwinakamax kamachi yatichirinakata, fariseonakat sipan askïkchi ukaxa, janiw Diosan qhapaq markapar mantapkätati." 
Matthew5:21 “Jumanakax nayra awkinakamar akham satäkänsa uk ist'apxtawa: ‘Janiw jiwayätati, jiwayirix juchañchatäniwa’ sasa." 
Matthew5:22 Nayasti sapxsmawa, khititix jilapampi phiñasinixa, jupax juchañchatäniwa. Khititix jilapar tuqxani ukasti, Jach'a Tantachasïwinkir jilïrinakan juchañchatäniwa; khititix jilapar ñanqha arunakampi ñanqhachani ukasti, nina infiernor jaquntatäniwa." 
Matthew5:23 “Ukhamasti, jumatix luqtäwim altarar apkasin jilamampi jan walinkatam amtasïta ukaxa," 
Matthew5:24 uka luqtäwim altar nayraqatar jaytawayasin jilamampi sumankthapir saram. Ukat uka luqtäwim altaran churir kutt'anïta. 
Matthew5:25 “Maynitix ‘jan wal lurista’ sas tumpantätam ukaxa, jumasti janïr kunäkipan jupamp sumar mantxam, ukhamat taripirin ukar jan apatäñamataki; jan ukhamäkan ukasti, taripirix katuntirinakar katuyasin carcelt'ayätam." 
Matthew5:26 Qhanak sisma, janiw ukatxa taqpach qullqi churañamkam mistkätati." 
Matthew5:27 “Jumanakasti ist'apxaraktawa: ‘Janiw wachuq jucha lurätati’ satäkänsa ukxa. 
Matthew5:28 Ukampis nayax sapxsmawa, khititix mä warmir munapayañatak uñtixa, niyaw chuymapan jupampix wachuq jucha lurxi." 
Matthew5:29 “Ukhamasti, kupi nayramatix juchar puriyirjamästamxa, apsusin jayar liwtam; walïspawa mä nayrama janchiman chhaqhañapaki, taqpach janchima infiernor jaquntatäñat sipana." 
Matthew5:30 Jan ukax kupi amparamatix jan walir puriyirjamästamxa, khariqasim ukat jayar liwtam; walïspawa mä amparama janchiman chhaqhañapaki, taqpach janchima infiernor jaquntatäñat sipana." 
Matthew5:31 “Satarakïnwa: ‘Khititix warmipampi jaljtanixa, jaljtañ qillqat churxpan’ sasa." 
Matthew5:32 Ukampis nayax sapxsmawa, mä chachax warmipan wachuq jucha luratapatak jaljtaspaxa, jan ukhamäkaspa ukasti, jaljtatapampix warmipan juchar puriñap wakichi. Khititix jaljtat warmimpi jaqichaskani ukasti, wachuq jucha luri." 
Matthew5:33 “Jumanakax nayra awkinakamar satäkatayna uk ist'apxaraktawa: ‘Kuntix lurañatak Tatitu nayraqatan juramentompi arskta uk phuqhapunim’ sasa. 
Matthew5:34 Ukampis nayax sapxsmawa, janipun kunäkipansa juramento lurapxamti. Alaxpach laykus jan lurapxamti, ukax Diosan qunuñapawa;" 
Matthew5:35 akapach laykusa, ukax Diosan kayunakapan takt'äwipawa, janirak Jerusalén laykusa, ukasti jach'a Reyin markapawa." 
Matthew5:36 Janipun p'iqim laykus juramento luramti, janiw jumax mä ñik'utsa, janq'uta ch'iyäraru tukuykasmati." 
Matthew5:37 Jumanakan arsuñamax akakïñapawa, ‘Jïsa’, jan ukax ‘janiwa’ sasa. Ukat juk'amp yaqha arux supayat jutiriwa." 
Matthew5:38 “Kunatix satäkän uk ist'apxaraktawa: ‘Uñkatatax, uñkatarakim; tuqxatasti, tuqxarakim’ sasa." 
Matthew5:39 Ukampis nayax sapxsmawa: Jan wal lurktam uka jaqirux, jan kutkatamti; jan ukasti, maynitix maysa ajanut t'axllintätamxa, maysa ajanumppach uñacht'ayam." 
Matthew5:40 Maynitix ch'axwampi isim aparañ munstamxa, patxa isimamppach churawayxam." 
Matthew5:41 Mä soldadotix khayakam q'ipirapita sätamxa, jumax juk'amp khurikam q'ipirapim." 
Matthew5:42 Mä kunsa maynix mayïtam ukarux churam; jumat mayt'asiñ muniritakisti, jan maysa uñtamti." 
Matthew5:43 “Kunatix satäkän uk ist'apxaraktawa: ‘Jaqi masimar munasïtawa, timamarusti uñisïtawa’ sasa." 
Matthew5:44 Ukampis nayax sapxsmawa: Uñisirinakamar munasipxam, ñanqhachirinakamatakisti Tatitut mayirapipxam." 
Matthew5:45 Ukhamat jumanakax alaxpachankir Awkiman wawanakapäpxäta; jupaw inti jalsuyani jan wali jaqinakatakisa, aski jaqinakatakisa, juparakiw jallu apayani, aski jaqinakatakisa, jan wali jaqinakatakisa." 
Matthew5:46 Jumanakatix munasipktam ukanakaruki munapxsta ukaxa, ¿kuna askirak katuqapxätasti? Roma markatak qullqi apthapirinakas uka kipka lurapxaraki." 
Matthew5:47 Jilanakamaruk aruntapxäta ukasti, ¿kuna askirak lurapxtasti? Diosar jan uñt'irinakas ukham lurapxaraki." 
Matthew5:48 Jumanakax askïpxam, kunjämatix alaxpachankir Awkimax askïki ukhama." 
Matthew6:1 “Aski luräwinakamxa, jan jaqin uñjayasiñatakik lurapxamti. Ukham lurapxät ukkhasti, alaxpachankir Awkimax janiw kuna churäwsa waxt'apkätamti." 
Matthew6:2 “Jumatix pist'ayasitanakar yanapt'äta ukaxa, jaqinakarux jan yatiyamti, kunjämtix k'ari chuymaninakax sinagoganakana, thakhinakan lurapki ukhama. Jupanakax jaqinak nayraqatan wali sumat uñt'atäñ munapxi. Nayasti qhanpun sapxsma, ukham luratapat niy katuqxapxiwa." 
Matthew6:3 Kunapachatix jumax pist'ayasitanakar kunsa churät ukkhaxa, wali munat masimas uk jan yatkpati;" 
Matthew6:4 jan ukasti, jan khitir yatiyasak luram. Ukham luratamatsti, alaxpachankir Awkimax mä suma waxt'äwi churätam." 
Matthew6:5 “Kunapachatix jumanakax Diosat mayisipkäta ukkhasti, jan k'ari chuymaninakjam mayisipxamti, jupanakax sinagoganakansa, thakhi thiyanakansa jaqinakamp uñjayasiñatakikiw sayt'at mayisipxi. Qhanak sapxsma, jupanakax churäwip niy katuqxapxiwa." 
Matthew6:6 Jumasti Diosat mayiskäta ukkhax, utamar mantam, punku jist'antam, ukatsti Awkimarux uka jamasan mayisim. Awkimasti jamasan mayisitam uñjasax churätamwa." 
Matthew6:7 “Diosat mayiskasasti, janiy inamay arunakampi mayisimti, kunjämtix Diosar jan uñt'ir jaqinakax mayisipki ukhama, jupanakasti Diosax jupanakar walja arunak arsutap laykus ist'kaspa ukham amuyapxi." 
Matthew6:8 Janiy jupanakjamäpxamti, Awkimax janïr mayipktas ukkhaw yatxi, kuntix jumanakax munapkäta ukxa." 
Matthew6:9 Jumanakasti akham mayisipxäta: “ ‘Alaxpachankir nanakan Awkixa, sutimax jach'añchatäpan." 
Matthew6:10 Qhapaq kankañamax nanakar jutpan. Munañamasti akapachan luratäpan, kunjämatix alaxpachan luratäki ukhama." 
Matthew6:11 Sapüruy manq'añ churanipxita. 
Matthew6:12 Juchanakaxat pampachapxita, kamisatix nanakax jan wal lurapkitu ukanakarux pampachapkta ukhama." 
Matthew6:13 Janirak yant'äwir puriyapxistati, jan ukasti ñanqhat qhispiyapxita’; [jumankiw jaqinakar apnaqañaxa, ch'amanïñasa, jach'achatäñasa wiñayan wiñayapataki. Ukhamäpan.]" 
Matthew6:14 “Jumanakatix jan wali luratanakapat masinakamar pampachapxäta ukkhaxa, alaxpachankir Awkimax jumanakarux pampachapxarakïtamwa;" 
Matthew6:15 janitix masinakamar pampachapkäta ukasti, janirakiw Awkimax juchanakam pampachapkätamti." 
Matthew6:16 “Kunapachatix jumanakax ayunapkäta ukkhasti, janiy k'ari chuyman jaqinakjam llakit ajan uñacht'ayapxamti, jupanakax ayunatapa jaqimp uñjayasiñatakikiw llakit ajan uñacht'ayapxi. Qhanak sapxsma, ukham luratapampix churäwip niy katuqxapxiwa." 
Matthew6:17 Kunapachatix jumax ayunkät ukkhax, ajanum jariqasim, ñik'utamsa sum askicht'asim," 
Matthew6:18 ukhamat jaqinakan juman ayunaskatam jan amuyañapataki. Jan ukasti, Awkimakiw ayunatam yatini, ukatsti juparakiw waxt'äwim churätam." 
Matthew6:19 “Akapachan jan walja yänak imapxamti, uka yänakax ina ch'usaruw tukusispa, thuthaw q'al thuthantaspa, jan ukax lunthataw lunthatsurakispa." 
Matthew6:20 Jan ukasti, jumanakax alaxpachar suma yänak imasipxam, uka yänakax janiw ina ch'usar tukuskaniti, thuthas thuthantkaniti, janirakiw lunthatas apaskaniti." 
Matthew6:21 Kawkhankkitix qamir yänakamax, ukkhankarakiw chuymamaxa." 
Matthew6:22 “Janchin qhanapax nayramawa; ukhamasti, nayramatix walikïskchi ukaxa, taqi janchimax sum qhantani;" 
Matthew6:23 ukampis nayramatix jan walïkchixa, taqi janchimax ch'amakankaniwa. Juman utjki uka qhanatix ch'amakar tukuni ukaxa, ¡kunja laxa ch'amakänisa!" 
Matthew6:24 “Janiw khitis pani uywirir luqtkaspati, maynirux munasiniwa, maynirusti uñisiniwa, jan ukax maynirux alkataniwa, maynirusti jisk'achaniwa. Diosampiru, qamir yänakampirux janiw khitis luqtkaspati." 
Matthew6:25 “Sapxaraksmawa: Jan llakisipxamti, kuntix manq'apkäta, umapkäta, isisipkäta ukanakata. ¿Janit jakañax manq'at sipan juk'ampïki, janchis isit sipan juk'ampïkisti?" 
Matthew6:26 Uñtapxam jalanaqaskir jamach'inakaru: janiw jupanakax satapkisa, apthapipkisa, janirakiw juyranaksa pirwanakar imapkiti; ukampis alaxpachankir Awkimaw ukanakarux manq'ayi. ¡Jumanakasti jamach'inakat sipan juk'amp munatäpxtawa!" 
Matthew6:27 Ukampis ¿khitirak wal llakisitapat jakañap mä juk'ampi yapt'asispasti? 
Matthew6:28 “¿Kunatarak isit llakisipxtasti? Uñtapxam kunjämtix pampan panqaranakax jilaski uka, ukanakax janiw irnaqapkiti qapupkarakisa." 
Matthew6:29 Nayasti sapxsmawa, janiw Salomón reyis walja utjirinïtap laykux uka panqaranakjam isthapiskänti." 
Matthew6:30 Diosatix uka panqaranakarux sum isthapiychixa, jichhürux sum panqart'aski, qharürusti ninar phichhantatäxarakiwa, ¡Diosax jumanakampix juk'amp sum lurani, pisi iyawsañan jaqinaka!" 
Matthew6:31 Ukhamax jan llakisipxamti akham sasa: ‘¿Kunsa manq'añäni? ¿Kunsa umañäni? ¿Kunampis isisiñäni?’ sasa. 
Matthew6:32 Diosar jan uñt'irinakakiw taqi uka yänakat llakisisipki, ukampis jumanakan alaxpachankir Awkimax niyaw yatxi kuntix munapkta uka." 
Matthew6:33 Ukhamasti, nayraqatax Diosan qhapaq markap thaqhapxam, kunatix jupan nayraqatapan chiqäki ukarak lurapxam, ukatsti taqi yänakax churatakïsipkätawa." 
Matthew6:34 Jan qharürut llakisipxamti, qharürux llakisiñatak pachax utjaskaniwa. Sapürurakiw llakinakan phuqhantatäski." 
Matthew7:1 “Jaqi masimarux jan juchañchapxamti, jumanakar Diosan jan juchañchañapataki." 
Matthew7:2 Kunjämtix jumanakax jaqi masimar juchañchapktas uka pachparak Diosax jumanakarux juchañchapxätam; kunjämtix jumanakax jaqinakar lurapkäta ukhamarak jumanakarux Diosax lurapxätam. 
Matthew7:3 ¿Kunatarak jumasti jilaman nayrapan mä jisk'a t'unan utjatap uñch'uktasti, ukat jumax janirak amuyasktati mä thuru lawan nayramankatapatsti?" 
Matthew7:4 ¿Kamisarak jilamar sasmasti: Nayramankir t'una apsüma, sasa, pachpa nayraman mä thuru lawa utjkipansti?" 
Matthew7:5 ¡K'ari chuyman jaqi!, nayramankkis uka thuru lawa nayraqat apsusim, ukat jumax sum uñjasin uka jisk'a t'una jilaman nayrapan utjkis uk apsüta." 
Matthew7:6 “Qullanäki uka yänak jan anunakar churapxamti, ukatarak uka anunakasti jumanakar kutkatasin achjasipkiristam. Janirak munat suma yänakamsa khuchhinakar warxaruyapxamti, khuchhinakasti taksupxaspawa." 
Matthew7:7 “Mayipxam, Diosax churapxätamwa; thaqhapxam, jikxatapxätawa; punku liqt'apxam, jist'aratäpxätawa." 
Matthew7:8 Mayirix katuqiwa; thaqhirix jikxatiwa; punku liqt'irirusti jist'aratawa. 
Matthew7:9 “¿Jumanak taypin maynix utjaspati, wawapan t'ant'a mayipan qalak churiristi?" 
Matthew7:10 ¿Jan ukax wawapan chawlla mayipan mä asiru churiristi? 
Matthew7:11 Jumanakatix, jan wali jaqïkasin, sumäkis uk wawanakamar churapxstaxa, ¡alaxpachankir Awkimasti, khitinakatix jupar mayki ukanakarux juk'amp sumanak churarakinixa!" 
Matthew7:12 “Kunjämtix jumanakax jaqinakamp uñjatäñ munapkta ukhamarak jumanakax jupanakar uñjapxam; ukham lurañax kamachimpina, profetanakampin yatichatawa." 
Matthew7:13 “K'ullk'u punku chiq mantapxam. Chhaqhañar irpir thakhimpi, punkumpisti jach'awa; waljanirakiw uka chiq mantapxi;" 
Matthew7:14 ukampis jakañar irpir thakhimpi, punkumpix wali k'ullk'uwa, juk'anikiw ukanak jikxatapxi." 
Matthew7:15 “K'ari profetanakat amuyasipxam, jupanakasti ‘Diosat nanakax parlaxpta’ sasaw sarnaqapxi. Jupanakasti ovejanakat isthapitaw jumanakan ukar jutapxi, ukampis chuymapanxa ñanqha lunthat qamaqinakawa." 
Matthew7:16 Jumanakax luräwinakapat uñt'apxäta, yatipxtawa, janiw ina ch'aphinakat uvax apthapiskiti, janirakiw higos aliq ch'aphirar quqat apthapiskaspati." 
Matthew7:17 Suma quqanakax suma achunak churi, jan suma quqanakasti jan wali achunakarak churi." 
Matthew7:18 Suma quqasti janiw jan wali achunak churkaspati, janirakiw jan wali quqas suma achunak churkaspati." 
Matthew7:19 Jan wali achu churir quqanakasti phat'anukutawa, ukatsti ninar phichhantatarakiwa." 
Matthew7:20 Ukhamasti jumanakax luräwinakapat uñt'apxäta. 
Matthew7:21 “Janiw taqi khitinakatix: ‘Tatay, Tatay’ siskitu ukanakax alaxpach markar mantkaniti, jan ukasti khitinakatix Awkixan munañap lurki ukanakakiw mantani." 
Matthew7:22 Khä urunxa, waljaniw sapxitani: ‘Tatay, Tatay, nanakax sutimaruw parlapxäyäta, sutimaruw ñanqha ajayunakar jaqsupxäyäta, ukatsti sutimxarurakiw walja muspharkañanak lurapxäyäta’ sasa." 
Matthew7:23 Ukapachaw jupanakarux sarakï: ‘Janipuniw jumanakarux uñt'apksmati; ¡ñanqha lurir jaqinaka, nayat jithiqtapxita’ sasa." 
Matthew7:24 “Khititix ist'kitu ukat kuntix siskta uk lurki ukax, qarqa patar utachasir amuyt'an jaqir uñtatawa." 
Matthew7:25 Jallux purintiwa, jawiranakax walipuniw sartani, thayas wali ch'amampiw uka utarux thayt'ani, ukampis utax janiw liwiskiti qarqa patar utacht'atätap layku." 
Matthew7:26 Ukampis khititix ist'kitu ukat janirak kuntix nayax siskta uk lurki ukaxa, ch'alla patar utachasir jan amuyt'an jaqir uñtatawa." 
Matthew7:27 Jallux purintiwa, jawiranakax walipuniw sartani, thayas thayt'anirakiwa, ukatsti utax tinkuwayxiwa. ¡Uka utan tinkutapasti wali llakkañawa!”" 
Matthew7:28 Kunapachatix Jesusax parlañ tukuyxän ukkhasti, taqi jaqinakaw uka suma yatichäwinak ist'asax muspharapxäna," 
Matthew7:29 jupasti munañan kankañampi phuqt'ataw yatichäna, janiw jupanakan kamachi yatichirinakjam yatichkänti." 
Matthew8:1 Jesusax uka qullut saraqanxän ukkhasti, walja jaqiw juparux arkäna." 
Matthew8:2 Ukapachaw mä lepra usun jaqix Jesusar jak'achasïna, jupan nayraqatapar killt'asisinsti, sarakïnwa: —Tatay, munsta ukax q'umachitaya —sasa." 
Matthew8:3 Jesusasti juparux amparapampiw luqxatäna, ukatsti sarakïnwa: —Q'umachatäxañam munta, jichhax k'umaräxtawa —sasa. Ukspachaw lepra usun jaqix k'umarachat uñjasïna." 
Matthew8:4 Jesusasti juparux sarakïnwa: —Jan khitirus uk yatiyamti, jan ukasti sacerdoter uñachayasir saram, ukatsti Moisesan yatichäwiparjam mä luqta churam, ukhamat sacerdotenakan nayraqatapan k'umaräxatam uñstañapataki —sasa." 
Matthew8:5 Ukatsti Cafarnaúm markar mantkiriruw mä capitanax purinisin Jesusar wal achikt'asïna," 
Matthew8:6 akham sasa: —Tatay, uywataxaw utan usuntatäski, suchuptatawa, janchipsa walrak usuyasi —sasa." 
Matthew8:7 Jesusasti sänwa: —Nayaw jupar k'umaraptayir sarä —sasa. 
Matthew8:8 Capitanasti ukxarux sarakïnwa: —Tatay, janiw nayax askïkti utaxar juman mantañamatakixa; jan ukasti akkhatpachak uywataxan k'umaraptañapatak arsum, jupasti k'umaraptxaniwa." 
Matthew8:9 Nayasti jilïrinakan arsutaparuw sarnaqta, ukhamarus soldadonakax nayan munañaxankarakiwa. Kunapachatix maynirux nayax sistxa ‘saram’ sasaxa, ukspachaw sari, maynirutix ‘jutam’ sistxa, ukspacharakiw juti, uywataxarutix kuna lurañarus khitta ukkhaxa, jupax luriwa —sasa." 
Matthew8:10 Jesusasti uk ist'asin wali musphataw uñjasïna, jupar arkirinakarusti sarakïnwa: —Qhanak sapxsma, israelitanak taypin janiw maynirus aka chachjam iyawsañan jikxatkti." 
Matthew8:11 Nayasti sapxsmawa, waljaniw inti jalsu tuqita, inti jalanta tuqitsa jutapxani, ukatsti Abrahamampi, Isaacampi, Jacobumpi manq'iriw alaxpach suma markan qunt'asipxani," 
Matthew8:12 ukampis khitinakatix uka suma markankañapäki ukanakax, anqa ch'amakar jaqunukutäniwa. Ukan wararipxani, laka ch'aksa t'urusipxani —sasa." 
Matthew8:13 Jesusasti capitanarux sarakiwa: —Utamar sarxam, ukasti iyawsatamarjam luraspan —sasa. Uywatapasti ukspachaw k'umaraptxäna." 
Matthew8:14 Jesusax Pedron utaparuw saräna, ukansti Pedron taykch'iparux ikiñankaskir wali usuntat jikxatäna." 
Matthew8:15 Jesusasti amparapat llamkt'äna, ukspachaw usux apaqtawayxäna, k'umaräxasinsti Jesusaruw manq'a waxt'äna." 
Matthew8:16 Jayp'u tuqirusti ñanqha ajayun mantat jaqinak irpanipxäna; Jesusasti mä sapa arsutapampikiw uka ñanqha ajayunakarux alissüna, ukhamarak yaqha usutanakarus k'umaraptayäna." 
Matthew8:17 Taqi akanakasti Isaías profetan arsutaparjamaw phuqhasiskäna: “Jupaw jiwasan usunakasa, chhuxrinakas apxi” sasa." 
Matthew8:18 Jesusasti walja jaqinak uñjasinxa, quta khurkatar makhatañatakiw yatiqirinakapar mayïna." 
Matthew8:19 Ukapachaw kamachi yatichirinakat maynix Jesusar jak'achasisin säna: —Yatichiri, kawkharutix sarkäta ukkharux arkapunïmawa —sasa." 
Matthew8:20 Jesusasti juparux sarakïnwa: —Qamaqinakax putunakaniwa, jamach'inakas tapanakanirakiwa, ukampis Jaqin Yuqapan janiw kawkhar p'iqip waynuqt'añapas utjkiti —sasa." 
Matthew8:21 Maynïr yatiqiripasti juparux sarakïnwa: —Tatay, awkixar nayraqat imt'anï, ukat jumarux arkäma —sasa." 
Matthew8:22 Jesusasti sarakïnwa: —Jiwatanakax jiwat masipar imaskpan sama, jumax nayar arkita —sasa." 
Matthew8:23 Ukatsti Jesusax boteruw mantäna, yatiqirinakapamp chikt'ataw sarxäna." 
Matthew8:24 Qutanjam sarapkipansti, mä jach'a thayaw sartäna, quta mathapix boteruw phuqhantäna. Jesusasti ukchañkamax ikiskänwa." 
Matthew8:25 Yatiqirinakapasti juparuw sartayapxäna, sapxarakïnwa: —¡Tatay, qhispiyapxita, botex umaruw utjanti! —sasa." 
Matthew8:26 Jupasti sarakïnwa: —¡Juk'a iyawsañan jaqinaka! ¿Kunatsa sinti mulljasipxta? —sasa. Uk sasinsti, sartasisin thayampiru qutampiruw tuqinuqäna, arsutaparusti thayasa, qutas t'akurawayxänwa." 
Matthew8:27 Jupanakasti wali muspharataw jiskt'asipxäna: —¿Khitïpachas jupaxa? ¡Qutas thayas juparux ist'akirakisä! —sasa. 
Matthew8:28 Kunapachatix Jesusax quta khurkatankki uka Gadara chiqar purxän ukkhasti, ñanqha ajayuni pä chachaw amay imäwi manqhat mistunipxäna, ukatsti Jesusaruw jak'achasipxäna. Jupanakax wali axsaratäpxänwa, janirakiw khitis uka thakhi chiqa sarirïkänti;" 
Matthew8:29 jupanakasti wali jach'at art'apxäna: —¡Jesús, Diosan Yuqapa, nanakampix jan kuns luramti! ¿Janïräkipanti nanakar t'aqhisiyir jutta? —sasa." 
Matthew8:30 Uka jak'ansti mä tama khuchhiw manq'askäna," 
Matthew8:31 ñanqha ajayunakasti Jesusarux achikt'asipxänwa: —Alisnukupxität ukaxa, khä khuchhinakar mantapxam sapxita —sasa." 
Matthew8:32 Jesusasti ukxarux sänwa: —Sarapxam —sasa. Uka ñanqha ajayunakasti, jaqinakat mistuwayasin khuchhinakaruw mantapxäna; khuchhinakasti ukspachaw mä qullu patat qutar chhukt'apxäna, ukan umampi axskatas jiwarapxäna." 
Matthew8:33 Khuchhi awatirinakasti wali mulljataw jaltxapxäna, markar purisinsti, kunatix khuchhinakampi, ñanqha ajayun mantat jaqinakamp luraskatayna taqi ukanak yatiyapxäna." 
Matthew8:34 Ukatsti markpachaw Jesusar jikxatir mistunipxäna, jupar jikxatasinsti uka chiqat sarxañapatakiw achikt'apxäna." 
Matthew9:1 Uka qhipatsti Jesusax boter mantasin quta khurkataruw makhatxäna, ukatsti Cafarnaúm markaparuw purxäna." 
Matthew9:2 Ukansti, mä suchu jaqiruw ikiñar kallanipxäna; Jesusasti jupanakan iyawsañap unjasinxa, suchu jaqirux sänwa: —Waway, ch'amañcht'asim, juchanakamax pampachatäxiwa —sasa." 
Matthew9:3 Kamachi yatichirinakat yaqhipanakasti chuymanakapan sapxäna: “Aka jaqix Diosar ñanqhachañ arunak arsu” sasa. 
Matthew9:4 Ukampis Jesusax jupanakan lup'itap amuyänwa, ukat jupanakarux jiskt'äna: —¿Kunatarak jumanakasti jan wali amtañanïpxtasti?" 
Matthew9:5 ¿Kun sañas jasakïspaxa: ‘Juchanakamax pampachatawa’ sañati, jan ukax: ‘Sartam ukatsti sarnaqam’ sañacha?" 
Matthew9:6 Jichhasti Jaqin Yuqapan akapachan juchanak pampachañatak munañanïtap uñacht'ayapxäma —sasa. Ukat suchu jaqirux säna: —Sartasim, ikiñam apthapisxam, ukat utamar sarxam —sasa." 
Matthew9:7 Uka suchu jaqisti ukspachaw sarthapïna, ukatsti utaparuw sarxäna." 
Matthew9:8 Uk uñjasinsti, jaqinakax wal axsarapxäna, ukatsti Diosaruw yupaychapxäna jaqinakar ch'am churatap layku." 
Matthew9:9 Jesusasti ukawjat sartasinxa, Mateo sat jaqiruw uñjäna, uka jaqisti Romatak qullqi apthapiñäwjan qunt'atäskänwa. Jesusasti sänwa: —Arkita —sasa. Mateosti sartasisin Jesusaruw arkxaruwayäna." 
Matthew9:10 Uka qhipatsti, Jesusax yatiqirinakapampiw Mateon utapan manq'askäna, ukatsti qullqi apthapirinakampi, yaqha jucharar jaqinakampiw ukawjar purinisin manq'añatak qunt'asipxäna." 
Matthew9:11 Uk uñjasinsti, fariseonakax yatiqirinakaparuw jiskt'apxäna: —¿Kunatarak jumanakan yatichirimasti uka qullqi apthapirinakampi, juchararanakamp manq'isti? —sasa." 
Matthew9:12 Jesusasti uk ist'asin sänwa: —K'umar jaqinakax janiw mä qullir munapkiti, jan ukasti usutanakaw qullir munapxixa." 
Matthew9:13 Sarapxam, ukatsti kuntix aka arsüwix sañ munki uk amuyt'anipxam: ‘Nayax jumanakan khuyapt'ayasirïpxañam munta, janiw luqtanak munkti’. Janiw aski jaqinakar jawsir jutkti, jan ukasti juchararanakar jawsiriw jutta —sasa." 
Matthew9:14 Ukatsti Bautisir Juanan arkirinakapaw Jesusar jak'achasisin jiskt'apxäna: —Nanakampi fariseonakampix wal ayunapxta, ¿kunatarak juman yatiqirinakamasti jan ayunapxisti? —sasa." 
Matthew9:15 Jesusasti sarakïnwa: —¿Jaqichasïwir jawsayat jaqinakax jaqichasir waynan ukankaskatapat llakitakïpxaspati? Ukampis jaqichasir waynar irpasxañ urux purininiwa; ukkhaw ayuno lurañax wakisini. 
Matthew9:16 “Janiw khitis mä mirq'i isirux machaq isimpi ch'ukxatkiti, machaq isisti t'axsutax jalthapiwa, ukatsti mirq'i isirux juk'ampiw ch'iyanuqi." 
Matthew9:17 Janirakiw chhuyu vinos mirq'i lip'ichi wayaqanakar uchaskiti, ukhamäspa ukax uka mirq'i lip'ichi wayaqax phallaspawa, ukatsti vinosa, lip'ich wayaqanakasa ina ch'usaruw tukusispa. Ukat wakisi chhuyu vinox machaq lip'ich wayaqar uchatäñapaxa, ukhamat paypachax suma imat uñjasini” —sasa." 
Matthew9:18 Jesusan ukham parlkipan, judionakan mayni jilïripax purinïna, Jesusan nayraqatapar killt'asisin juparux säna: —Phuchhaxaw añchhichak jiwi; jumatix jutasma, amparamampi jupxar luqxatt'arakisma ukkhax, wawaxax jaktxaspawa —sasa." 
Matthew9:19 Jesusasti yatiqirinakapamp chikt'ataw uka jaqimpix saräna. 
Matthew9:20 Ukapachasti mä warmiw qhipäxat Jesusar jak'achasïna, jupax tunka payan maraw wila apa usumpi usuntatayna, ukat Jesusan isipat llamkt'äna." 
Matthew9:21 Warmisti amuyupan sänwa: “Isipak llamkt'irista ukat k'umaräxiristwa” sasa. 
Matthew9:22 Ukspachaw Jesusax kutikipstäna, ukatsti warmir uñjasin sänwa: —Jan llakisxamti, Diosar iyawsatamat k'umaräxtaxa —sasa. Jupasti ukspachaw k'umaräxäna." 
Matthew9:23 Kunapachatix Jesusax jilïrin utapar purkän ukkhaxa, phusirinakan uka wawar imanxañatak wakicht'atäskiri, ukhamarak jaqinakan wal jachasipkir uñjäna," 
Matthew9:24 jupanakarusti sänwa: —Anqar mistupxam, imill wawax janiw jiwatäkiti, jan ukasti ikiskiwa —sasa. Jaqinakasti Jesusat wal larusipxäna," 
Matthew9:25 ukampis jupax jaqinakarux anqaruw ananuküna, ukatsti Jesusax utar mantasin imill wawarux amparapat waytäna, imill wawasti ukspachaw sartäna." 
Matthew9:26 Uka luratapasti taqi uksa tuqinakan yatisïna. 
Matthew9:27 Jesusan ukawjat mistunkipansti, pani juykhu jaqiw arnaqasis juparux arkanipxäna: —¡Davidan yuqapa, khuyapt'ayasipxita! —sasa." 
Matthew9:28 Kunapachatix Jesusax utar mantxäna ukkhaxa, uka juykhunakax juparuw jak'achasipxäna. Jesusasti jupanakarux jiskt'änwa: —¿Jumanakar nayan k'umaraptayañax iyawsapxtati? —sasa. Jupanakasti sapxänwa: —Jïsa, Tatay —sasa." 
Matthew9:29 Ukat Jesusax nayranakap llamkt'äna, jupanakarusti sarakïnwa: —Kunjämtix jumanakax iyawsapkta ukhamarjam luraspan —sasa." 
Matthew9:30 Ukatsti nayranakapax k'umaräxänwa. Jesusasti jupanakarux akham sasaw iwxt'äna: —Jan khitirus uk yatiyapxamti —sasa. 
Matthew9:31 Ukampis jupanakax mistus ukspachaw taqi uksa tuqinakan kuntix Jesusax lurkatayna uk yatiyapxäna. 
Matthew9:32 Jupanakan uka utat mistunkipansti, mayni jaqinakax ñanqha ajayun mantat amutu jaqiruw Jesusan ukar irpanipxäna." 
Matthew9:33 Jesusan ñanqha ajayur alissutapatsti, uka jaqix ukspachaw parlañ qalltäna. Jaqinakasti uk uñjasin wal muspharapxäna, sapxarakïnwa: —Janipuniw kunapachas Israel markan ukham uñjirïktanti —sasa." 
Matthew9:34 Fariseonakasti sapxänwa: —Aka jaqix ñanqha ajayun jilïripan ch'am churataw uka ñanqha ajayunakarux alisnuku —sasa. 
Matthew9:35 Jesusasti jach'a markanaka, jisk'a markanak muytäna, sinagoganakan yatichasa. Diosan qhapaq markapan suma yatiyäwi arunak yatiyäna, ukatsti kunayman usutanakaru, ayqurinakaruw k'umarachäna." 
Matthew9:36 Walja jaqinak uñjasinsti, Jesusax jupanakat khuyapt'ayasïnwa, jupanakasti jan awatirin ovejanakjam wali llakt'ata, t'aqhisitäpxänwa." 
Matthew9:37 Yatiqirinakaparusti Jesusax sänwa: —Chiqpachansa, yapu apthapiñax waljapuniwa, ukampis irnaqirinakaw juk'aniki." 
Matthew9:38 Ukhamax yapuniruy irnaqirinak khithaniñapatak mayipxam —sasa. 
Matthew10:1 Jesusax tunka payan yatiqirinakaparuw jawsäna, jupanakarusti ñanqha ajayunakar alissuñataki, usutanakar k'umaraptayañatakiw ch'am churäna." 
Matthew10:2 Tunka payanin sutinakapax akanakawa: Simón Pedro; Andrés, Simón Pedron jilapa; Santiago, Juan, Zebedeon yuqanakapa;" 
Matthew10:3 Felipe, Bartolomé; Tomás, Romatak qullqi apthapir Mateo; Santiago, Alfeon yuqapa; Tadeo;" 
Matthew10:4 Cananeo tamankir Simón, Judas Iscariote, Jesusar aljantirïki uka." 
Matthew10:5 Jesusax uka tunka payaniruw aka iwxt'anakamp khithäna: “Jan judiöpkis ukanakan markaparux jan sarapxamti, Samariankki uka markanakarus janirak mantapxamti;" 
Matthew10:6 jan ukasti, Israel markankir chhaqhat ovejanakar sarapxam." 
Matthew10:7 Sarasinsti, Diosan qhapaq markapan jak'ankatap yatiyapxam." 
Matthew10:8 Usutanakar k'umaraptayapxam, jiwatanakar jaktayapxam, lepra usuninakar q'umachapxam, ñanqha ajayunakarus alissupxarakim. Ukanak lurañatakisti, inakiw ch'am katuqapxtaxa, inakirak churanipxam." 
Matthew10:9 “Thakhitakix qursa, qullqsa," 
Matthew10:10 manq'añsa, jan apapxamti. Isthapitäpkta ukat yaqha isimp jan apapxamti, janirak yaqha wiskhu, yaqha thujru apapxamti, irnaqirin manq'añ katuqañapasti wakisiwa." 
Matthew10:11 “Kunapachatix mä jisk'a markarusa, jan ukax jach'a markarus puripxätaxa, khititix aski jaqïki ukar thaqtapxam, uka markat sarañanakamkamasti jupan utapan qhiparapxam." 
Matthew10:12 Utar mantkasinsti ukan jakirinakar suma arumpi aruntapxam. 
Matthew10:13 Utankirinakatix askïnixa, uka suma aruntax askïniwa; janitix askïpkanixa, uka aruntax jumanak pachparuw kuttanxani." 
Matthew10:14 Janitix katuqapkätamxa, ist'apkarakïtamsa ukkhax uka utata, jan ukax uka markatsa mistuwayxapxam, kayunakamatsa laq'a thalarasiwayxapxam." 
Matthew10:15 Qhanak sapxsma, taripäwi urunxa, uka markanakan mutuñapax Sodoma, Gomorra uka markanakat sipan juk'ampïniwa." 
Matthew10:16 “¡Amuyasipxam! Nayasti jumanakarux ovejanakjam qamaqinak taypiruw khithapxsma. Katarinakjam ch'ikhïpxam, palomanakjam llamp'u chuymanïpxarakim." 
Matthew10:17 Amuyasipxam, jaqinakax jilïrinakaruw katuyapxätam, sinagoganakan jawq'japxarakïtam" 
Matthew10:18 nayan sutix laykusti, marka apnaqirinakana, reyinakan nayraqatapar irpataw uñjasipxäta; ukhamat jupanak nayraqatana, jan judiöpkis uka jaqinak nayraqatan nayat qhanañchapxäta." 
Matthew10:19 Jilïr jaqinakar katuyapkätam ukkhasti, jan llakisipxamti kuntix arsupkäta, kunjämtix arsupkäta ukatxa; arsuñanakam wakisini ukax Diosaw jumanakarux arsuyasipkätam." 
Matthew10:20 Janiw jumanakat arsupkäta, jan ukasti Awkiman Ajayupaw jumanak lantix arsuskani." 
Matthew10:21 “Jilanakasti jilanakaparuw jiwayañatak katuntayani, awkinakasti wawanakaparuw katuntayani; wawanakasti awkinakaparuw kutkatasini, ukatsti jiwayapxarakiniwa." 
Matthew10:22 Taqi jaqinakaw nayar arkapxatam laykux jumanakar uñisipxätam; ukampis khititix tukuykam sayt'kani ukakiw qhispiyasini. 
Matthew10:23 Mä markantix nuwjañatak arknaqapxätamxa, yaqha markar jaltxapxam; qhanak sapxsma, janïraw Israelankir markanak muytañsa tukuyapkätati ukapachaw Jaqin Yuqapax jutxani." 
Matthew10:24 “Janiw khiti yatiqiris yatichiripat sipan juk'ampïkiti, janirakiw mä uywatas uywiripat sipan juk'ampïkiti." 
Matthew10:25 Mä yatiqiritix yatichiripjamäxchixa, ukampix kusisitakïxañapawa, mä uywatatix uywiripjamäxchixa, ukampix kusisitakïxañapawa. Utanirutix Beelzebú sas sutichapxchixa, juk'amp jan walinak utankirinakarux sapxani." 
Matthew10:26 “Jupanakarux jan axsarapxamti. Janiw kuna imantatas jan uñjatäkaniti, janirakiw kuna jamasankiris jan yatitäkaniti." 
Matthew10:27 Kuntix ch'amakan sapksma ukxa, uru qhanan arsupxam; jamasan sapksma uksti, uta patat arnaqapxam." 
Matthew10:28 Janchir jiwayirinakarux jan axsarapxamti, ukampis ajayurux janiw jiwayapkaspati; khititix ajayumpiru janchimpiru infiernor jaquntkaspa uka Diosar axsarapxam." 
Matthew10:29 “¿Janit pä jamach'ix juk'a qullqiruk aljaskixa? Ukatsipana, janiw ukanakat mayas jalaqtkaspati Awkiman jan munañapäkchi ukaxa." 
Matthew10:30 Ukampis jumanakatxa, ñik'utanakamas mayat mayat suma jakt'atawa." 
Matthew10:31 Ukhamasti jan axsarapxamti, jumanakax uka jisk'a jamach'inakat sipansa, jila alanïpxtawa." 
Matthew10:32 “Khititix jaqinak nayraqatan nayat arsunixa, nayasti alaxpachankir Awkixan nayraqatapan jupat arsurakï;" 
Matthew10:33 ukampis khititix jaqinak nayraqatan nayar jan uñt'ir tukunixa, nayasti janirakiw alaxpachankir Awkixan nayraqatapan jupar uñt'ir tukkäti." 
Matthew10:34 “Janiy amuyapxamti, nayax akapachar sumankañsa apankirista ukhama; janiw sumankañ apankti, jan ukasti jan walt'ayasiñanakak apanta." 
Matthew10:35 Yuqarux awkipampi pitthapiriw jutta, phuchharusti taykapampi, yuxch'arusti taykch'ipampi pitthapiriw jutta;" 
Matthew10:36 ukhamat uñisirinakamax pachpa utamankirinakäni. 
Matthew10:37 “Khititix awkiparu, taykaparu nayar munasiñat sipan juk'ampi munki ukaxa, janiw nayatakjamäkiti; khititix yuqaparusa, phuchhaparusa nayar munañat sipan juk'ampi munki ukaxa, janiw nayatakjamäkiti;" 
Matthew10:38 khititix cruzap jan q'ipxarus nayar arkkitu ukax, janiw nayatakjamäkiti." 
Matthew10:39 Khititix jakañap qhispiyasiñ munanixa, apt'asiniwa, ukampis khititix jakañap naya layku apt'asinixa, qhispiyasiniwa." 
Matthew10:40 “Khititix jumanakar katuqapkätam ukanakax nayaruw katuqitu; khititix nayar katuqkitu ukax khithankitus ukaruw katuqi. 
Matthew10:41 Khititix mä profetar Diosat jutatapat katuqixa, profetan katuqañapäki uk katuqani; khititix mä aski jaqir aski jaqïtapat katuqanixa, aski jaqin katuqañap katuqarakini." 
Matthew10:42 Khititix aka jisk'anakat maynirukis nayar arkatap layku mä juk'a ch'uch'u umaksa waxt'anixa, chiqpachapuniw sapxsma, ukham luratapat churäwip katuqapuniniwa”." 
Matthew11:1 Kunapachatix Jesusax tunka payan yatiqirinakapar iwxt'añ tukuyxän ukkhasti, jak'ankkis uka markanakaruw Diosan arunakap yatichir sarxäna." 
Matthew11:2 Bautisir Juanasti, kuntix Jesusax lurkatayna ukanak carcelan yatitayna. Ukat pani arkirinakaparux Jesusar" 
Matthew11:3 jiskt'ir khithäna, jutañapäkän uka Cristox jupäpachati, jan ukax yaqharuch suyañäskaspa uk yatxatiri." 
Matthew11:4 Jesusasti jupanakarux sänwa: “Sarapxam, kuntix ist'apkta, uñjapkarakta uk Bautisir Juanar yatiyapxam." 
Matthew11:5 Juykhunakax uñjxiwa, kayu usutanakas sarnaqxiwa, lepra usuninakax q'umachatäxiwa, uqaranakas ist'xiwa, jiwatanakax jaktxiwa, jan kunaninakarus qhispiyasiñan utjatapax yatiyatäxarakiwa." 
Matthew11:6 ¡Nayat jan pächasirix kusisiñaniwa!” sasa. 
Matthew11:7 Bautisir Juanan khithanakap sarxipansti, Jesusax jaqinakaruw Juanat parläna, akham sasa: “¿Kun uñjiris jumanakax wasarar sarapxtaxa? ¿Thayan unuqiyat suqusar uñjiriti?" 
Matthew11:8 Jan ukax ¿kun uñjirich sarapxtaxa? ¿Mä suma isin isintat jaqir uñjiriti? Jumanakax yatipxtawa, suma isin jaqinakax reyinakan utapankiwa." 
Matthew11:9 Ukhamasti, ¿kun uñjiripunis sarapxtaxa? ¿Mä profetaruti? Jïsa, jupax mä profetatsa juk'ampiwa." 
Matthew11:10 Bautisir Juanatsti, Qillqatax akham siwa: “ ‘Akaxay nayax juman nayraqatam khithaxar khitta, jumatak mä thakhi wakichañapataki’ sasa." 
Matthew11:11 Qhanak sapxsma, jaqinak taypinxa, janiw maynis Juanat sipan juk'amp jilankirix utjkiti; ukampisa Diosan qhapaq markapan jisk'äki ukax, Juanat sipan jilankiwa." 
Matthew11:12 “Bautisiri Juanan jutatapat jichhürkamaxa, Diosan qhapaq markapax wali arknaqataw uñjasi, khitinakatix ch'amampi atipjañ munapki jupanakax uk tukusiyañ munapxi." 
Matthew11:13 Juanan jutañapkamaxa, taqpach profetanakampi, Moisesan kamachinakapampix Diosan qhapaq markapat yatiyapxi;" 
Matthew11:14 jumanakatix uk iyawsañ munapxstaxa, Juanasti jutañapäkän uka Elías profetan lurañap phuqhaski ukawa." 
Matthew11:15 Ist'añ munirix ist'pan. 
Matthew11:16 “Ukhamasti, ¿kunampirak aka jaqinakar uñtasiyästi? Jupanakax kunjämatix wawanakax plazanakan anatañatak qunt'atäsipki ukar uñtatäpxiwa, ukatsti masinakaparuw arnaqapxi, akham sasa:" 
Matthew11:17 ‘Pinkill phust'arapipxsma, jumanakasti janiw thuqhupktati; llakiskañ q'uchunak q'uchurapipxsma, jumanakasti janiw jachapktati’ sasa." 
Matthew11:18 Ukatsti Juanaw juti, jupax janiw manq'kiti, umkarakisa, jumanakasti juparux ‘ñanqha ajayun mantatawa’ sapxtawa." 
Matthew11:19 Ukxarusti jaqin Yuqapaw juti, jupasti manq'iwa, umiwa, jumanakasti juparux ‘ancha manq'iriwa, umirirakiwa, jan wali jaqinakana, Romatak qullqi apthapirin masipawa’ sapxtawa. Ukampis Diosan yatiñ kankañapax luräwinakap tuqiw uñacht'ayasi.”" 
Matthew11:20 Ukapachaw Jesusax, kawkïr markanakantix walja muspharkañanak lurkatayna uka markanakar tuqinuqañ qalltäna, jupanakan Diosar jan kutikipstapxatap layku. Sarakïnwa:" 
Matthew11:21 “¡Corazín marka, jumax llakkañätawa! ¡Betsaida marka, jumax kamachkakïta! Tiro markampina, Sidón markampintix taqi aka muspharkañanakax lurasisapän ukaxa, ukspachaw jupanakax llakisiñ isinakampi isthapita, Diosar kutikipstapxasapäna." 
Matthew11:22 Ukampis nayax sapxsmawa, taripäwi urun jumanakax Tironkirit sipana, Sidonankirit sipan jach'a mutuñ katuqapxäta." 
Matthew11:23 Jumasti Cafarnaúm marka, ¿alaxpachar makhatañti amuyastaxa? ¡Manqhapachar jaquntatäyätawa! Sodoma markantix muspharkañanakax lurasisapänxa, uka markax jichhürkamaw utjaskasapäna." 
Matthew11:24 Ukampis nayax sapxsmawa, taripäwi urun jumanakax Sodomankirinakat sipansa juk'amp t'aqhisiñ katuqapxäta”." 
Matthew11:25 Ukapachaw Jesusax sarakïna: “Yupaychsmaw Awkixa, jumaw alaxpacha, akapacha apnaqtaxa, jumaw yatiñ kankañ wali yatiñan jaqinakat imanttaxa; ukatsti juk'a yatiñan jaqinakaruw uñacht'aytaxa." 
Matthew11:26 Tatay, jumaw ukham muntaxa.”" 
Matthew11:27 “Awkixasti taqi kun churxitu. Janiw khitis Yuqarux uñt'kiti, jan ukasti Awkikiw uñt'i; Awkirusti janirakiw khitis uñt'kiti, jan ukasti Yuqakiw Awkirux uñt'i, khitirutix Yuqax uñt'ayañ munki ukanakampi." 
Matthew11:28 Taqi qarjatanaka, llakimpi atipjatanaka, nayar jutapxam, nayaw samarayapxäma." 
Matthew11:29 Kamachinakaxar jaysapxam, ukatsti nayat yatiqasipxita, nayax llamp'u chuymani, alt'at chuymanïtwa, ukat ajayunakaman samarañap jikxatapxäta." 
Matthew11:30 Kamachinak churapksma uk phuqhañax janiw ch'amäkiti, jan ukasti, jasakiwa.”" 
Matthew12:1 Jesusax khä urunakan yatiqirinakapampiw sábado urun trigo yapunak taypi saraskäna. Yatiqirinakapasti manq'at awtjayasipxäna, ukat trigo puyanak k'ichirasin manq'apxäna." 
Matthew12:2 Fariseonakasti uk uñjasin Jesusaruw sapxäna: —Uñjam, kunatix sábado urun jan lurañäki uk yatiqirinakamax lurasipki —sasa." 
Matthew12:3 Jupasti ukxarux sänwa: ¿Janit jumanakax yatipkta kuntix Davidax masinakapamp manq'at awtjatax lurkatayna ukxa? 
Matthew12:4 Diosan utapar mantasinxa, Diosar luqtat t'ant'anak manq'antapxäna, uka t'ant'a manq'añax janiw juparusa, masinakaparus wakt'känti, jan ukasti sacerdotenakakiw manq'añapäna." 
Matthew12:5 ¿Janirakit jumanakax Moisesan kamachip ullarapkta, sacerdotenakax sábado urun Tatitun utapan irnaqatapampix janiw juchañchasipkiti siski ukxa?" 
Matthew12:6 Nayasti sapxsmawa, akanxa Tatitun utapat sipan juk'amp jilïriw utji." 
Matthew12:7 Jumanakax janiw amuyapktati kuntix aka arunakax sañ munki uka: ‘Nayax jumanakan khuyapt'ayasirïpxañam munta, janiw wilañchanakam munkti’ sasa. Jumanakatix amuyapxasmänxa, janiw jan juchaninakarux juchañchapkasmänti." 
Matthew12:8 Ukhamasti, jaqin Yuqapax sábado urxarux munañaniwa." 
Matthew12:9 Ukawjat sarxasinsti, Jesusax jupanakan sinagogaparuw mantäna." 
Matthew12:10 Ukansti ampar pharsut mä jaqiw ukankaskäna; Jesusar aynacht'ayañatakiw akham sas jiskt'apxäna: —¿Sábado urun mä usutar k'umaraptayañax walikïskiti? —sasa.
