1Corinthians1:28 Diosax jisk'achat jaqiru, akapachan jan yäqat jaqiruw ajllisi khitinakatix yäqatäpki ukanakar aynacht'ayañataki." 
1Corinthians1:29 Ukhamat jan khitis Diosan nayraqatapan jach'achasiskañapataki. 
1Corinthians1:30 Jumanakarusti Dios kipkaw Cristo Jesusampi mayachapxtam, uka kipkarakiw jupax Cristo tuqi jiwasan yatiñ kankañasa, chiqa kankañasa, qullanaptayir kankañasa, qhispit kankañasa tukuyi." 
1Corinthians1:31 Kunjämtix Qillqatax siski ukarjama: “Maynitix jach'achasiñ munchixa, Tatitut jach'achaspan” sasa." 
1Corinthians2:1 Jilatanaka, kunapachatix jumanakar qhispiyasiñ arunak parlir jutkta ukkhaxa, janiw nayax yatiñ kankañampi, jan amuyt'kay arunakampi parlapkäyäsmati." 
1Corinthians2:2 Jumanak taypinkasasti, janiw yaqhanakat yatiñ munkäyätti, jan ukasti cruzan ch'akkatat Jesucristotak yatiñ munäyäta." 
1Corinthians2:3 Jumanak nayraqatansti jan ch'amanjama, axsarañatsa khathatisaw uñstapxäyäsma," 
1Corinthians2:4 ukatsti kunapachatix Diosan arunakap yatiyapksma ukkhaxa, janiw yatiñ arunakampi iyawsayañ munapkäyäsmati, jan ukasti, Ajayun uñacht'ayata, Diosan ch'amapampiw iyawsayapxsma," 
1Corinthians2:5 jumanakan iyawsäwimax janiw jaqinakan yatiñ kankañapxar utt'atäñapäkiti, jan ukasti Diosan ch'amapxar utt'atäñapawa." 
1Corinthians2:6 Iyawsañapan thurt'atäpki ukanak taypinxa, yatiñ kankañ arunakampiw parlapxta. Ukampis janiw akapach yatiñat parlapkti, janirakiw marka apnaqirinakatsa parlapkti, jupanakan munañanïñapax niyaw tukusiski." 
1Corinthians2:7 Jan ukasti, Diosan imantat yatiñ kankañapat parlapxta, jupan imantat amtäwinak wiñaypachat jiwasan kusisiñasatak utjaykän ukat parlapxta." 
1Corinthians2:8 Aksti janiw jichhür akapach apnaqirinakax amuyapkiti, jupanakatix amuyasapän ukax janiw alaxpach Tatiturux cruzar ch'akkatapkasapänti." 
1Corinthians2:9 Kunjämtix Qillqatan siski: “Jupar munirinakatakixa, Diosax jan khitin uñjata, jan khitin ist'ata, jan khitin amtat yänak wakichi” sasa." 
1Corinthians2:10 Taqi akanaksti Diosax Qullan Ajay tuqikiw uñacht'ayistu. Uka Ajayusti taqi kun uñakipi, Diosan jan amuyt'kay amtatanakapamppach uñakipi." 
1Corinthians2:11 ¿Khitirak jaqin chuymapan utjki uk yatispasti? Kawkïr ajayutix chuymapankki ukakiw yatispa. Ukhamarakipï Diosan amtäwipxa, Diosan Ajayupakiw yatixa." 
1Corinthians2:12 Jiwasasti janiw akapachankir ajay katuqktanti, jan ukasti Diosat jutki uka Ajay katuqtan, ukhamat kunanaktix Diosax munasiñapan churkistu uk amuyt'añasataki." 
1Corinthians2:13 Taqi akanakatsti Diosan Ajayupax yatichapkitu uka arunakampiw parlapxta, janiw yatiñanakarjam yatiqapkta uka arunakarjam parlapkti. Ukhamat Dios chuyma jaqinakar ajay yatichäwinakat qhanañchasa." 
1Corinthians2:14 Khititix jan Dios chuymäki ukax, janiw Diosan Ajayupankki uka yänak katuqkiti, jupatakix luqhi kankañäkaspas ukhamawa. Janirakiw amuyt'kisa, taqi ukanakax ajay tuqin taripatäñap wakisitap layku." 
1Corinthians2:15 Ukampis khititix Diosan Ajayupanïki ukax taqi kunsa chiqaparuw amuyi, janiw khitis jupar taripkaspati." 
1Corinthians2:16 Qillqatan siwa: “¿Khitirak Tatitun amuyup uñt'aspasti? ¿Khitirak Tatitur yatichaspasti?” sasa. Ukampis jiwasanakax Criston amuyupanïpxtanwa. 
1Corinthians3:1 Jilatanaka, nayasti janiw jumanakar ajay tuqin ch'aman jaqinakarjam parlapksmati, jan ukasti, pisi ch'aman jaqinakarjamakiw parlapxsma, Cristonkir asu wawanakäpkasmas ukhama." 
1Corinthians3:2 Jumanakarux jasa yatichäwik yatichapxsma, kunjämtix mä asu wawarux lecheki manq'a lanti churatäki ukhama, jumanakax janïraw ch'ama yatichäwinak katuqirjamäpkäyätati. ¡Jichhas janïraw katuqirjamäpktati," 
1Corinthians3:3 jan ch'amanïpxatam layku! Jumanak taypin uñisisiñanaka, ch'axwañanak utjaskipansti, jan ch'amanïpxatam laykux jaqinakan amtäwiparjamakiw sarnaqasipktaxa." 
1Corinthians3:4 Kunapachatix maynix arsusi: “Nayax Pablonktwa”, maynisti: “Nayax Apolosanktwa” sasaxa, jupanakax jaqinakan amtäwiparjamakiw arsusipki." 
1Corinthians3:5 May sipansti, ¿khitirak Pablosti? ¿Khitirak Apolosti? Jupanakax irnaqirinakakïpxiwa, jupanak tuqiw jumanakax Tatitur iyawsapxta. Jiwasanakat sapa mayniw kuntix Tatitux luram siski uk luri:" 
1Corinthians3:6 nayaw yapuchta, Apolosti umampiw qarpxati, ukampis Diosaw uka yapuchatarux jiltayi." 
1Corinthians3:7 Ukhamasti yapuchirisa, qarpiris janiw kunäkiti, jan ukasti, Diosaw taqi kunan jilankixa, jupaw yapuchatar jilayirixa." 
1Corinthians3:8 Yapuchirinakasa, qarpirinakas kipkakïpxiwa, sapa maynirus Diosaw luräwipatjam churani." 
1Corinthians3:9 Jiwasanakax Diosan luräwipan irnaqir masinakapäpxtanwa, jumanakasti yapuchat yapunakäpxtawa, Diosan utachat utäpxaraktawa." 
1Corinthians3:10 Nayaw uta lurir jaqïtxa, nayaruw Diosax munasiñapan uta qalltañatak uchitu, ukatsti yaqhaw ukxarux pirqa sayt'ayaski. Ukampis sapa mayniw kunjämtix uka uta pirqa luraski uk amuyasiñapa," 
1Corinthians3:11 janiw khitis uta qallta uchatarux yaqha qalltxa uchkaspati, nayrïr uta qallta uchatäki ukax Jesucristowa." 
1Corinthians3:12 Uta qalltatxarusti, maynix qurimpi, qullqimpi, suma qalanakampi, lawampi, jichhumpi, suqusampi, taqi ukanakampiw utachaspa;" 
1Corinthians3:13 ukampis sapa maynin luräwipax taripañ urun qhanpach uñstani; uka urux ninampiw jutani, ukatsti ninax sapa maynin luratap yant'ani." 
1Corinthians3:14 Maynin luräwipatix suma luratächixa, payllap katuqani;" 
1Corinthians3:15 ukampis luratapatix nakhantanixa, luratap q'al apt'asini, jupax ninatsa jaltkaspa ukham qhispkan ukasa." 
1Corinthians3:16 ¿Janit jumanakasti Diosan utapäpxatam yatipktasti? ¿Janit jumanakasti Diosan Ajayupan jumanakan jakatap yatipktasti? 
1Corinthians3:17 Maynitix Diosan utap t'unthapinixa, Diosax jupar t'unthapirakiniwa, Diosan utapax qullanawa, uka utasti jumanak pachpäpxtawa." 
1Corinthians3:18 Janiy khitis jupapach sallqjaspati: maynitix jumanak taypin akapach yatiñ kankañaparjam yatiñan tukchixa, jan kun yatirjamak tukpan, ukhamat chiqpach yatiñan tukuñapataki." 
1Corinthians3:19 Akapach yatiñ kankañasti Diosatakix luqhi kankañawa. Qillqatax siwa: “Diosax yatiñaninakarux pachpa sallqa yatiñapampiw katunti” sasa. 
1Corinthians3:20 Ukatsti sarakiwa: “Yatiñaninakan amuyunakapan luqhi kankañätap Tatitux yatiwa” sasa. 
1Corinthians3:21 Ukat jan khitis jaqin luratanakapat jach'a jach'ax tukuñapäkiti; taqi kunas jumanakankaskiwa: 
1Corinthians3:22 Pablo, Apolo, Pedro, akapacha, jakaña, jiwaña, jichhüru, jutir urunaka; taqi kunaw jumanakanki," 
1Corinthians3:23 jumanakasti Cristonkapxtawa, Cristosti Diosankiwa." 
1Corinthians4:1 Jumanakasti nanakarux Criston yanapiripjamak uñjapxañama, Diosan jan amuyt'kay amtäwinakap yatichañataki." 
1Corinthians4:2 Jichhasti walikiwa, khititix lurañ katuqki ukax askïtap uñacht'ayañapa." 
1Corinthians4:3 Nayasti, jumanakan taripatäñata, jilïrinakan taripatäñatsa janiw llakiskti. Janirakiw naya pachpas juchañchaskti." 
1Corinthians4:4 Chuymaxan janiw kunas nayar juchañchirix utjkiti, ukax janiw sañ munkiti nayan jan juchanïtaxa. Khititix taripkitani ukax Tatituwa." 
1Corinthians4:5 Ukhamasti, jumanakax jan kunatsa mäkix taripapxamti; Tatitun jutañap suyt'apxam, jupaw ch'amakankki uk qhanar apsuni, chuyman amtäwinakapsa qhanstayarakini. Ukatsti Diosaw sapaqat maynirux luräwipatjam jach'achaskani." 
1Corinthians4:6 Jilatanaka, akanaksti jumanakan askimatakiw parlapxsma, Apolosampita naya pachpampit amuyt'ayasa. Nanakat yatiqasis kunatix qillqatäki ukat jumanakan jan saranukuñamatakiw sapxsma, ukhamat maynir munatap laykux jan khitis jach'achasiskañapataki, maynir jan walt'ayasa." 
1Corinthians4:7 Ukampis, ¿khitirak jumarusti mayninakat sipan juk'ampi sum churtamsti? ¿Kunatix utjktam uksti, janit Diosasti churktamsti? Jupatix churstam ukasti, ¿kunatarak jach'a jach'a tukta jumas jikxataskasma ukhamsti?" 
1Corinthians4:8 Jumanakax amuyatax niy qamirïxapxtawa, munatamarjamax taqi kunanïxapxtawa, reyinakjam tukusax janiw nanakar munkxapxistati. ¡Añchakit chiqpach reyinakäpxasma, ukhamat nanakan jumanakampi chik markamankapxañaxataki!" 
1Corinthians4:9 Nayan amuyataxat Diosax nanak apostolunakarux qhiparjamakiw uchapxitu, jiwañatak juchañchat jaqinakjamäpxtwa. Angelanakansa, taqi jaqinakansa, uñch'ukitäñatakiw tukupxta." 
1Corinthians4:10 Cristor iyawsapxatax laykux luqhinakarjamaw jaqinakax uñjapxitu; ukatsipana, jumanakarux Cristo laykux ch'ikhinakarjamaw jaqinakax uñjapxtam. Nanakax pisi ch'amanïpxtwa, ukampis jumanakax wali ch'amanïpxtawa. Nanakarux jisk'achapxituwa, jumanakarusti yäqapxtamwa." 
1Corinthians4:11 Jichhürkamas manq'at awtjata, umat pharjata, isit jalstataw sarnaqapxta; jaqis uñisipxituwa, janiw utanïpkaraktsa," 
1Corinthians4:12 ukatsti qariñkamaw amparanakaxampi irnaqapxta. Ñanqhachirinakarux sumampiw kutiyapxta; arknaqataw uñjasipxta, uksti amukiw mutupxta." 
1Corinthians4:13 Nanakxat jan walinak parlapxi, ukampis llamp'u chuymampiw nanakax kunsa amuyt'ayapxarakta. Mä t'unarjamaw uñjapxitu, jan kunatak aski jaqirjamaw uñjapxitu. Jichhürkamas taqi jaqinakat sipansa wali jisk'achatäpxaraktwa." 
1Corinthians4:14 Aksti janiw jumanakar p'inqachañatak qillqanipksmati, jan ukasti wawanakaxarjam amuyt'ayañatakiw qillqanipxsma, jumanakarux wal munasipxsma." 
1Corinthians4:15 Jumanakax Cristor iyawsirjamax tunka waranqa yatichirinïsipkamsa, janiw walja awkinïpktati. Nayakiw jumanakan awkimätxa, nayaw jumanakarux Diosan suma yatiyäwi arunakap parlapxsma, uka tuqiw jumanakax Cristo Jesusamp mayakïpxtaxa." 
1Corinthians4:16 Ukhamasti, nayat yatiqasis sarnaqapxañamatakiw achikt'apxsma." 
1Corinthians4:17 Ukat Timoteorux khithanipxsma. Jupax Tatitunkir munat aski wawaxawa. Jupaw Cristo Jesusampi sarnaqäwixat amtayapxätam, kunjämtix taqi chiqansa iglesianakan yatichkta ukarjama." 
1Corinthians4:18 Jumanakat yaqhipanakax jach'a jach'aw tukupxi; janis jumanakar uñjir purinkirista ukham amuyapxaraki; 
1Corinthians4:19 ukampisa, Tatitun munañapächi ukaxa, jank'akiw jumanakar tumpt'ir jutä. Ukkhapï uñjäxa kuntix uka jach'a jach'a tukur jaqinakax lurapkani ukxa, janiw parlapki ukakxa." 
1Corinthians4:20 Diosampi jakañax janiw lakakïñapäkiti, jan ukasti, luräwimpi uñacht'ayañarakiwa." 
1Corinthians4:21 ¿Kunsa jichhax jumanakax jutkä ukkhax munapxta? Purinisinxa, ¿mutuyapxämati, jan ukax, munasiñampi, suma chuymamp tumpt'ayasiñcha munapxtaxa?" 
1Corinthians5:1 Jumanakat maynix awkipan qhipa warmipampi sarnaqatapaw yatisi. Ukham sarnaqañax janipuniw akch'as walïkiti, janiw Diosar jan uñt'ir jaqinak taypinsa ukham sarnaqirix utjkiti." 
1Corinthians5:2 ¡Ukhamäkasinsa jumanakax jach'achasisipkaktawa! ¡Ukhamïpansti llakitäsipkañamawa! Ukham sarnaqir jaqix jumanak taypit alisnukutäñapawa. 
1Corinthians5:3 Nayax janis jumanak taypinkstxa, ajayun jumanakampi chikäsktwa; nayasti jumanak taypin jikxataskirista ukhamaw uka jan wali sarnaqir jaqirux juchañchta." 
1Corinthians5:4 Kunapachatix jumanakax tantachasipkät ukkhaxa, nayax ajayun jumanakampi chikäskä, Tatit Jesusan ch'amapas jumanakampi chikäskarakini. Ukhamasti Jesús Tatitusan sutipxaruw" 
1Corinthians5:5 uka jaqix Supayar katuyatäñapa, ukhamat janchipan tukjatäñapataki, ajayupasti Tatitux jutkan ukkharaki qhispiyatäñapataki." 
1Corinthians5:6 Jumanakasti janiw kunat jach'achasiñamas utjkiti. Aka säwi yatipxtawa: “Mä juk'a levadurax taqpach t'ant'a masaruw puqtayi” sasa. 
1Corinthians5:7 Ukhamasti jumanakar jan walt'ayir nayra levadura jaqtapxam, ukhamat machaq masat lurat t'ant'aru uñtatäpxañamataki. Chiqpachansa jumanakax Pascua urunakan manq'añäkis uka jan levaduran t'ant'jamäpxtawa. Cristow jiwasan Pascua Corderosaxa, jupax jiwasanak laykuw jiwawayi." 
1Corinthians5:8 Ukhamasti jiwasax jan levaduran t'ant'ampiw Pascua uruyañasa, ukaw chiqapaxa, janiw nayra levadurampi janirakiw jan walinak lurañampis uruyañasäkiti." 
1Corinthians5:9 Apayanipksma uka maynïr qillqataxan sapxsmawa: “Wachuq jucha luririnakampix jan chikachasipxamti” sasa. 
1Corinthians5:10 Ukampix janiw sapkäyäsmati akapachan wachuq jucha luririnakata, mich'anakata, lunthatanakata, yaqha diosar yupaychirinakat jan mayampitak jithiqtapxam sasaxa, ukhamäspa ukkhax, jumanakan aka uraqit mistxapxañamaw wakisispa." 
1Corinthians5:11 Jan ukasti, sapxäyäsmawa: Cristor iyawsirïkasin wachuq juchan sarnaqaski, mich'asiski, yaqha diosar yupaychaski, ñanqhachaski, machaski, lunthatasiski ukanakampix jan chikachasipxamti, sasa. Ukham jaqinakampix janipun manq'apxamsa." 
1Corinthians5:12 Janiw nayarux anqäxankirinakar juchañchañax wakt'kituti; Diosaw jupanakarux juchañchaskani. Ukampis jumanakax iglesiankirinakarux juchañchapxañamawa. Ukatpï uka juch luririrux jumanak taypit alisnukupxam sapxsmaxa. 
1Corinthians5:13  
1Corinthians6:1 Kunapachatix jumanak taypit maynix yaqhampi ch'axwankchixa, ¿kamisarak Cristor jan uñt'ir taripirinakar yatiyasir saranisti?, ¿kunatarak Diosan qullan markapankirinakar jan yatiyasisti?" 
1Corinthians6:2 ¿Janit jumanakasti yatipkta Diosan qullan markapankirinakan akapachar taripañapsti? Akapachar taripañatix jumanakar wakt'apxätam ukaxa, ¿janit uka jisk'a ch'axwanakamsti uñjapkasmasti?" 
1Corinthians6:3 ¿Janit yatipkta, jiwasanakax angelanakamppachar taripkañän uksti? ¡Ukhamächi ukasti juk'amp sum jiwasan ch'axwanakas uñjañasaxa!" 
1Corinthians6:4 Ukhamasti, jakäwiman ch'axwanakatix utjchixa, ¿kamisarak jan iglesiankirïpki uka jaqinakar ch'axwanak uñjapxañapatak uchapxtasti?" 
1Corinthians6:5 Aksti jumanakar p'inqachañatakiw sista: ¿Janit jumanak taypin utjki mayni amuyt'anisti, uka ch'axwañanak jilatanakap taypin uñjañatakisti?" 
1Corinthians6:6 ¡Janiw jilatanak purak ch'axwapkiti, jan ukasti Cristor jan uñt'ir taripirinakaruw ch'axwanakap yatiyanipxi!" 
1Corinthians6:7 Jumanak taypin ch'axwañanak utjatapax janipuniw akch'as walïkiti. ¿Kunatarak chiqapar jan uñjatasti amuk jan mutupxtasti? ¿Janit walïkaspa lunthatayasiñasti? 
1Corinthians6:8 ¡Ukatsipana jumanakax janiw chiqapar lurapkaraktati, pachpa jilanakamat lunthatasipkaktawa!" 
1Corinthians6:9 ¿Janit yatipkta chiqapar jan uñjirinakan alaxpachar jan mantañapxa? Janiy sallqjayasipxamti, wachuq juchan sarnaqirinakax, janiw Diosan markapar mantapkaniti, janirakiw yaqha diosar yupaychirinakasa, wachuq jucha luririnakasa, q'iwsanakasa, chacha pura, jan ukax warmi pura q'añusirinakasa, lunthatanakasa, mich'anakasa, machirinakasa, ñanqhachirinakasa, lunthatanakas mantapkaniti." 
1Corinthians6:10  
1Corinthians6:11 Jumanakat yaqhipanakax ukhamäpxarakïyätawa; ukampis jichhax q'umachatäxapxtawa, jumanakax Tatit Jesucriston sutipxaru, Diosasan Qullan Ajayup tuqiw qullana, aski jaqinakarus tukuyatäpxarakta." 
1Corinthians6:12 Mayninakax sapxiwa: “Nayax kuntix munkta uk luraskakiristwa” sasa. Ukax chiqakïskiwa, ukampis janiw taqi kun lurañas askïkarakiti. Jïsa, nayax taqi kunsa lurakiristwa, ukampis nayax janiw kunampis apnaqayasiñaxäkiti." 
1Corinthians6:13 Sapxarakiwa: “Manq'ax purakatakiwa, purakasti manq'atakirakiwa” sasa. Ukax chiqakïskiwa, ukampis Diosaw paypach tukjani. Ukatsipana, janchix janiw wachuq jucha lurañatakïkiti, jan ukasti, Tatitutakiwa, Tatitusti janchitakirakiwa." 
1Corinthians6:14 Kunjämtix Diosax Cristo Tatitur jaktaykixa, ukhamarakiw jiwasarux ch'amapampi jaktayistani." 
1Corinthians6:15 ¿Janit yatipkta, janchinakamax Cristonkatapsti? ¿Criston janchipat apaqasin wachuq juchan sarnaqir warmirux churarakiristti? ¡Janiw ukhamäkaspati!" 
1Corinthians6:16 ¿Janit jumanakax yatipkta kunapachatix mä chachax wachuq juchan sarnaqir warmimpi mayachaski ukkhaxa, mä sapa janchik tukxapxatapsti? Qillqatan siwa: “Panpachanix mä sapa janchikiw tukxapxi” sasa." 
1Corinthians6:17 Ukampisa, kunapachatix maynix Tatitur katuyasxi ukkhaxa, ajay tuqin Tatitumpix mayakïxiwa." 
1Corinthians6:18 Ukhamasti, wachuq jucha lurañat jithiqtapxam. Kuna yaqha juchsay mä jaqix luraskpan, janiw janchiparux ñanqhachkiti; ukampis wachuq jucha lurañar katuyasirixa, pachpa janchipatakiw juchachasi." 
1Corinthians6:19 ¿Janit yatipktasti jumanakan janchimax Diosan churata uka Qullan Ajayun utapätapsti, Qullan Ajayus jumanakan jakatapsa? Jumanakax janiw jumanakpachat munañanïpktati," 
1Corinthians6:20 Diosaw jumanakarux alasipxtam. Ukat jumanakax janchiman Diosarux waqaychapxañama. 
1Corinthians7:1 Jichhasti kuntix qillqanipkista uka jiskt'anakaruw arusxatañ munta. Walïspawa jan jaqichasiñaxa; 
1Corinthians7:2 ukampis wachuq jucha lurañ utjatap laykux, sapa mayni chachaw warminïñapa, sapa mayni warmirakiw chachanïñapa." 
1Corinthians7:3 Chachax warmipatak taqi luräwinakap phuqhañapa, warmisa chachapatakix taqi luräwinakap phuqhañaparaki." 
1Corinthians7:4 Janiw warmix janchipat munañanïkxiti, jan ukasti janchipax chachapankxiwa, janirakiw chachas janchipat munañanïkxiti, jan ukasti janchipax warmipankxiwa." 
1Corinthians7:5 Ukalayku, jan jumanak purax “janiw” sasipxamti, wakischi ukax arust'asipxam mä juk'a pacha jan jak'asiñataki, uka urunakan Diosat mayisiñataki. Uka qhipatsti wakisiw mayachasipxañama; inampis maynix janchipar jan atipirjamäsax, Supayax juchar puriychispa." 
1Corinthians7:6 Aksti mä iwxäkaspas ukhamak sapxsma, janiw kamachi arükiti." 
1Corinthians7:7 Nayax taqinis nayjamäpxañam munirista; ukampis Diosax sapa mayniruw kunayman churäwinak churi, maynirux mayja, mayninakarusti mayjaraki." 
1Corinthians7:8 Sapa waynanakampiru, ijmanakampirux saraktwa, walïspawa jan jaqichasisaki nayjam sarnaqapxañapa." 
1Corinthians7:9 Ukampis janchin munañapar jan atipirjamäsax jaqichasipxpan. Jaqichasiñasti askiwa, janchin munañapampi atipjayasiñat sipana." 
1Corinthians7:10 Ukampis khitinakatix jaqichatäxapxi ukanakarux sistwa, warmix chachapar jan apanukpati. Ukasti janiw nayan aruxäkiti, jan ukasti Tatitun arupawa." 
1Corinthians7:11 Jichhasti walikiwa, warmitix chachapar apanukchixa, sapakiw jakxañapa, jan ukax pachpa chachapampiw sumankthapxañapa. Uka kipkaraki, chachax janiw warmipampix jaljtañapäkiti." 
1Corinthians7:12 Mayninakarusti nayaw sista, janiw Tatitux siskiti, mayni jilatatix Cristor jan iyawsir warmimpi jaqichatächixa, warmisti uka chachapampi jakañatak amtaschixa, uka jilatax janiw uka warmimpix jaljtañapäkiti." 
1Corinthians7:13 Cristor iyawsir warmitix Cristor jan iyawsir chachampi jaqichatächixa, ukat chachatix uka warmimpi jakañatak amtaschixa, janiw jupampix jaljtañapäkiti." 
1Corinthians7:14 Cristor jan iyawsir chachaxa, Cristor iyawsir warmimpïxatap laykux, Diosan katuqatäxiwa; Cristor jan iyawsir warmisti Cristor iyawsir chachampïxatap laykux, Diosan katuqatäxarakiwa. Jan ukhamäkaspa ukasti, wawanakamax juchararäpxaspawa; ukampis jupanakax qullan markankirïxapxiwa." 
1Corinthians7:15 Jichhasti, Cristor jan iyawsir chachampi warmimpitix jaljtañ munchixa, jaljtasipkpan. Ukhamïpansti jilatas kullakas sapar tukt'atakïxapxtawa, Diosaw jumanakarux sumankañ jakäwir jawsapxtam." 
1Corinthians7:16 Cristor iyawsir warmi, ¿kunjämatarak chachamar qhispiyasma uk yattasti? Cristor iyawsir chacha, ¿kunjämatarak Cristor jan iyawsir warmimar qhispiyasma uk yattasti?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Kunjämäskpansaya, sapa mayniw Tatitun churäwinakaparjam jakañapa, kunjämtix Diosax jupar jawski ukhamarakïñapawa. Nayax aka yatichäwi taqi iglesianakar churta." 
1Corinthians7:18 Diosatix mayniru, circuncisión katuqirir jawschi ukaxa, uka circuncisión katuqatap jan imt'pati; circuncisión jan katuqirirutix jawschi ukaxa, janiw circuncisión katuqañapax wakiskiti." 
1Corinthians7:19 Circuncisión katuqañas jan katuqañas janiw kunäkisa, jan ukasti Diosan arunakapar jaysañaw askixa." 
1Corinthians7:20 Sapa mayniw kunjämtix Diosax jawsapktam ukhamakïsipkañama. 
1Corinthians7:21 T'aqhisiyatäkäyat ukkhatix jawstamxa, jan llakisimti; qhispit sarnaqasiñatix jikxatañjamäxchi ukkhax, jan pis chuymt'amti." 
1Corinthians7:22 Khititix t'aqhisiyatäkasin iyawsañar jawsatäxchi ukax, jichhax jupax Diosar luqtirïxiwa; khititix antutatäkasin jawsatächi ukax, jichhax Criston uywatapäxiwa." 
1Corinthians7:23 Diosaw jumanakarux alasipxtam; janiy yaqha jaqinakan uywataparux tukupxamti. 
1Corinthians7:24 Ukhamasti jilatanaka, sapa maynis kunjämtix Diosax jawsapkäyätam ukhamak nayraqatapan sarnaqapxam." 
1Corinthians7:25 Jan jaqichasit warminakatakisti, janiw Tatitun wakiskir arupax utjkituti; ukampis nayan amuyuxat sista, Tatitun khuyapayasiñapan nayax askïkta ukarjama." 
1Corinthians7:26 Nayatakix askïspawa, sapa maynix kunjämäkitix ukhamak qhiparañapa, jan walt'añ urunakan jakatas layku." 
1Corinthians7:27 Jumatix warminïstaxa, jan apanukumti; jan warminïksta ukasti, jan warm thaqhamti." 
1Corinthians7:28 Jaqichasisasti janiw juch lurktati; mä tawaqun jaqichasitapas janirakiw juchäkiti. Ukampis jaqichasirinakatakix janchi kankañapan llakisiñanakaw utjani, nayasti ukanakar jan purisipkañam munirista." 
1Corinthians7:29 Jilatanaka, nayax akham sañ munta: Juk'a pachakiw utjxistu. Ukalayku, warmin chachanaka, chachan warminaka, janis jaqichasitäpkasma ukhamaw jakapxañama;" 
1Corinthians7:30 llakitanakax, kusisitäpkasmas ukhamakiw sarnaqapxañama, kusisiñankirinakasti, llakitäpkasmas ukhamakiw sarnaqapxañama; alasirinakax, janis kunas jumankkaspa ukhamakiw jakapxañama;" 
1Corinthians7:31 akapachan kuna aski jikxatirinakas, janis kunsa jikxatapkaspa ukhamakiw tukupxañapa, aka uraqin niy tukusiskatap layku." 
1Corinthians7:32 Nayax jumanakan llakinakam apaqañ munirista. Kunapachatix maynix sapakïski ukax Tatitun yänakapata, ukhamarak jupar kusisiyañampit llakisi;" 
1Corinthians7:33 ukampis warmin chachasti akapach yänakat llakisi, warmipar kusisiñ churañampit llakisiraki," 
1Corinthians7:34 ukhamat chuymapax payanki. Ukhamarakiw jan chachan warmisa, sapa tawaqus Tatitun yänakapat llakisi, janchinsa, ajayunsa qullanäpxañapataki; ukampis chachan warmix akapach yänakatak llakisi, chachapar kusisiyañampit llakisiraki." 
1Corinthians7:35 Aksti jumanakan askimatakiw sapxsma, janiw jumanakar jark'añ laykuti, jan ukasti, Tatitur taqi chuyma luqtas jaqjam jakapxañamataki." 
1Corinthians7:36 Ukampis maynitix parlatapampi jaqichasiñapax niyäxatap amuychixa, maranaksa phuqxarakchi ukaxa, jaqichasiskakpan kunjämaruy amuychi ukhamarjama, ukasti janiw juchäkiti." 
1Corinthians7:37 Ukampis maynitix chuymapan jan jaqichasiñ amtkchixa, uka amtapax walikïskiwa." 
1Corinthians7:38 Ukhamasti, parlatapampitix jaqichasinixa, walik luraski; janitix jaqichaskan ukkhasti, juk'amp sum luri." 
1Corinthians7:39 Chachan warmix chachapan jakañapkamax chachapamp jakañapawa; chachap jiwxatatsti, jupax khitimpitix munki ukampix jaqichasiskaspawa, iyawsirik Cristor iyawsirïpaxa." 
1Corinthians7:40 Amuyuxarjamax, janitix wasitat jaqichaskaspa ukaxa, juk'amp kusisitaw sarnaqasispa. Uksti, Diosan Ajayupan chuymaxankatapat arsta." 
1Corinthians8:1 Jichhasti yaqha diosanakar luqtat manq'anakat parlapxäma. Chiqpachansa sistanwa: taqiniw chiqpach yatiñ kankañanïtan; ukampis uka yatiñ kankañax jach'a jach'a tukuyi, munasiñasti Diosan markaparux jiltayiwa." 
1Corinthians8:2 Maynitix kunsa yatitap amuyaschixa, janïraw yatkiti kunjämtix yatiñapäki ukxa." 
1Corinthians8:3 Ukampis maynitix Diosar munchixa, Diosax juparux uñt'iwa." 
1Corinthians8:4 Yaqha diosanakar luqtat manq'anak manq'añxatxa, niy yattanwa, jaqin lurat diosax akapachan janiw kunäkisa, mä sapa Diosakiw utji." 
1Corinthians8:5 Alaxpachansa, akapachansa, munañan yaqha diosanakas utjaskpan," 
1Corinthians8:6 jiwasanakatakix mä sapa Dios Awkikiw utji, uka Dios Awkimpiw taqi kunas qallti, jupatakikiw jiwasanakax jakapxtan. Mä sapa Tatitukiw utjaraki, jupasti Jesucristowa, jupïpan taqi kunas utji, jiwasanakas utjaraktan." 
1Corinthians8:7 Ukampis janiw taqin chiqa kankañat yatipkiti. Yaqhipanakax yaqha diosanakar yupaychañ yatitäpkän ukanakaxa, uka manq'anakat manq'asipkakiwa, diosanakar luqtatätap amuyasina; ajay tuqin t'ukhätap laykusti, chuymanakapan juchanjamaw amuyasipxi." 
1Corinthians8:8 Chiqpachansa kuntix manq'ktan ukax janiw Diosat jayarst'aykistuti; janiw manq'asati askïkañänixa, janirakiw jan manq'asas jan askïkañänitixa." 
1Corinthians8:9 Ukampis jumanakax amuyasipxam, ukham luratamampiw iyawsäwin pisïpki ukanakarux juchar puriyapxasma." 
1Corinthians8:10 Ukhamasti jumatix ukanak yatkasina, yaqha diosanakar luqtañ chiqan qunt'asis manq'äta, ukatsti pisi iyawsañan jilatatix uñjätam ukaxa, uka jilatax uka yaqha diosar luqtat manq'a manq'arakispawa." 
1Corinthians8:11 Ukhamat jumax yatitamampix pisi iyawsañan jilamarux apt'asma, Cristox uka jilat laykuw jiwarakïnxa." 
1Corinthians8:12 Pisi iyawsañan jilatanakar ñanqhachasasti, jumanakax Cristo pachparuw ñanqhachapxtaxa." 
1Corinthians8:13 Ukalayku, manq'ataxämpitix jilaxar juchar puriystxa, janiw aycha manq'añaxax wakiskxiti, juchar jan lanktayaskañataki." 
1Corinthians9:1 Nayax qhispiyat jaqïtwa, apóstol kankañanirakïtwa, uksti janiw jumanakax imt'apkitasmati, Tatit Jesusaruw uñjta, jumanakasti Tatitutak irnaqäwixan achupäpxtawa." 
1Corinthians9:2 Mayninakatakix inas nayax jan apostolüksti; ukampis jumanakatakix apostolütwa, jumanakan Tatitunkapxatamaw nayan apóstol kankañax uñachayi." 
1Corinthians9:3 Nayar jisk'achirinakatakix akham arsusta: 
1Corinthians9:4 Nanakan wakisiw manq'ampi, umampi katuqañaxa," 
1Corinthians9:5 ukhamaraki Cristor iyawsir esposa nayamp chika irpañatakisa, kunjämtix maynïr apostolunakasa, Tatitun jilanakapasa, Pedros lurki ukhama." 
1Corinthians9:6 Jan ukax ¿Bernabeampi nayampikich jakañatak irnaqañaxax wakisixa? 
1Corinthians9:7 Ejercitonxa, janiw mä soldadox ukankatapat pachpa qullqip irsuskiti. Uva yapuchirinakasti, uva achunakapat manq'apxi. Ovejanak awatirinakasti, ch'awaqapki uka leche umapxi." 
1Corinthians9:8 Aka arunakax janiw nayan arunakaxakïkiti, jan ukasti, Tatitun arunakapaw ukham yatichi." 
1Corinthians9:9 Moisesan qillqatapansti siwa: “Trigo takir vacarux ñukumpix jan uskuntapxamti” sasa. Diosax janiw vacanakat llakisisakix uk siskiti," 
1Corinthians9:10 jan ukasti, jupax jiwasanakat llakisi. Kamachix jiwasanak layku qillqatawa, uraq qhullirisa, trigo jawq'suris jupar wakt'ki uk katuqañ suyas irnaqañapawa." 
1Corinthians9:11 Ukhamasti, nanakatix jumanakan chuymamar ajay jatha phawantapxsta ukasti, jumanakat janchi tuqin yänak katuqañax wakisiwa." 
1Corinthians9:12 Mayninakatix jumanakat ukham katuqchixa, nanakatakix ukat juk'ampi katuqañaw wakisi. Ukampis janiw nanakax taqi ukat arsusipkti, Diosan suma yatiyäwi arunakap qhanañchañ jan jark'atäñap laykux amukiw mutupxta." 
1Corinthians9:13 Jumanakax yatipxtawa, khitinakatix Tatitun utapan irnaqapki ukanakaxa, Tatitun utapat jakapxi. Ukampix sañ munta, khitinakatix altaran wilañchanak luqtapki jupanakax luqtat uywanakan aychap manq'apxi." 
1Corinthians9:14 Uka kipkarakiw Tatitux sawayi, khitinakatix Diosan suma yatiyäwi arunakap qhanañchapki ukanakax, uka pachpa irnaqäwit jakapxpan sasa." 
1Corinthians9:15 Ukampis janipuniw nayax kun katuqañatakis maykti, janirakiw mä kun nayar churapxañamatakis qillqanipksmati. Ukham lurkpachaxa, askïspaw nayan jiwxañaxaxa. ¡Janiw khitis uka kusisiñ apaqkitaspati!" 
1Corinthians9:16 Nayatakix Diosan suma yatiyäwi arup qhanañchañax janiw kuna jach'achasiñäkisa, uka qhanañchañan wakisipunitap amuyta. ¡Kunakïkan nayatakixa, Diosan arunakap jan qhanañchkirista ukaxa!" 
1Corinthians9:17 Nayatix amtañaxampik lurirista ukaxa, luräwixat katuqañax wakisispawa; ukampis nayatix jariyatat lurirista ukasti, kuntix Diosax siskitu uk phuqhañ laykuw lurirista." 
1Corinthians9:18 Ukhamïpansti, nayar kusisiyir waxt'äwix Diosan suma yatiyäwip jan kun mayis qhanañchañawa; ukampix sañ munta, Diosan suma yatiyäwi arup qhanañchatat janiw kunsa katuqañatak maykti." 
1Corinthians9:19 Nayax jan khitin uywatapäkasas taqinin uywataparuw tukta, Cristotak walja jaqinakar jikxatañ layku." 
1Corinthians9:20 Kunapachatix nayax judionak taypinkkäyat ukkhaxa, Cristor iyawsapxañapatakix judío jaqjamaw tukta; ukampix sañ munta, Moisesan kamachiparjam sarnaqirinakan Cristor iyawsapxañapatakix naya pachpaw uka kamachirjam sarnaqta, chiqpachansa janiw nayax uka kamachin apnaqatäkti." 
1Corinthians9:21 Mä tuqitsti, khitinakatix Moisesan kamachiparjam jan sarnaqapki ukanakan Cristor iyawsapxañapatakix jupanakjamaw nayax tukta, chiqpachansa nayax Diosan kamachiparjamaw sarnaqta, Criston kamachiparjam niyak sarnaqasaxa." 
1Corinthians9:22 Kunapachatix pisi iyawsañan jilatanakampi chikäkäyät ukkhaxa, jupanakjamarakiw tukta, jupanakan Cristor iyawsapxañapataki. Mä arunxa, jupanakjamaw tukta, ukhamat mä qawqhanis qhispitäpxañapataki." 
1Corinthians9:23 Diosan suma yatiyäwi arunakap arsuñ laykuw taqi kunsa lurta, ukhamat uka pachpat katuqañaxataki." 
1Corinthians9:24 Jumanakax yatipxtawa, mä atipasïwinxa, taqiniw jalapxi, ukampis maynikiw churäwi katuqi, uka kipkarak jumanakax churäwi katuqañkam jalapxam." 
1Corinthians9:25 Khitinakatix mä anatañan atipt'añatak wakichasipki ukanakax, kunatix jan walt'aykaspa ukanak q'al apanukupxi. Uksti, mä pillu katuqañatakiw lurapxi, ukat ukspachaw uka pillux pharsuwayxi; ukatsipana, jiwasax jan pharsur pillu katuqañ laykuw jaltanxa." 
1Corinthians9:26 Nayasti janiw juykhur uñtat jalkti, janirakiw nuwasiñansa ina ch'usarus ch'akuntkirista ukham nuwaskti." 
1Corinthians9:27 Jan ukasti, janchixarux mutuytwa, ukatsti jaysañapatakiw wayt'arakta, ukhamat yaqhanakar yatichkasin jan apanukutäñataki." 
1Corinthians10:1 Jilatanaka, nayax jumanakan amtapxañam munta: Nayra awkinakasax mä qinayan ch'iwxatataw Mar Rojo sat quta taqpachan makhatapxäna." 
1Corinthians10:2 Ukham tuqiw taqi jupanakax Moisesampi mayachasipxäna, qinay tuqi, quta tuqi bautisatäsina." 
1Corinthians10:3 Uka kipkarakiw jupanakax pachpa ajay t'ant'a manq'apxäna," 
1Corinthians10:4 pachpa ajay uma umapxarakïna. Jupanakax ajay qarqat umapxäna, uka qarqaw jupanakamp chik saräna. Uka qarqasti Cristo Tatitünwa." 
1Corinthians10:5 Ukampis jupanakat waljaniw Diosarux jan kusisiykänti, ukat wasaran jiwarapxäna." 
1Corinthians10:6 Taqi akasti jiwasan amuyt'asiñasatakiw lurasïna, ukhamat jan jiwasanakax jupanakjam jan walinak munapayaskañasataki." 
1Corinthians10:7 Janiy jumanakax yaqha diosanakar yupaychapxamti, kunjämtix jupanakat mä qawqhanix lurapkän ukhama, Qillqatasti siwa: “Jaqix manq'añataki, umañatakiw qunt'asïna, ukatsti thuqhupxarakïnwa” sasa." 
1Corinthians10:8 Jiwasax wachuq q'añu jucharux jan katuyasiñäniti, kunjämtix jupanakat yaqhipanakax katuyasipkän ukhama, ukham luratapatsti mä urukiw pä tunka kimsan waranqa jaqinakax jiwarapxäna." 
1Corinthians10:9 Janirak Tatiturux yant'kañäniti, kunjämtix jupanakat yaqhipanakax lurapkän ukhama, ukham luratapatsti katarinakan achjataw jiwarapxäna." 
1Corinthians10:10 Janirak Diosatakix arusipxamti, kunjämtix jupanakat yaqhipanakax arusipkän ukhama, ukat jiwayir angelax jupanakar jiwarayäna." 
1Corinthians10:11 Taqi akanakaw nayra awkinakasampix lurasitayna, jiwasatak mä uñtasïwïñapataki, ukanakasti, aka urunakan jakapktan ukanakar iwxt'añatak qillqatawa." 
1Corinthians10:12 Ukhamasti maynitix ch'amanjam amuyaschixa, wal amuyaspan, ukatarak tinkuskaspa." 
1Corinthians10:13 Jumanakan janiw kuna yant'as jan atipjkayax utjapktamti. Jumanakasti Diosaruw katuyasipxañama, jupasti janiw jumanakarux jan atipkay yant'anakamp t'aqhisiyapkätamti. Jan ukasti, kunapachatix yant'ax jutkan ukkhaxa, Diosaw jumanakarux kunjämat uka yant'ar atipjañsa yanapt'apxätam, ukhamat atipt'apxäta." 
1Corinthians10:14 Munat jilatanaka, yaqha diosanakar yupaychañat jithiqtapxam." 
1Corinthians10:15 Nayax amuyt'ir jaqinakarjamaw parlapxsma: kuntix sapksma uk jumanak pachpa amuyt'apxam. 
1Corinthians10:16 Kunapachatix Diosar yuspagarasin qullan qirut umktan ukkhaxa, Criston wilapan mayakïtas uñacht'aytan. Kunapachatix t'ant'a pachjtan ukkhasti, Criston janchipan mayakïtas uñacht'ayaraktan." 
1Corinthians10:17 Waljanïpktan ukasa, taqiniw mä sapa t'ant'at manq'apxtan, ukatarak mä sapa janchikïpxtan." 
1Corinthians10:18 Israel markat amuyapxam: Wilañcha luqtat uywanakat manq'irinakaxa, Diosampi, altaran luqtapki ukanakampix mayakïpxiwa." 
1Corinthians10:19 Ukampix janiw sañ munkti, jaqin lurat diosax askïtapa, janirakiw uka diosar luqtat aychas yaqha aychat sipan juk'amp askiw sañ munkti." 
1Corinthians10:20 Nayax sistwa, Diosar jan uñt'irinakax supayanakaruw wilañcha luqtasipki, janiw Diosar luqtapkiti, nayax janiw jumanakan uka ñanqha supayanakamp chikachasipxañam munkti." 
1Corinthians10:21 Janiw Tatitun qirupat umasax supayanakan qirupat umapkasmati; janirakiw Tatitun manq'äwipan manq'kasax supayanakan manq'äwipan manq'apkasmati. 
1Corinthians10:22 Jan ukax ¿Tatituruch q'apisiyañ munasipkaktanxa? ¿Jiwasax Tatitut sipan juk'ampi ch'amanïtanti? 
1Corinthians10:23 Jumanakat yaqhipanakax sapxiwa: “Maynix kuntix munki uk lurakispawa” sasa. Ukax chiqawa, ukampis janiw taqpachapun askïkiti. Jïsa, maynix kuntix munki uk luraspawa, ukampis janiw ukax taqinir ch'amañchkiti." 
1Corinthians10:24 Janiw khitis jupa pachpan askipatakik kunsa thaqhañapäkiti, jan ukasti, mayninakan askipatakiw thaqhañapa." 
1Corinthians10:25 Kunatix aycha qhathun aljañatak uskutäki uk alasisax manq'asipkakim, chuymaman jan mayjt'asiskañapatakix jan kunsa jiskhimti;" 
1Corinthians10:26 taqi akapachasa, kunanakatix ukan utjki ukas Tatitunkiwa." 
1Corinthians10:27 Cristor jan iyawsir jaqitix manq'asir jawsayapxätam, ukat jumanakax sarañ munapxarakït ukaxa, kunanaktix churapkätam uk manq'asipkakim, chuymaman jan mayjt'asiskañapatakisti jan kunsa jiskt'apxamti." 
1Corinthians10:28 Ukampis maynitix sapxätam: “Aka aychax yaqha diosanakar wilañcha luqtatawa” sasaxa, ukhamax jan uk manq'apxamti, uk arsuriru jan mayjt'ayañataki, jumanakas jan mayjt'asisipkañamataki." 
1Corinthians10:29 Uksti maynin chuymapat parlaskta, janiw jumanakan chuymanakamat parlkti. Mayni jaqin chuymap laykusti, janiw nayan munañaxar lurataxat juchañchatäñapäkiti." 
1Corinthians10:30 Diosar yuspagarasatix manq'sta ukax, ¿kunatarak manq'ataxat k'umipxitanisti?" 
1Corinthians10:31 Ukhamasti manq'apxamsa, umapxamsa, jan ukax kunsay lurapxam, Diosar jach'achañatak lurapxam." 
1Corinthians10:32 Jan khitirus lanktayapxamti; judionakarusa, jan judionakarusa, janirak Diosan iglesiapankirinakarus lanktasiyapxamti." 
1Corinthians10:33 Nayasti, taqi kunan taqinir kusisiyañatakiw ch'amachasta, janiw nayan askïñaxak thaqkti, jan ukasti mayninakan askïñap thaqta, ukhamat qhispiyasiñ jikxatapxañapataki." 
1Corinthians11:1 Jumanakax nayat yatiqasis sarnaqapxam, kunjämtix nayax Cristot yatiqasis sarnaqkta ukhama." 
1Corinthians11:2 Jilatanaka, nayat amtasipxatamata, yatichäwinakaxar ist'apxatamat walikiw sapxsmawa." 
1Corinthians11:3 Ukampis nayax amuyt'apxañam munta, Cristow taqi chachan p'iqipaxa, chachasti warmipan p'iqipawa, kunjämtix Diosax Criston p'iqipäki ukhama." 
1Corinthians11:4 Mä chachatix p'iqip ch'uqt'asis Diosat mayischixa, jan ukax yatiyäwi arunaksa arschixa, Cristoruw p'inqachayi." 
1Corinthians11:5 Ukat sipana, kunapachatix mä warmix p'iqip jan ch'uqt'asis Diosat mayischixa, jan ukax yatiyäwi arunaksa arschixa, chachaparuw p'inqachayi. Ñik'utapsa q'al mururaskaspa ukhamawa." 
1Corinthians11:6 Ukampis mä warmitix p'iqip jan ch'uqt'askchixa, walïspawa mäpit ñik'utap q'al mururasxañapa. Ukampis warmitix ñik'ut mururasiñan p'inqätap amuychixa, p'iqip ch'uqt'aspan." 
1Corinthians11:7 Chachax janiw p'iqip ch'uqt'asiñapäkiti, jupaw Diosan uñtasitapaxa, ukatsti Diosan jach'a kankañap uñacht'ayi. Warmisti chachan jach'a kankañap uñacht'ayaraki," 
1Corinthians11:8 ukampis janiw chachax warmit luratäkiti, jan ukasti warmiw chachat lurataxa." 
1Corinthians11:9 Chachasti janiw warmïpan luratäkänti, jan ukasti warmiw chachïpan luratänxa." 
1Corinthians11:10 Ukalayku, angelanak laykuw warmix jaysasir kankañ chimpu piqipxarux apañapa." 
1Corinthians11:11 Ukampis Cristonkxasax janiw chachax jan warmïpan utjkaspati, janirakiw warmis jan chachäpan utjkaspati." 
1Corinthians11:12 Chiqpachansa, warmix chachat luratänwa, chachasti warmit yuriraki, ukax chiqäskapuniwa; taqi kunas Diosan luratawa." 
1Corinthians11:13 Jumanak pachpa amuyt'apxam, ¿warmin p'iqi jan ch'uqt'asis Diosat mayisiñapax walikïskiti?" 
1Corinthians11:14 Pachpa sarnaqäwisaw yatichistu, chachan ñik'ut jilayasiñapax mä p'inqätapa;" 
1Corinthians11:15 ukatsipana, warmitakix ñik'utap jilayasiñax jach'at uñt'atäñawa, juparuw jach'a ñik'utax p'iqip imxatasiñapatak churasi." 
1Corinthians11:16 Ukampis maynitix aka tuqit ch'axwañ munchixa, yatiñapawa, janiw nanakasa, janirakiw Diosan iglesianakapas yaqha saräwi uñt'apkti." 
1Corinthians11:17 Jichhasti jumanakar qillqankasax “janiw wal lurapktati” sapxsmawa, amuyatatxa tantachasïwinakamax jumanakar aski lurkpachax janjamakiw walt'ayapktamti." 
1Corinthians11:18 Nayraqataxa, kunapachatix jumanakax tantachasipkta ukkhaxa, jumanak taypin t'aqanuqtañanakaw utji sapxituwa; ukasti amuyatax chiqätapjamawa." 
1Corinthians11:19 ¡Jumanak taypin t'aqanuqtañanak utjañapax wakisiwa, ukhamat yatiñataki khitis chiqpach Cristor arkirix uka!" 
1Corinthians11:20 Ukham t'aqanuqtañanak utjipansti, manq'añatak tantachasipkta ukkhax janiw Tatitun Manq'äwipjam amtatäkxiti." 
1Corinthians11:21 Manq'asiñäki ukkhasti, sapa mayniw manq'ap nayraqat manq'asxi, ukchañkamasti mayninakax manq'at awtjatäskiwa, mayninakasti niyaw macharatäxapxi." 
1Corinthians11:22 ¿Janit jumanakasti utanakanïpkta utaman manq'apxañamataki, umapxañamatakisti? ¿Kunatarak ukham lurasasti Diosan iglesiap jisk'achayapxta, jan manq'añaninakar p'inqa tukuyasasti? ¿Kamsapxarakïmasti? ¿“Walikiw” sapxämati? ¡Uka luratanakamax janiw walïkiti!" 
1Corinthians11:23 Nayax yatichapksma ukxa, Tatitut katuqta. Tatit Jesusax aljantatäñapäkän uka arumaw t'ant'a irtäna," 
1Corinthians11:24 ukatsti Diosar yuspagarasaw uka t'ant'a pachjäna, ukat säna: “Akax nayan janchixawa, jumanak layku katuyatawa. Aksti nayat amtasis lurapxam” sasa." 
1Corinthians11:25 Uka pachparakiw manq'añ tukuyasax qiru astäna, ukat sarakïna: “Aka qirux machaq arust'äwiwa, wilaxampi chimpuntata. Sapa kuti umapkät ukkhaxa, nayat amtasisaw lurapxäta” sasa." 
1Corinthians11:26 Ukhamasti, jumanakax sapa kuti aka t'ant'a manq'apkäta, aka qirut umapkät ukkhaxa, Tatitun jutañapkamax jiwatap qhanañchasipktaxa." 
1Corinthians11:27 Ukhamasti khititix jan askïkas Tatitun t'ant'ap manq'ki, qirut umkaraki ukaxa, Tatitun janchipata, wilapat juchañchataw uñjasini." 
1Corinthians11:28 Ukalayku, janïr uka t'ant'a manq'kasa, uka qirut umkasax sapa mayniy chuymap uñantaspan." 
1Corinthians11:29 Tatitun janchipätap jan amuyasis manq'asa, qirupat umasax, jupa pachpa mutuñapatakiw manq'aski umaskaraki." 
1Corinthians11:30 Ukat jumanakat yaqhipanakax usutäsipki, pisi ch'amanïsipki, yaqhipanakasti jiwarasipkaraki." 
1Corinthians11:31 Jiwaspachpatix chuymas uñantasiñän ukaxa, Tatitux janiw juchañchkistaspati," 
1Corinthians11:32 kunapachatix Tatitux juchañchkistu ukkhaxa, yatiqañasatakiw mutuyistu, jan jiwasax akapachankir jaqinakampi chika juchañchatäñasataki." 
1Corinthians11:33 Ukhamasti munat jilatanaka, kunapachatix manq'añatak tantachasipkät ukkhaxa, maynit maynikam suyasipxam." 
1Corinthians11:34 Maynitix manq'at awtjatächixa, utapan manq'anpan, ukhamat Diosax ukham tantachasitanakamat jan mutuyapkätamti. Yaqha jiskt'anakamarusti, jumanakan ukar purinkä ukkhaw qhanañchapxäma." 
1Corinthians12:1 Jilatanaka, kunanakäkitix ajayun churäwipax ukxat yatipxañam munta." 
1Corinthians12:2 Jumanakax yatipxtawa, kunapachatix Cristor jan iyawsapkäyät ukkhaxa, jumanakax juykhur uñtataw jan parlir yaqha diosanak arkasipkäyätaxa." 
1Corinthians12:3 Ukat jichhax yatipxañam munta, janiw khitis Diosan Ajayupan ch'amapampix siskaspati: “Jesusax ñanqhachatäpan” sasa. Janirakiw khitis jan Qullan Ajayun ch'amapampix siskaspati: “Jesusax Tatituwa” sasa." 
1Corinthians12:4 Iglesiansti kunayman churäwinakaw utji, ukampis pachpa Ajayuw ukanak churi." 
1Corinthians12:5 Kunayman tuqit luqtañanakaw utji, ukampis taqi ukanakax pachpa Tatituruw luqtapxi." 
1Corinthians12:6 Kunayman lurañanakaw utji, ukampis pachpa Diosaw ch'amapampix taqi kun sapa maynin luri." 
1Corinthians12:7 Diosax sapa mayniruw Ajayun unañchäwip churi, taqinin askipataki." 
1Corinthians12:8 Yaqhipanakarux Qullan Ajay tuqiw yatiñ kankañampi arsuñapatak churi; yaqhipanakarusti uka pachpa Ajay tuqiw taqi kun yatiñampi arsuñ churi. 
1Corinthians12:9 Yaqhipanakax pachpa Ajay tuqiw iyawsañ katuqapxi, yaqhipanakasti usutanakar qullañatakiw ch'am katuqapxi." 
1Corinthians12:10 Yaqhipanakax muspharkañanak lurañatakiw ch'am katuqapxi, yaqhipanakasti profecía arunak yatiyañatakiw mä churäwi katuqapxi. Yaqhiparux Diosax aski ajayunaka, ñanqha ajayunak uñt'añ ch'ama churi, yaqhipanakarusti yaqha arunakat arsuñ ch'ama churaraki; ukhamarus yaqhipanakarux uka yaqha arunakat arsutanak qhanañchañ ch'ama churi." 
1Corinthians12:11 Taqi akanaksti, mä pachpa Ajayukiw ch'amapampi luri, jupasti kunjämarutix munki ukhamaruw sapa maynir lakinuqi." 
1Corinthians12:12 Jaqin janchipax walja chiqanakat luratäkchi ukasa, mä sapa janchikiwa. Cristox ukham mayakirakiwa." 
1Corinthians12:13 Uka kipkarakiw taqi jiwasanakax judionakasa, jan judionakasa, t'aqhisiyat jaqinakasa, jan t'aqhisiyat jaqinakas bautismo katuqapxtan, mä sapa Ajay tuqi, mä janchik tukuñasataki; taqinis uka pachpa Ajayut katuqaraktan." 
1Corinthians12:14 Mä janchix janiw maya sapat luratakïkiti, jan ukasti, waljanakat luratawa." 
1Corinthians12:15 Kayutix saspa: “Janiw nayax amparäkti, ukat jan janchinkti” sasaxa, janiw uk satapampix janchit yaqhäkaspati." 
1Corinthians12:16 Jinchutix saspa: “Janiw nayax nayräkti, ukat jan janchinkti” sasaxa, janiw uk satapampix janchit yaqhäkaspati." 
1Corinthians12:17 Taqpach janchitix nayrakamakïspa ukax ¿kunampirak ist'snasti? Taqpach janchitix jinchukamakïspa ukas ¿kunampirak mukt'snasti? 
1Corinthians12:18 Ukampis Diosaw munataparjam janchirux taqi kun uchi. 
1Corinthians12:19 Taqpachatix mä sapakïsapän ukaxa, janchix janiw utjkasapänti." 
1Corinthians12:20 Chiqpachansa, janchix walja chiqanakanïkchi ukasa, janchix maya sapakiwa." 
1Corinthians12:21 Nayrax janiw amparar siskaspati: “Janiw munksmati” sasaxa; janirakiw p'iqis kayunakarux siskaspati: “Janiw munapksmati” sasaxa. 
1Corinthians12:22 Ukatsipana, janchinkki ukanakat jan yäqañjamäki ukasa, ukanakan utjañapax wali askiwa." 
1Corinthians12:23 Janchisansti, kawkhawjarutix jan yäqapktan, ukawjanakaruw sum isthapiytanxa. Kawkhanakatix jan yäqañax wakiski ukawjanakaruw wal yäqtanxa," 
1Corinthians12:24 janchisan wali yäqatäki ukanakarux janiw ukham yäqañax wakiskiti. Diosax ukham janchis luratayna, jan yäqat chiqanakan juk'ampi yäqatäñapataki," 
1Corinthians12:25 ukhamat janchisan jan jaljtañanak utjaskañapataki, jan ukasti, janchisan utjki uka chiqanakax maynit maynikam yanapt'asipxañapataki." 
1Corinthians12:26 Janchisan mä chiqatix t'aqhischixa, taqi chiqaw t'aqhisiraki, mä chiqatix yäqatächixa, taqpachaniw kusisipxi." 
1Corinthians12:27 Ukhamasti jumanakax Criston janchipäpxtawa, jumanakat sapa maynix uka janchinkirïpxtawa." 
1Corinthians12:28 Diosax iglesian utjañap munäna, nayrïrinxa apostolunaka; payïrinsti profetanaka; kimsïrinsti yatichirinaka; ukxarusti muspharkañ luririnaka, mayninakax usutanakar qullirinaka, yanapasirinaka, sarayirinaka, yaqha arunakat parlirinaka." 
1Corinthians12:29 Janiw taqinix apostolüpkiti, janirakiw taqinis profetäpkiti. Janiw taqinix yatichirïpkiti, janirakiw taqinis muspharkañ luräwinak lurirïpkiti," 
1Corinthians12:30 janiw taqinix usutanakar qullañatak ch'amanïpkiti. Janirakiw taqinis yaqha arunakat parlapkiti, jan uñt'at arunak qhanañchirïpkisa." 
1Corinthians12:31 Jumanakasti juk'ampi suma churäwinak katuqañ munapxam. Nayasti juk'ampi suma thakhi uñacht'ayapxäma. 
1Corinthians13:1 Nayatix jaqinakana, angelanakan arunakap parlirista, ukat janitix munasiñax utjkitaspaxa, nayax mä latar uñtatakiw tuxuqirista, jan ukax mä platillor uñtatakiw chhulluqirista." 
1Corinthians13:2 Jutir urut yatiyañatix utjitaspa, Diosan imantat amtäwiptix amuyt'irista, taqi kun yatirista, qullunak unxtayañatakis iyawsañanïrista, ukat janitix munasiñax utjkitaspaxa, janiw nayax kunäkiristsa." 
1Corinthians13:3 Ukatsti taqi yänakaxtix jan kunaninakar lakinuqirista, pachpa janchixtix nakhantatäñatak katuyirista, ukat janitix munasiñax utjkitaspaxa, uka lurataxax janiw kunatakïkaspasa." 
1Corinthians13:4 Munasiñanïñax llamp'u chuymanïñawa; khuyapayasirïñawa; janiw uñisisiñäkiti, janiw jach'achasiñäkiti," 
1Corinthians13:5 janiw jan walinak parlañäkiti, janiw jupan jaqïñapak munañäkiti, janiw amuk thithiñäkiti;" 
1Corinthians13:6 janiw jan chiqapar uñjatat kusisiñäkiti, jan ukasti chiqapar uñjatat kusisiñawa." 
1Corinthians13:7 Munasiñanïñax taqi kun t'aqhisiñawa, taqi kun iyawsañawa, taqi kun suyt'añawa, taqi kun mutuñawa." 
1Corinthians13:8 Munasiñax janipuniw tukuskaniti. Mä urux profecía arunak yatiyañax tukusiniwa, janiw yaqha arunakat parlaskxaniti, janirakiw yatiñ kankañas munaskxaniti." 
1Corinthians13:9 Yatiñ kankañasa, profecía arunakas janiw chiqäkiti," 
1Corinthians13:10 kunapachatix chiqa kankañax purinkan ukapachaw ukanakax tukusxani. 
1Corinthians13:11 Nayax wawäkasax wawjamaw parläyäta, lup'ïyäta, amuyt'äyäta; ukampis kunapachatix jach'a jaqïxta ukkhasti, wawa kankañ qhiparuw apanukxta." 
1Corinthians13:12 Jichhasti Diosarux chhayphuk uñjtan; ukampis mä uruw ajanuy ajanu uñkatapxañäni. Jichhasti nayan yatiñaxax janiw phuqhatpachäkiti, ukampis mä uruw Diosarux uñt'ä, kunjämtix jupax nayar uñt'kitu ukhama." 
1Corinthians13:13 Jan tukusirinakax kimsaw utji: iyawsaña, suyt'aña, munasiña; uka kimsatsti, munasiñaw wali wakiskirixa." 
1Corinthians14:1 Munasiñanïñatak ch'amachasipxam, ukhamarus ajayun churäwinakap Diosat katuqañ munapxam, ukat juk'ampsa profecía arunak yatiyapxam." 
1Corinthians14:2 Khititix jan uñt'at arunakat parlki ukax Diosaruw parlxayi, janiw jaqinakar parlxaykiti, janiw khitis arsutap amuyt'kiti. Ajayupasti imantat arunakat arsu, ukampis janiw khitis arsutap amuyt'kiti." 
1Corinthians14:3 Ukatsipana, khititix profecía arunak yatiyki ukax iglesiar jiltayañatakiw parli, ukampiw ch'amañchi, chuymacharaki." 
1Corinthians14:4 Jan uñt'at arunakat parlirix jupan askipatakikiw parli; ukampis khititix profecía arunak yatiyki ukax iglesiaruw jiltayi. 
1Corinthians14:5 Nayax taqi jumanakan jan uñt'at arunakat parlapxañam munirista; ukampis profecía arunak yatiyapxañam munirista; ukaw jan uñt'at arunak arsuñat sipan askixa, uka arunakax kun sañtix munki uktix qhanañchapxasma ukkhakiw iglesiar yanapt'añatakix askïspa." 
1Corinthians14:6 Jichhasti jilatanaka, nayatix jutasin jan uñt'at arunakat parlapxäm ukax janiw jumanakatak askïkaspati, janitix Diosan yatiyäwinakap parlapkirisma, yatiñ kankañat jan parlapkirisma, profecía arunak jan yatiyapkirisma, yatichäwinak jan yatichapkirisma ukaxa." 
1Corinthians14:7 Toct'añ yänakatix mä kipkak jachsupxaspa ukaxa, ¿kunjämatarak pinkillumpina, arpampin jachsutapsti mayja mayjätap amuysnasti?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Mä nuwasiñantix trompetax jan suma qhana phust'askaspa ukasti, janiw khitis nuwasiñatak wakichaskaspati." 
1Corinthians14:9 Ukhamarakiw jumanakampix lurasi: jumanakatix jan khitin amuyt'kañ jan uñt'at arunakat parlapxätaxa, ¿kunjämarak kuntix sapkta ukasti yatisispasti? ¡Ina ch'usarukiw parlasipktaxa!" 
1Corinthians14:10 Aka uraqinsti walja jan uñt'at arunakaw utji, ukanakasti arsutap tuqikiw uñt'atäspa." 
1Corinthians14:11 Ukampis nayatix uka arunakan kuntix sañ munki uk jan yatkirista ukaxa, nayampi parliritakix mä jaya markankir jaqjamakïristwa, jupas nayatakix mä jaya markankir jaqjamakïspawa." 
1Corinthians14:12 Ukalayku, niyakixay jumanakax ajayun churäwinakap katuqañ munapxstaxa, kunanakatix iglesiar jiltaykaspa ukanakan utjañapay munapxam." 
1Corinthians14:13 Ukhamasti jan uñt'at arunak parlirixa, uka arunak qhanañchañatakix Diosat ch'am maypan." 
1Corinthians14:14 Ukampis nayatix jan uñt'at arut Diosat mayiristxa, chiqpachansa ajayuxampiw Diosat mayiskta, ukampis amuyuxan janiw kuna asksa jikxatkti." 
1Corinthians14:15 Ukhamasti ¿kuna lurañaxarak wakisisti? Ajayumpi, amuyumpi Diosat mayiñaxaw wakisi. Ajayumpi, amuyumpi q'uchuñaxaw wakisi." 
1Corinthians14:16 Jumatix ajayumampik Diosar yupaychstaxa, ukat mä aliq jaqitix ist'ätamxa, janiw juman yuspagaratamampix chikachaskaniti, janirakiw juman parlatamsa amuyt'kaniti." 
1Corinthians14:17 Juman yuspagaratamax wali sumäskaspawa, ukampis maynitakix janiw askïkaspati." 
1Corinthians14:18 Nayax Diosaruw yuspagarta, jumanakat sipan jan uñt'at arunakat juk'ampi parlataxata;" 
1Corinthians14:19 ukampis iglesian mä phisqa arunaksa, amuyt'kay arunak arsuñ munta, ukhamat mayninakar yatichañataki, tunka waranqa jan uñt'at arunak arsuñat sipansa." 
1Corinthians14:20 Jilatanaka, janiy jumanakax wawanakjam lup'ipxamti. Jan ukasti, jan walinak lurañatakik wawjamäpxam; amuyt'asiñansti jach'a jaqinakjamäpxam." 
1Corinthians14:21 Tatitux Qillqatan siwa: “Aka markarux yaqha markankir jaqinak tuqiw jan uñt'at arunakamp parlä, ukampis janiw ist'apkitaniti” sasa." 
1Corinthians14:22 Ukhamasti jan uñt'at arunakat parlañax Cristor jan iyawsirinakatakix mä chimpuwa, iyawsañanïpki ukanakatakisti janiw ukhamäkiti. Ukampis profecía arunak yatiyañax khitinakatix iyawsañanïki ukanakatakikiw mä chimpuxa, Cristor jan iyawsirinakatakix janiw ukhamäkiti." 
1Corinthians14:23 Kunapachatix iglesiax tantachatäki ukkhaxa, taqpachanitix jan uñt'at arunak parlasipkätaxa, ukat yaqha aliq jaqixa, jan ukax Cristor jan iyawsir jaqis mantaninixa, jupax jumanakan luqhir tukupxatam amuyani." 
1Corinthians14:24 Ukatsipana, taqinitix profecía arunak yatiyapxätaxa, ukat Cristor jan iyawsiri, jan ukax mä aliq jaqitix mantanin ukkhaxa, jumanakan arsutam ist'asax, jupa pachpaw amuyt'asisin chuymap uñantasini." 
1Corinthians14:25 Ukhamat chuyma manqhapan utjki ukax qhanar mistuni, ukatsti killt'asisaw Diosar yupaychani, ukat chiqpachapun Diosan jumanak taypinkatap yatini." 
1Corinthians14:26 Ukhamax jilatanaka, kunapachatix tantachasipkät ukkhaxa, mayninakax q'uchunak q'uchupxasma, mayninakasti yatichapxasmawa, jan ukax kuntix Diosax sapktam uk qhanañchapxasma, jan ukax jan uñt'at arunakat parlapxasma, uka arunakat qhanañchapxarakisma. Taqi ukanakax purapat jiltañatakïñapawa." 
1Corinthians14:27 Kunapachatix jan uñt'at arunakat arsupxät ukkhaxa, paniniki jan ukax kimsanikiw maynit maynit arsuñapa; ukhamarus mayniw ukanakan arsutanakap qhanañchañapa." 
1Corinthians14:28 Ukampis janitix qhanañchirix utjkchi ukaxa, jupanakax iglesia nayraqatan uka jan uñt'at arunak jan parlapxpati, jan ukasti, jupa sapatakiki, ukhamarak Diosatakik parlapxpan." 
1Corinthians14:29 Ukhamaraki, profetanakatix utjchi ukaxa, paniniki, jan ukax kimsanik parlapxpan, mayninakasti kuntix parlapki uk amuyt'apxpan." 
1Corinthians14:30 Ukampis Diosatix mä kunsa mayni qunt'atäskirir yatiyani ukaxa, nayraqat parlirix amukt'añapawa." 
1Corinthians14:31 Ukhamat taqpachanix maynit maynit parlasax profecía arunak yatiyapxani, ukat taqpachan yatiqañapataki, ch'amañchasiñapatakiraki." 
1Corinthians14:32 Profecía arunakat yatiyañax profetan sarayatäñapawa; 
1Corinthians14:33 Diosax janiw pixtuntir Diosäkiti, jan ukasti, sumankañ utjayir Diosawa. Criston iglesianakapan saräwiparjamasti," 
1Corinthians14:34 warminakax iglesian tantachasïwinakapan amukïpxañapawa, janiw parlañapax wakiskiti. Jupanakax chachanakapar jaysapxañapawa, kamisatix kamachix siski ukhamaru." 
1Corinthians14:35 Jupanakatix kunsa yatiñ munapxchixa, chachanakapar utan jiskt'asipxpan; mä warmin iglesia tantachasïwinakan parlañapax janiw askïkiti." 
1Corinthians14:36 Jumanakax yatipxam, Diosan arunakapax janiw jumanakampi qalltaskiti, janirakiw jumanakakis katuqapktati." 
1Corinthians14:37 Maynitix profetjam amuyaschixa, jan ukax Ajayun amuyt'ayatas amuyaschixa, kuntix qillqanipksma ukax Tatitun kamachipätap amuyani." 
1Corinthians14:38 Janitix uk katuqkan ukasti, janirakiw Tatitux juparux katuqkaniti." 
1Corinthians14:39 Ukhamasti munat jilatanaka, jumanakax profecía arunak yatiyañar ch'amachasipxam, janirak jan uñt'at arunak arsuñsa jark'apxamti;" 
1Corinthians14:40 taqi kunsa chiqaparu, ukhamarak yäpar lurapxam." 
1Corinthians15:1 Jichhasti jilatanaka, Diosan suma yatiyäwi arunak yatiyapksma ukat amtasipxañam munta. Jumanakax uka suma yatiyäwi arunak iyawsapxta, ukarjamarakiw sayt'atäsipktaxa." 
1Corinthians15:2 Aka suma yatiyäwi arunak tuqirakiw qhispitäpxäta, uka arunakarjam sayt'apkäta ukapacha, kunjämtix nayax jumanakar yatiyapksma ukarjama; jan ukhamäkani ukasti, iyawsatamax inamayakïniwa." 
1Corinthians15:3 Nayraqatasti, kuna yatichäwinaktix nayax yatiqkta ukarak jumanakarux yatichapxsma, ukasti akhamawa: Qillqatanakarjamax Cristox juchanakas laykuw jiwawayi;" 
1Corinthians15:4 janchipax p'amp'antatänwa, Qillqatanakarjamasti kimsa urut jaktäna;" 
1Corinthians15:5 ukatsti Pedroruw uñstäna, ukhamaraki tunka payan apostolunakampiru." 
1Corinthians15:6 Uka qhipatsti phisqa patakat juk'ampi jilatanakaruw uñstäna, jupanakat waljaniw jakasipki, yaqhipanakasti jiwarxapxiwa." 
1Corinthians15:7 Uka qhipatsti Santiagoruw uñstäna, ukhamarak taqpach apostolunakaru." 
1Corinthians15:8 Qhip qhiparusti nayaruw uñstarakitu, nayax jan yuriñat yurir wawäkirista ukhama." 
1Corinthians15:9 Nayax apostolunakat sipan jan yäqatakïtwa, janirakiw apóstol satäñatakis askïkti, Diosan iglesiapar arknaqatax layku." 
1Corinthians15:10 Ukampis Diosan khuyapayasiñap laykukiw kunäktix ukätxa; munasiñapasti nayatakix janiw inamayäkiti. Jan ukasti, nayax taqi apostolunakat sipan juk'amp irnaqawayta; janiw nayat irnaqktxa, jan ukasti, Diosawa, jupasti munasiñapan nayarux yanapitu." 
1Corinthians15:11 Ukhamasti nayasa, jupanakasa, kuntix yatiyapksma uka yatiyäwiruw iyawsapxtaxa, ukaw wakiskirixa." 
1Corinthians15:12 Criston jiwatat jaktataptix jiwasax yatiystanxa, ¿kunatarak jumanakat yaqhipanakasti jiwatanakax janiw jaktapkiti sas parlapxisti?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Jiwatanakatix jan jaktapkchixa, Cristox janirakipï jaktkpachatixa." 
1Corinthians15:14 Cristotix jan jaktkchixa, yatiyktan uka arunakax janiw kunatakis askïkiti, jumanakan iyawsäwimas inamayakirakiwa." 
1Corinthians15:15 Ukhamächi ukaxa, nanakax Diosan k'ari qhanañchiripäpxiristwa, janis Diosax Cristor jaktaykaspa ukhamak yatiyapxirista, janitix jiwatanak taypit jaktañax utjkaspa ukaxa." 
1Corinthians15:16 Jiwatanakatix jan jaktkchixa, Cristox janirakipï jaktkpachäntixa." 
1Corinthians15:17 Cristotix jan jaktkchïnxa, jumanakan iyawsäwimax inamayakiwa: juchanakaman sarnaqasipktaxa." 
1Corinthians15:18 Ukhamächi ukasti, khitinakatix Cristor iyawsas jiwapki ukanakax chhaqtatäsipkiwa." 
1Corinthians15:19 Cristor suyt'añasatix akapachan jakañatakikïchixa, taqi jaqinakat sipan sinti llakkañätanwa." 
1Corinthians15:20 Ukampis janiw ukhamäkiti. Chiqpachansa Cristox jiwatanak taypit jaktawayi. Jupax nayrïr achükaspas ukhamawa: jupaw jiwatanak taypit nayraqat jaktawayi. 
1Corinthians15:21 Kamisatix jiwañax mä sapa jaqit qalltixa, ukhamarakiw jiwatat jaktañax mä sapa jaqit qallti." 
1Corinthians15:22 Kamisatix Adanankasin taqi jaqix jiwixa, ukhamarakiw Cristonkxasin taqi jaqinakax jakapxani." 
1Corinthians15:23 Ukampis sapa maynitakiw wakisitarjam lurasini: Cristow nayraqat jakti, nayrïr achur uñtata, ukxarusti kunapachatix Cristox kuttankan ukkhaxa, jupar iyawsirinakaw jaktapxarakini." 
1Corinthians15:24 Uka qhipat aka uraqin tukusiñapax purinini, ukapachaw Cristox taqi munañaninakaru, marka apnaqir jilïrinakaru, ch'aman kankañaninakar t'unjani, ukatsti Dios Awkiruw marka apnaqañ katuyxani." 
1Corinthians15:25 Cristox reyïñapawa, taqi uñisirinakapar atipjañapkama;" 
1Corinthians15:26 qhipïr uñisiristi jiwawa, ukas q'ala t'unjatarakïniwa." 
1Corinthians15:27 Diosax taqi kunsa Criston munañaparuw katuyi. Ukampisa, kunapachatix Qillqatanakax: “Taqi kunsa Criston munañaparuw katuyi” sixa, ukax janiw Diosas Criston apnaqatäkaspa ukham sañ munkiti, jan ukasti, Diosaw taqi kunsa apnaqi." 
1Corinthians15:28 Ukatsti kunapachatix taqi kunas Criston munañapar katuyatäxani ukkhasti, Cristo pachpaw Yuqapäkasin Dios Awkir katuyasxani, Diosax taqi kunsa jupar katuyatap layku. Ukhamat Diosax taqi kunxarus munañanïni." 
1Corinthians15:29 Mä tuqitxa, yaqhipanakax jiwatanak lantiw bautismo katuqapxi, ¿kunatakirak uk lurapxisti? Jiwatanakax jan jaktkchini ukasti, ¿kunatakirak jiwatanak lanti bautismo katuqapxisti?" 
1Corinthians15:30 ¿Kunatarak jiwasanakasti sapa kutis jan walt'añankasktansti? 
1Corinthians15:31 Jilatanaka, sapüruw nayax jiwañ jak'an jikxatasta. Ukasti chiqapunïskiwa, nayasti chuymaxan wal kusista jumanakan Cristor iyawsapxatamata." 
1Corinthians15:32 Nayax Éfeso markan jaqi manq'an animalanakampjamaw jaqinakamp nuwasta. Jiwatanakan jaktañapatix jan chiqäkchi ukasti, ¿uk lurasin, kunarak jikxatsti? Kunjämtix yaqhipanakax sapki ukhamarak lursnaxa: “¡Manq'asiñäni, umt'asiñäni, qharürux jiwxchiñänixaya!” sasa." 
1Corinthians15:33 Jan sallqjayasipxamti. Kunjämtix säwix siski: “Jan wali jaqinakampi sarnaqañax, aski saräwinak chaqtayi” sasa." 
1Corinthians15:34 Jumanakax sum amuyasipxam, janirak juch lurkxapxamti, jumanakat yaqhipanakax janïraw Diosar uñt'apkiti. Uksti jumanakan p'inqa tukuñamatakiw sapxsma." 
1Corinthians15:35 Inas yaqhipanakax jiskt'aschini: “¿Kunjämarak jiwatanakasti jaktanisti? ¿Kunjäm janchinïpxanisa?” sasa. 
1Corinthians15:36 ¡Uka jiskt'ax pisi amuyunin jiskt'apawa! Kunapachatix jatha phawantktan ukkhaxa, uka jathax jiwañapawa, ukhamat alin mistuñapataki." 
1Corinthians15:37 Yapuchktan ukkhax, janiw mistunkani uka ali yapuchktanti, jan ukasti jathakwa usktanxa, trigöpasa, jan ukax yaqha jathäpasa." 
1Corinthians15:38 Ukatsti Diosaw uka jatharux kumjämarutix munki ukhamarjam tukuyi, sapa jatharusa wakisitaparjamaw ali tukuyi." 
1Corinthians15:39 Janiw taqi janchinakax kipkakïkiti; jaqin janchipax mayjawa, uywanakansa, jamach'inakansa, chawllanakan janchipas mayjarakiwa." 
1Corinthians15:40 Ukhamarakiw, alaxpachan uchatanaka, aka uraqin uchatanakas utji; ukampis alaxpachan uchatanakäki ukanakax, aka uraqin uchatanakat sipan sinti sumt'atawa." 
1Corinthians15:41 Intin qhanapax phaxsin qhanapat sipan mayjawa, warawaranakan k'ajatapas mayjarakiwa; pachpa warawaranak taypinsa, sapa warawaran k'ajatapax mayjawa." 
1Corinthians15:42 Ukhamarakiw jiwatanakat jaktañampix lurasi. P'amp'antatäki uka janchix ñusantirikiwa; jaktki uka janchisti jan ñusantiriwa. 
1Corinthians15:43 P'amp'antatäki uka janchix jan kunatak askiwa; jaktki uka janchisti wali jach'añchatawa. P'amp'antatäki uka janchix jan ch'amanikiwa; jaktki uka janchisti ch'amaniwa. 
1Corinthians15:44 P'amp'antatäki ukax tukusir janchikiwa; jaktki ukasti ajay janchiwa. Tukusir janchitix utjchixa, ajay janchix utjarakiwa." 
1Corinthians15:45 Qillqatan siwa: “Nayrïr chachax Adanawa, jupax jakkir jaqiw tukuwayi” sasa; ukampis qhipïr Adanasti jakañ churir ajayuw tukuwayi." 
1Corinthians15:46 Ukampisa, janiw ajayüki ukax nayrankkiti, jan ukasti, janchïki ukaw nayrankixa." 
1Corinthians15:47 Nayrïr chachax laq'at luratänwa; payïr chachasti alaxpachat jutiriwa. 
1Corinthians15:48 Aka uraqin jakir jaqinakan janchipasti, uka nayrïr jaqin janchipjama laq'at luratawa; alaxpachankirinakasti, kunjämäkitix alaxpachankirix ukhamarakiwa." 
1Corinthians15:49 Kunjämtix uka laq'at lurat jaqir uñtasitätanxa, ukhamarakiw mä urux alaxpachankirir uñtasitäñäni." 
1Corinthians15:50 Jilatanaka, sañ munapxaraksma, akapach janchix janiw Diosan markapar mantkaspati, tukusirïki ukasti janirakiw wiñay markankkaspati." 
1Corinthians15:51 Ukampis Diosan imantat amtäwip yatipxañam munta: Janiw taqpachan jiwkañäniti, ukampis taqiniw" 
1Corinthians15:52 mä ch'ipxtanaki machaqar tukuñäni, kunapachatix trompetan qhipa phust'asitapax ist'askani ukapacha. Trompetan phust'ataparusti, jiwatanakax jan mayampi jiwañatakiw jaktapxani. Jiwasanakasti machaqar tukutäxañäniwa." 
1Corinthians15:53 Jiwasan ñusantir janchisax, jan ñusantirïki uka janchimpiw isthapisini, jiwir janchisasti jan jiwiri janchimpiw isthapisirakini." 
1Corinthians15:54 Kunapachatix jiwasan ñusantir janchisax, jan ñusantir janchimpi isthapitäxani, jiwir janchisasa, jan jiwir janchimpi isthapitäxarakini, ukapachaw Qillqatan siski ukax phuqhasini: “Jiwax wiñayatak t'unjataw uñjasi." 
1Corinthians15:55 Jiwa, ¿kawkinkarak atipjir ch'amamasti? Jiwa, ¿kawkinkarak mich'imasti?” sasa." 
1Corinthians15:56 Jiwan mich'ipax juchawa, nayra kamachiw jucharux uka ch'am churaraki." 
1Corinthians15:57 ¡Diosax yuspagaratäpan, jupaw Jesucristo Tatitus tuqi atipjayistu!" 
1Corinthians15:58 Ukhamasti munat jilatanaka, jumanakax Tatitumpi sum sayt'asipxam, janirak saraqapxamti. Tatitun luräwipan juk'ampi juk'amp irnaqasa; jumanakax yatipxtawa, Tatitumpi mayaki irnaqapxatamax janiw inamayäkiti." 
1Corinthians16:1 Diosan markapankirinakatak qullqi apthapt'añ tuqitxa, kunjämtix Galacia suyunkir iglesianakar yatichankta ukarjam lurapxam." 
1Corinthians16:2 Sapa domingo urusti, jumanakat sapa mayniw irnaqatapat qawqhtix katuqki ukhamarjam iraqapxañama, uksti imapxañamawa, ukhamat kunapachatix nayax purinkä ukkhax jan irthapisipkañamataki." 
1Corinthians16:3 Mä qawqha jilatanakar ajllipxam, Jerusalenar uka irthapitanak apapxañapataki. Nayax purinkä ukkhasti, jupanakar mä qillqatampiw khithä, ukhamat Jerusalenankir jilatanakax sum katuqapxañapataki." 
1Corinthians16:4 Nayan sarañaxatix wakischini ukasti, jupanakax nayampiw sarapxani." 
1Corinthians16:5 Nayax jutkä ukapachasti, Macedonia chiqa sarañaxawa; uka qhipat Corinto markarux purinï." 
1Corinthians16:6 Inas jumanakampi mä qawqha urunak qhiparañaxax wakischini, jan ukax, thayapacha urunak ukankañ wakisirakchini; ukhamat jumanakax yanapt'apxitasma kawkharutix sarañaxäkani ukkhar puriñaxataki." 
1Corinthians16:7 Janiw sarkasaki mä juk'atak ukankañ munkti, jan ukasti Tatitux munchi ukkhaxa, mä qawqha urunakaw jumanakamp qamart'añ munta;" 
1Corinthians16:8 ukampis Éfeso markanxa, Pentecostés urukamaw qamaraskä," 
1Corinthians16:9 ukansti Tatitutak lurañax waliw utjarakitu, waljanis nayar uñisir utjkchi ukasa." 
1Corinthians16:10 Timoteotix purininixa, janiw kunatsa llakisiyapxätati; jumanak taypin jikxatasisax k'uchikïpan; jupasti nayjamarakiw Tatitun luräwipan irnaqi." 
1Corinthians16:11 Ukhamasti jan khitis jumanakat jupar jisk'achpati; jan ukasti, saräwipan sumäñapatak yanapt'apxam, nayar uñjir jutañapataki, nayasti mayni jilatanakamp kunaw jupar suyaskta." 
1Corinthians16:12 Apolos jilatasarux walpun achikt'ta, mayni jilatanakampi chika jumanakar tumpt'ir sarañapataki, ukampis janiw jichhax jutañ munkiti. Kunapachay wakischini ukkhakiw jutani." 
1Corinthians16:13 Suyapxapunim, iyawsañanakamansti ch'aman sayt'apxam, qamas katxatapxam, ch'amañchasipxarakim." 
1Corinthians16:14 Kuntix lurapkät ukxa, munasiñampi lurapxam." 
1Corinthians16:15 Jilatanaka, jumanakax yatipxtawa, Estéfanas jilatan utapankirinakaw nayraqat Acaya chiqan Diosan suma yatiyäwiparux iyawsi, jupanakasti Cristor iyawsiri jilatanakaruw yanapapxi." 
1Corinthians16:16 Nayasti muntwa jumanakax jupanakjam yanapt'asiri, irnaqiri jilatanakar ist'apxañama." 
1Corinthians16:17 Estéfanas, Fortunato, Acaico jilatanakan purinipxatapat wal kusista. Jupanakampïñax, jumanakampïkirista ukhamänwa." 
1Corinthians16:18 Jupanakax ajay tuqin wal yanapt'apxitu, jumanakar yanapapktam ukhama. Ukham jilatanakatakix chuymanïñawa." 
1Corinthians16:19 Asia suyunkir iglesianakax aruntanipxtamwa. Aquilampi Priscilampi, ukhamaraki utapan tantachasipki uka jilatanakampix, Tatitun sutiparuw aruntanipxtam." 
1Corinthians16:20 Taqi jilatanakan aruntanakap katuqasipxam. Jumanak purasti qullan jamp'atimpi aruntasipxam. 
1Corinthians16:21 Naya Pablosti, aka aruntxa pachpa amparaxampiw qillqanipxsma." 
1Corinthians16:22 Khititix Tatitur jan munkchixa, ¡Diosan ñanqhachäwipax jupxar purpan! ¡Nanakan Tatituxay, jutam!" 
1Corinthians16:23 Tatitu Jesucriston khuyapayasiñapax jumanakampïpan. 
1Corinthians16:24 Munasiñaxax Cristo Jesusankasin jumanakampipunïskiwa. 
2Corinthians1:1 Corinto iglesiankir munat jilatanaka, kullakanaka, ukhamarak Acaya chiqankir taqi jilatanaka: Naya Pablompi, Timoteo jilatampix aruntanipxsmawa. Dios Awkisampi, nayar apostolüñatak ajllisir Jesucristo Tatitumpix khuyapayasiñapsa, sumankañapsa jumanakar churpan." 
2Corinthians1:2  
2Corinthians1:3 Jesucristo Tatitusan Dios Awkipax jach'añchatäpan, jupax khuyapayir Awkisawa, jiwasar chuymachir Diosarakiwa." 
2Corinthians1:4 Jupaw taqi t'aqhisiñanakasan chuymachistu, ukhamat jiwasanakan t'aqhisirinakar chuymachañasataki, Diosax churkistu uka pachpa chuymachasïwimpi." 
2Corinthians1:5 Kamisatix Cristo layku wali t'aqhisiñanakax jiwasanakatak utjki ukkhaxa, jiwasanakax jupampiw t'aqhisipxtan, ukhamarakiw Cristo tuqi chuymachasiñax jilarkir jiwasanakatak utji." 
2Corinthians1:6 Nanakan t'aqhisiñaxax chuymachasiñampi, qhispiyasiñampi jumanakatak utjayi; Diosatix chuymachapxchistuxa, jumanakan chuymachasiñax utjañaparakiwa, jumanakan nanakjam pachpa t'aqhisiñanak wali ch'amampi t'aqhisipxañamataki." 
2Corinthians1:7 Nanakan jumanakat mä suyt'äwiw utji, kunjämtix t'aqhisipxtaxa, ukhamarakiw chuymachasipxäta." 
2Corinthians1:8 Jilatanaka, Asia suyun kuna jan walt'añanakantix jikxatasipkäyät uk yatipxañam munta. Uka yant'ax jan atipjkayänwa, jiwañak suyxapxäyäta." 
2Corinthians1:9 Nanakax jiwañar katuyatjam amuyasipxäyäta. Ukampis taqi ukax jiwatat jaktayir Diosar katuyasiñ yatichapxitu, janiw nanak pachpar alkatasiñ yatichapkituti." 
2Corinthians1:10 Diosaw qhispiyapxitu, akat qhiparus axsarkañ jiwañat qhispiyasipkakitaniwa," 
2Corinthians1:11 jumanakatix nanakatak Diosat mayipxät ukkhaxa. Walja jaqinakatix nanakatak Diosat mayinixa, waljanirakiw katuqktan uka aski churäwinakapat Diosarux yuspagarapxani." 
2Corinthians1:12 Nanakax taqi jaqinak nayraqatana, juk'ampis jumanak nayraqatana, suma, ukhamarak q'uma chuyman sarnaqapxataxat kusisipxta. Uksti, janiw nanakan yatiñ kankañaxampi lurapkti, jan ukasti, Diosan yanapapampiw lurapxta, ukat munasiñapat jupar yuspagarapxta." 
2Corinthians1:13 Qillqatanak apayanipksma ukansti, janiw jan ullarkaya, jan amuyt'kay qillqanipksmati, uksti sum amuyt'apxañam munta," 
2Corinthians1:14 niyaw nanakat mä juk'a amuyapxtaxa, kunapachatix Tatitux jutkan ukkhaxa, jumanakax nanakat wal kusisipxäta, nanakas uka kipkarakiw jumanakat kusisipxä." 
2Corinthians1:15 Ukham amuyasaw nayax jumanakar nayraqat tumpt'ir jutañ munäyäta, ukhamat pä kuti jumanakar tumpt'añataki;" 
2Corinthians1:16 Macedoniar sarkasaw jumanakar nayraqat tumpt'añ munäyäta, ukat kuttanisax wasitat jumanakar tumpt'añataki. Ukhamat jumanakax Judear sarañaxatak nayar yanapt'apxitasma." 
2Corinthians1:16 Macedoniar sarkasaw jumanakar nayraqat tumpt'añ munäyäta, ukat kuttanisax wasitat jumanakar tumpt'añataki. Ukhamat jumanakax Judear sarañaxatak nayar yanapt'apxitasma." 
2Corinthians1:17 ¿Jan sum amuyt'asisakit uk lurañ amtpachätsti? ¿Jan ukax, “jïsa, janiwa” sas pä amtäwimpi amtkirista ukhamcha amuyapxtaxa?" 
2Corinthians1:18 Ukampis Diosax yatiskiwa, nanakax janiw jumanakar “jïsa, janiwa” sasax parlapksmati." 
2Corinthians1:19 Diosan Jesucristo wawapasti, khitittix Silvanosa, Timoteosa, nayasa parlapksma ukax janiw “jïsa, janiwa” sirïkänti, jan ukasti, jupanxa Diosan arunakapax chiqapapunïnwa," 
2Corinthians1:20 jupanarak Diosan arsutanakapax phuqhasi. Ukatpï Diosar yupaychktan ukkhax “Ukhamäpan” sistanxa, Cristo Jesús tuqi." 
2Corinthians1:21 Ukatsti Diosaw nanakarusa, jumanakarus Cristompi mayachasax sum sayt'ayistu, jupaw yaqhacharakistu." 
2Corinthians1:22 Jupaw jiwasanakarux chimpt'istu, chuymasarusti Qullan Ajayu ucharakistu, kuntix churapxämaw siskistu uk katuqañax phuqhasiñapataki." 
2Corinthians1:23 Janis amtataxarjam Corintor sarksta ukasa, jumanakat khuyapayasisaw jan jutkti, uksti Diosaw yatiski." 
2Corinthians1:24 Janiw nanakax iyawsäwinakam apnaqañ munapkti; nanakax jumanakar yanapt'añak munapxsma, ukhamat kusisiñaman utjañapataki, jumanakasti iyawsañan niy thurt'atäxapxtawa." 
2Corinthians2:1 Ukat jumanakar wasitat tumpir sarañ jan amtkti, jumanakar jan llakisiyañ layku." 
2Corinthians2:2 Nayatix jumanakar llakisiyapxäm ukasti ¿khitirak nayar kusisiyitaspasti? Jumanakakiw kusisiyapxitasmaxa. 
2Corinthians2:3 Ukat ukham qillqanipxsma, janiw nayax jumanakan llakisiyatäñatak sarañ munkäyätti, ukat sipan jumanakax nayar kusisiyapxañamawa. Nayan kusisiñaxat jumanakax kusisipxañam yatirakïyätwa," 
2Corinthians2:4 ukampis kunapachatix uka qillqat apayanipksma ukkhax wali llakt'ata, mayjt'ataw jikxatasïyäta, llakisiñatsa jacharakïyätwa. Ukampis janiw llakisipxañamatak apayanipksmati, jan ukasti, kunja jach'äkitix munasiñaxax jumanakatak uk yatipxañamatakiwa." 
2Corinthians2:5 Maynitix nayar llakisiychitu ukaxa, janiw nayaruk llakisiykituti, jan jiljañampi arsusasti, taqi jumanakaruw llakisiyapxaraktam." 
2Corinthians2:6 Kuna mutuyäwtix uka jaqir jumanakax churapkta ukampix phuqhatakiwa. 
2Corinthians2:7 Jichhasti uka jaqirux pampachaña, yanapt'añaw wakisi, ukhamat llakimpi jan atipjayasiñapataki." 
2Corinthians2:8 Ukat jumanakar achikt'apxsma, jichhax wasitat jupar munapxatam uñacht'ayapxam." 
2Corinthians2:9 Ukatakiw jumanakar qillqanipxsma, jumanakan chuymam uñt'añataki, ukhamaraki jumanakan jaysasir chuymam yatiñataki." 
2Corinthians2:10 Ukhamasti jumanakatix khitirus pampachapxät ukaxa, nayas juparux pampacharakïwa. Nayatix kuna utjipansa pampachstxa, jumanakat khuyapt'ayasisaw Criston nayraqatapan pampachta." 
2Corinthians2:11 Ukhamat Supayax jiwasar jan atipjkistaniti, ñanqha amtanakap sum yattanxa." 
2Corinthians2:12 Kunapachatix Tróade markar Criston suma yatiyäwi arunakap yatiyir purkäyät ukkhaxa, Tatitutak irnaqañax uka markan walipuniw utjäna." 
2Corinthians2:13 Ukampis Tito jilataxampi jan jikisitax laykux chuymaxan wali llakitaw jikxatasïyäta. Ukat jupanakampi jikisiwayasin, Macedonia markaruw sarxta." 
2Corinthians2:14 Diosax yuspagaratäpan, jupasti Cristompi chika atipjañaruw irpistu, jiwasanak tuqirakiw arunakapsa yatiyi, uka arunakasti mä suma q'apkir qulläkaspas ukhamaw taqi chiqar puri." 
2Corinthians2:15 Jiwasax Cristox Diosar luqtki uka suma incienson q'aphipjamätanwa. Ukasti qhispiyatanak taypiru, jan qhispiyatanak taypiruw puri." 
2Corinthians2:16 Jan qhispiyatanakatakix uka incienso q'aphix jiwayir q'apjamawa, ukampis qhispiyatanakatakix jakañ churir q'apjamawa. ¿Khitirak ukatak wakicht'atasti?" 
2Corinthians2:17 Janiw nanakax Diosan yatiyäwi arunakap aljas sarnaqapkti, kunjämtix waljaninakax lurapki ukhama; jan ukasti, taqi chuymaw Diosan nayraqatapan yatiyapxta, Cristompi mayakïtanakax layku." 
2Corinthians3:1 Kunapachatix akanak sapkta ukkhasti, jumanakan amuyatamat nanakpachatsa jach'achasiñ wasitat qalltapkirista ¿ukhamati? ¿Jan ukax, nanakax jumanakar mä sumat uñt'atäñatakix qillqatampich uñstapxämaxa? ¿Jan ukax mayninakjamach mä sumat uñt'atäñatak qillqat mayisipxämaxa? Janiwa." 
2Corinthians3:2 Jumanakäpxtaw nanakatakix mä sumat uñt'atäñ qillqataxa. Uka qillqatasti chuymanakaxan qillqatawa, taqi jaqirakiw uka qillqat uñt'i, ukat ullart'arakispa." 
2Corinthians3:3 Ukax qhanakïskiwa, uka qillqatax jumanakäpxtawa, pachpa Criston qillqantata, nanak tuqi churataraki; uka qillqatax janiw tintampi qillqatäkiti, jan ukasti jakkir Diosan Ajayupampi qillqatawa; uka qillqatax janiw sillp'a qalanakar qillqatäkiti, jan ukasti, jaqinakan chuymanakapar qillqatawa." 
2Corinthians3:4 Uka iyawsañaw Cristo tuqi Diosan nayraqatapan utjistu. 
2Corinthians3:5 Janiw nanakpach kun lurañatakis yatiqatäpkirista ukhamäpkti; jan ukasti, taqi kuntix lurapkta ukax Diosat juti," 
2Corinthians3:6 jupaw machaq arust'äwin luqtiritak yatichapxitu. Uka machaq arust'äwisti janiw mä kamachiru jaysañäkiti, jan ukasti Ajayun luräwiparjam jakañawa. Kamachix jiwañaruw puriyi, ukampis Diosan Ajayupax jakañ churi." 
2Corinthians3:7 Moisesan kamachipax mä sillp'a qalanakar qillqsutänwa, qhapaq qhanampi muyuntatänwa, israelita jaqinakas janiw uka qhana laykux Moisesan ajanup uñkatirjamäpkänti, ukampisa, uka qhanax chhaqtawayxakïnwa. Uka jiwañatak juchañchañataki kamachitix qhapaq qhanampi muyuntatächïnxa," 
2Corinthians3:8 ¡Diosan Ajayupxar utt'ayat machaq arust'äwin yatiyäwipax, juk'amp k'ajkirïniwa!" 
2Corinthians3:9 Ukampix sañ munta, jiwañatak juchañchatäñatak kamachitix qhapaq qhanampi muyuntatächïnxa, ukatsa juk'ampi k'ajkir kankañampiw jiwasar Diosax aski jaqit katuqkistu ukax yatiyatäni!" 
2Corinthians3:10 Nayra qhapaq qhanampi churat kamachix, janiw machaq qhapaq kankañampi churaski ukatakix kunäkisa." 
2Corinthians3:11 Tukusiñapäkän uka kamachitix qhapaq kankañampi jutchïnxa, wiñayatakïki ukasti juk'ampi jach'äniwa." 
2Corinthians3:12 Uka suyt'añaw nanakan utjapxitu, ukatarakwa taqi iyawsañamp parlapxta." 
2Corinthians3:13 Janiw nanakax Moisesjam lurapkti, jupax mä velompiw ajanup imt'asïna, ukhamat israelitanakan uka tukusir qhana jan uñjapxañapataki." 
2Corinthians3:14 Ukampis jupanakax janiw uk amuyt'añ munapkänti, jichhas kunapachatix nayra arust'äwi qillqat ullart'apki ukkhax, janiw amuyt'apkiti. Jupanakan amuyunakapax mä velompis imt'atäkaspa ukhamawa. Cristokiw jupanakar amuyt'añ yanapt'aspa." 
2Corinthians3:15 Jichhürkamas kunapachatix Moisesan qillqatanakap ullart'apki ukkhaxa, mä velow jupanakan amuyunakap imt'aski." 
2Corinthians3:16 Ukampis kunapachatix mä jaqix Tatitur makhatki ukkhaxa, uka velox apaqatäxiwa." 
2Corinthians3:17 Tatitusti Ajayuwa; kawkhankkitix Tatitun Ajayupaxa, ukkhanxa qhispiyat sarnaqasiñaw utji." 
2Corinthians3:18 Ukatpï taqi jiwasanakax, ajanunakasan uka velompi jan imantatäxatap laykux, mä lirphur uñtatjamaw Tatitun qhapaq kankañapat k'ajtanxa, ukatsti jupar uñtataw tukupxaraktan, jupan qhanapax jiwasankatap layku, uksti Ajayükis uka Tatituw jiwasanakatak luri." 
2Corinthians4:1 Ukat nanakax jan qarjasipkti, Diosaw khuyapayasiñapan aka luräwi katuyapxitu." 
2Corinthians4:2 Janiw kunatsa p'inqasipkti, janirakiw kunsa jamasanakan lurapkti; janiw jan wali amtañanakampi sarnaqapkti, janirakiw Diosan arunakapsa maysar q'iwipkti. Jan ukasti, kunatix chiqäki ukak arsupxta, ukhamat taqinimpis Diosan nayraqatapan askit uñt'ayasipxta." 
2Corinthians4:3 Diosan suma yatiyäwi arunakap parlapksma ukanakatix mä velompjam imt'ata jan qhanäkchixa, khitinakatix chhaqhañar sarapki ukanakatakikiw ukhamäski." 
2Corinthians4:4 Jupanakax janiw iyawsapkiti, ukat akapachankir supayax amuyunakap ch'amakt'ayi, Criston qhankir suma yatiyäwi arunakap jan uñjapxañapataki, Cristosti Diosan jakkir uñanaqapawa." 
2Corinthians4:5 Janiw nanak pachpat yatiyasipkti, jan ukasti Jesucriston Tatitütap yatiyapxta; nanakax Tatitur munatanakax laykuw jumanakan yanapirimar tukupxta." 
2Corinthians4:6 Diosax qhanap ch'amakan qhantaykän uka pachpa Diosarakiw chuymanakasan qhantayi. Uka qhanampisti Diosan k'ajkir kankañapax Jesucriston ajanupan qhankis uk uñt'apxañasatakiwa. 
2Corinthians4:7 Diosan uka jach'a churäwipasti janchinakasanxa mä ñiq'i phukhun imatjamawa, ukhamat uka jach'a ch'amax jan jiwasat jutatapa, jan ukasti Diosat jutatap yatisiñapataki." 
2Corinthians4:8 Jan walt'añanakax taqi tuqit muyuntapkchitu ukasa, janipuniw atipjayasipkti; llakisiñanakas utjkchixa, janiw ayñacht'apkti." 
2Corinthians4:9 Uñisiñampis arknaqapkchitu ukasa, janiw sapa irpanukutäpkti, uraqirus takisipkchitu ukasa, janipuniw tukjatäpktsa." 
2Corinthians4:10 Kawkharutix sarapkta ukkhanxa, janchinakaxan Criston jiwatap apapxapuntwa, ukhamat jupan jakatapax nanak tuqi qhanstañapataki." 
2Corinthians4:11 Nanakasti jakkasinxa sapürus Cristo laykux jiwañat qhispipxta, ukhamat Jesusan jakañapax jiwir janchinakaxan uñstañapataki." 
2Corinthians4:12 Ukhamat jiwañax nanakampïñapataki, jakañasti jumanakampïñapatakiraki." 
2Corinthians4:13 Qillqatax siwa: “Iyawstwa, ukat arsurakta” sasa. Ukhamarakiw nanakax iyawsasin parlapxarakta." 
2Corinthians4:14 Diosan Jesucristo Tatitur jiwatat jaktayatap yatipxtanwa, ukhamarakiw jiwasarux Jesusamp chika jaktayistani, jumanakampi chikarakiw jupan nayraqataparux irpxistani." 
2Corinthians4:15 Taqi ukanakasti jumanakan askimatakiw lurasiwayi, ukhamata, Diosan munasiñap katuqirinak utjatapatxa, waljaniraki Diosar yuspagarapxañapataki, Diosan qhapaq kankañapataki." 
2Corinthians4:16 Ukat nanakax janipuniw mayjt'asipkti. Janchinakaxax sapürus aynacht'aski ukasa, ajayunsti urut urutjamaw machaqar tukusipkta." 
2Corinthians4:17 Aka uraqin t'aqhisitasax janiw kunäkisa, tukusirikiwa; ukampis mä jach'a aski jilarkir wiñay kusisiñ apani." 
2Corinthians4:18 Janiw kuntix uñjktan ukar chuyma churktanti, jan ukasti, kuntix jan uñjktan ukaruw chuym katuyastan; kunatix uñjaski ukanakax tukusirikiwa, ukampis kunatix jan uñjaski ukanakasti janiw tukusirïkiti, wiñayatakiwa." 
2Corinthians5:1 Jiwasanakax akapachankir utar uñtatakïtanwa, apnaqañ utar uñtata, ukax janiw wiñayatakïkiti; ukampis yattanwa, uka utatix tukusinixa, Diosax alaxpachan wiñay uta wakicharapistu, ukasti janiw jaqinakan amparapampi luratäkiti." 
2Corinthians5:2 Ukatpï aka utan jakkasax ayqtanxa, mäpit alaxpach utasar sarxañ muntan;" 
2Corinthians5:3 uka jakañampisti isimpjamarakiw isintayatäñäni jan q'alaläskañasataki. 
2Corinthians5:4 Akapachankir utan jakkasax t'aqhistanwa, ayquraktanwa, janiw q'alaläñ munktanti, jan ukasti isthapitäñ muntanxa, ukhamat kunatix jiwirïki ukax, machaq jakañamp chhaqtayatäñapataki." 
2Corinthians5:5 Diosaw ukham wakicharapistu, uk phuqhañatakisti jupaw Qullan Ajayu churistu." 
2Corinthians5:6 Ukatpï iyawsañampi jakasktanxa, aka janchin jakkasasti, janïraw alaxpachan Tatitumpi chikäktanti." 
2Corinthians5:7 Janiw jichhax jupar uñjktanti, jan ukasti, iyawsañampi ch'amañchataw jakasipktan;" 
2Corinthians5:8 ukampis taqi iyawsañasaw utjistu, ukatsti Tatitumpi jakir sarxañatakix jiwxañak munsnaxa." 
2Corinthians5:9 Ukatpï Tatitur kusisiyañatakix sapür ch'amachastanxa, janchin jakkasinsa, jan ukax jiwxasinsa." 
2Corinthians5:10 Taqiniw Criston taripäwip nayraqatar uñstañäni, sapaqat maynis luräwipatjam katuqañapataki, janchinkkasin walsa jan walsa lurataparjama." 
2Corinthians5:11 Ukalayku, Tatitur axsartañ wakisitap yatisaxa, jaqinakar amuyt'ayañatakiw ch'amachasipxta. Diosax nanakar sum uñt'apxitu, ukhamarakiw jumanakan nanakar sum uñt'apxañam munta." 
2Corinthians5:12 Janiw nanakpachat jach'achasipktxa, jan ukasti, jumanakan nanakat kusisipxañamatakiw parlapxsma, ukhamat khitinakatix jupanakpachat jach'a jach'a tukupki uka jaqinakar arusxatapxañamataki. Uka jaqinakasti laqäxak uñch'ukipxi, janiw kunatix jaqin chuymapan utjki uk amuyapkiti." 
2Corinthians5:13 Nanakatix luqhir uñtatäpxsta ukaxa, Dios laykuw ukham sarnaqapxta; janitix luqhinakjamäpkstxa, jumanakan askimatakirakiwa." 
2Corinthians5:14 Criston munasiñapaw nanakan utjantasi, maynin taqinitak jiwatap yatxasina, ukhamïpansti, taqiniw nayra jakäwinakar jiwapxaraki." 
2Corinthians5:15 Cristox taqinitakiw jiwawayi, khitinakatix jakasipki ukanakax jan jupanakpachatak jakañapataki, jan ukasti Cristotak jakapxañapataki, jupaw jupanak layku jiwasin jaktawayi." 
2Corinthians5:16 Ukat nanakax jan khititsa akapachan amtäwinakaparjam lup'kxapxti; nayrapachax uka amtäwinakarjam Cristot lup'ipkchïyäta ukasa, jichhax janiw jupat ukham lup'kxapxti." 
2Corinthians5:17 Ukhamasti, khititix Cristompi mayachatäxchi ukax, machaq jaqïxiwa. Nayra luräwinakax tukusxiwa; jichhax taqi kunas machaqar tukutawa." 
2Corinthians5:18 Taqi akanakax Diosan luräwipawa, jupaw Cristo tuqi jupamp sumankthapiyistu, ukatsti sumankayañ arunak yatiyañatakiw jaytarakistu." 
2Corinthians5:19 Chiqpachana, Diosax Cristo tuqiw akapachampi sumankthapiskäna, jaqinakan juchanakap jan amxäsisa; jiwasanakarusti uka sumankayañ yatiyäwi arunak mayninakar yatiyiriw jaytarakistu." 
2Corinthians5:20 Ukhamasti nanakax Criston khithanit arsuripäpxtwa, ukasti Dios kipkas jumanakar nanak tuqi achikt'apkiristam ukhamawa. Ukhamasti, Criston sutipxaruw achikt'apxsma, Diosampi sumankxapxañamataki." 
2Corinthians5:21 Cristox janiw kuna juchsa lurkänti; ukampis Diosax jiwasanak laykuw juchan jaqirjam uñjäna, ukhamat jiwasanakan Cristonkasin askit katuqatäñasataki." 
2Corinthians6:1 Nanakasti Diosan luräwipan irnaqirinakjamax jumanakaruw achikt'apxsma, kuna khuyapayasiñtix Diosax jumanakar uñacht'ayapktam uk jan ina ch'usar tukuyapxamti." 
2Corinthians6:2 Jupax Qillqatanakan siwa: “Wakiskir pachan ist'sma; qhispiyasiñ urun yanapt'araksma” sasa. Jichhaw uka wakiskir pachaxa. ¡Jichhaw qhispiyasiñ uruxa! 
2Corinthians6:3 Janiw khitirus jan wali sarnaqäwimpi uñacht'ayapkti, nanakan luräwinakaxax jan jisk'achat uñjasiskañapataki." 
2Corinthians6:4 Ukat sipana, taqi kunan nanakax Diosan irnaqiripäpxatax uñacht'ayapxta, wali llamp'u chuymampiw t'aqhisipxta, pist'ayasiñanakana, jan walt'añanakansa." 
2Corinthians6:5 Jawq'jasin carcelar uskuntapxitu, jaqinakan uxutanakap taypin usuchjapxitu, wali ch'ama tukusaw irnaqapxta, jan ikini, jan manq'atarakiw sarnaqapxta."
